subject: Voting Rights in PERIL!!!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by VPP
body:
We MUST abolish the filibuster
| **_BRAND NEW EXPERT ANALYSIS:_**

**Manchin, Sinema leave Dems in the lurch as voting rights for millions of Americans hang by a thread** | [Manchin and Sinema’s refusal to abolish the filibuster will cost us the House, the Senate, and our VERY DEMOCRACY. We MUST abolish the filibuster if we want to pass the Freedom to Vote: John Lewis Act and stop GOP voter suppression! Add your name to DEMAND Manchin and Sinema abolish the filibuster »](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/Abolish_Filibuster_Jan2022/?source=VPP_20220122_EMPET_E3_T0_AC&t=6&akid=1157%2E878179%2EX8cg4U)
---
[*** 50,000 DEMOCRATS NEEDED | PETITION CLOSES AT 11:59PM ***](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/Abolish_Filibuster_Jan2022/?source=VPP_20220122_EMPET_E3_T0_AC&t=7&akid=1157%2E878179%2EX8cg4U)
* * *
The GOP is using the filibuster to DESTROY Biden’s priorities and rig elections in their favor. And two Democrats are helping them do it.

_We’re FURIOUS – because that means we get:_

**❌ NO** Freedom to Vote: John Lewis Act
**❌ NO** Build Back Better Act
**❌ NO** Congressional Majorities for Democrats

We expect Senate Republicans to REFUSE to act in good faith.

**But when Senate Democrats do the same, it really makes us furious.**

[**Please, we need 50,000 good Democrats to sign our petition and show a MASSIVE flood of public outrage over Manchin and Sinema’s actions. Sign now to DEMAND that Manchin and Sinema abolish the filibuster »**](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/Abolish_Filibuster_Jan2022/?source=VPP_20220122_EMPET_E3_T0_AC&t=8&akid=1157%2E878179%2EX8cg4U)
[ADD MY NAME! »](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/Abolish_Filibuster_Jan2022/?source=VPP_20220122_EMPET_E3_T0_AC&t=9&akid=1157%2E878179%2EX8cg4U)
---
_-- VPP_
| | Paid for by VPP
(www.protectvoting.org)
Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. 401 2nd Ave. S, Ste. 303, Seattle, WA 98104

The Voter Protection Project is on an important mission: To end partisan gerrymandering and voter suppression by electing candidates at the state and federal levels that are forceful advocates for voting rights. Our enfranchisement agenda includes working to ensure that every state has automatic voter registration and online voter registration, convenient early voting, and independent redistricting commissions to ensure politicians are not able to draw their own maps.

Please, consider making a [one-time contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/121?t=1&akid=1157%2E878179%2EX8cg4U). **Or, to make the most powerful lasting impact and help us oust Republicans up and down the ballot who attack our right to vote, make a[monthly sustaining contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/122?t=2&akid=1157%2E878179%2EX8cg4U).**

[Click here](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/fewer-emails/?t=3&akid=1157%2E878179%2EX8cg4U) to request fewer emails. Click here to [unsubscribe](https://act.protectvoting.org/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=10&akid=1157%2E878179%2EX8cg4U). | | [Please: Pitch In Once A Month To Protect Voting Rights »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/123?t=4&akid=1157%2E878179%2EX8cg4U)

I’m sure you get a ton of spammy fundraising emails telling you “our future is on the line if you don’t chip in right now.” _Well, enough gimmicks._
The stakes ARE high in the race, and I’m going to give it to you straight — I need your help to defend this seat and hold on to our accomplishments in 2022. Together, we can:
* **PROTECT** our state public health insurance option
* **STRENGTHEN** public education with hundreds of millions in funding
* **SUPPORT** workers by standing up for unions
* **PRESERVE** voting rights with mail-in ballots
* **DEFEND** reproductive rights

**I’m not going to sugarcoat it: this race is going to be a close one.**
But, anyone who’s counting us out is making a big mistake. I know that the strength of this grassroots movement can Keep Nevada Blue in 2022 and beyond. [So, will you chip in $6 or more and help us keep up the fight?](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953zlDPxDHCSe8GlVxjXZtZRtWVosFDOdxjTsPapgXgvbnOu7c3wE40YMUzYUkJMd8paW17jaa41ErOUKUHk4WO5IE50iKiAenODDINTudqjXq9pWL3rDZK63ciaHsdtJbaIQtPGV9O-a0EqfNUanXJ7GjgLpai3SMPjLAg0kA-ZcUOMMWwzcc-or_5HK0YoSqkcMNBRB6ssV4KyFA2v33hEPOm9z9dBm47_IyyLJWMRsheuUXSB3k1jrf-Fr_UsPCarDmaJ-ufpJq4117Eu01RFEj_r1rlQcYDOs6pL9jhGMNqwYme8nWKN6pKnk4W63wscEFHK_p70qgflGTJ7e_3PVtBe5iYtKXeERzMleJvCygs_fx4k-ZspO9lx4RcjDl_A/3iy/OrjFWt3pS5CsVBTGlatUqw/h4/oGbpm0Nokdy0J_rM0crni2EmDa58YgUQmsF_CO82YPs)

name: Charles Booker
subject: Everyone deserves access to abortion. Period.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Booker for Kentucky
body:
[1]Charles Booker

Peter,

Today marks the 49th anniversary of the Supreme Court’s ruling to protect
access to abortion care under Roe v. Wade.

I want to make my stance clear: Everyone deserves access to quality health
care and privacy to make deeply personal health care decisions with their
doctors.

But as we’ve seen with the surge in attacks against abortion access — the
fight for reproductive justice is nowhere near over. Right now, states
like Kentucky are in grave danger to lose the right to an abortion
if Mitch McConnell’s packed Supreme Court succeeds in overturning Roe v.
Wade.

[ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cb-em-20220122?refcode=em20220122-1484&amp;amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1001&refcode2=1484_346206_8JXvBk&akid=1484%2E346206%2E8JXvBk ][IMG]

Especially after the Supreme Court signaled last year that they will
support Texas’ 6-week abortion ban and disavow the rights enshrined to us
under the original Roe v. Wade ruling — we should all be deeply
concerned,
Peter.

What’s happening right now is an urgent reminder of the work ahead of us
to defend reproductive rights.

We must keep organizing to make sure everyone has quality health care,
including abortion access. Reproductive health care must be protected.
Women’s rights must be protected. The Supreme Court must be expanded.

This is also a reminder of how much is at stake in our elections. This is
why we’re running against Rand Paul who has consistently upheld an
anti-woman and anti-family agenda and voted against the protections we
need to defend reproductive rights. This is why it’s so critical we expand
our Senate majority and end the destructive filibuster that has blocked so
many opportunities to protect abortion access in our country.

No matter what, we won’t back down. Together, we will fight to make sure
women can make choices over their health care and their lives. [ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cb-em-20220122?refcode=em20220122-1484&amp;amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1002&refcode2=1484_346206_8JXvBk&akid=1484%2E346206%2E8JXvBk ]If
you’re ready to rise up with us in this work, please show your support
today and chip in $5 to support our grassroots campaign.

In solidarity,

Charles

Contribute to Charles Booker: https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cb-email-donate?refcode=em20220122-1484-footer&t=1003&refcode2=1484_346206_8JXvBk&akid=1484%2E346206%2E8JXvBk

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to get involved. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe:

You can unsubscribe from this mailing list at any time:
http://act.charlesbooker.org/cms/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?akid=1484%2E346206%2E8JXvBk

Contributions to Booker for Kentucky are not deductible for federal income tax purposes.

Paid for by Booker for Kentucky

name: Scott Fitzgerald
subject: Do you believe in defending the unborn?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Scott Fitzgerald for Congress
body:
Peter,[**I am pro-life, I always have been and I always will be.**](https://scottfitzgerald.cmail19.com/t/t-l-cujkjhd-yuhdluddtl-r/) Today - January 22 - is Celebration of Life Day, established by Ronald Reagan in 1984 as a day to celebrate and remember the importance of life, particularly the lives of children and the unborn.Whether you were in D.C. this week for **March for Life** , or simply honoring the gift of life in your own way this week, I wanted to invite you to add your voice to mine by [signing my petition to **stand with life **and the rights of the unborn](https://scottfitzgerald.cmail19.com/t/t-l-cujkjhd-yuhdluddtl-y/)! [](https://scottfitzgerald.cmail19.com/t/t-l-cujkjhd-yuhdluddtl-j/) We don't know what's going to happen in the Supreme Court, but this could be our last March for Life and Celebration of Life Day under Roe v. Wade.If you're with me in this fight, [**sign my petition immediately!**](https://scottfitzgerald.cmail19.com/t/t-l-cujkjhd-yuhdluddtl-t/) [STAND WITH THE UNBORN >> SIGN NOW](https://scottfitzgerald.cmail19.com/t/t-l-cujkjhd-yuhdluddtl-h/) [**Overturning Roe v. Wade would be a monumental moment for the pro-life movement.**](https://scottfitzgerald.cmail19.com/t/t-l-cujkjhd-yuhdluddtl-k/) I'm a proud member of that movement - I have been throughout my career. In Congress, I was honored to sponsor the**No Taxpayer Funding for Abortion Act, **which I am continuing to fight for as we move through this session.**I hope to see your name on my petition this week. **Thank you,Congressman Scott Fitzgerald [Sign Now](https://scottfitzgerald.cmail19.com/t/t-l-cujkjhd-yuhdluddtl-u/) [](https://scottfitzgerald.cmail19.com/t/t-l-cujkjhd-yuhdluddtl-o/) [](https://scottfitzgerald.cmail19.com/t/t-l-cujkjhd-yuhdluddtl-b/)[](https://scottfitzgerald.cmail19.com/t/t-l-cujkjhd-yuhdluddtl-n/) | Paid for by Scott Fitzgerald for Congress
P.O. Box 5048, Elm Grove, WI 53122 [Preferences](https://scottfitzgerald.updatemyprofile.com/t-cujkjhd-D494E01E-yuhdluddtl-p) | [Unsubscribe](https://scottfitzgerald.cmail19.com/t/t-u-cujkjhd-yuhdluddtl-x/)
---

We don't know what's going to happen in the Supreme Court, but this could be our last March for Life and Celebration of Life Day under Roe v. name: National Republican Polling
subject: We hate to see you go.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the NRCC and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
Your 2 year membership streak is at risk. Renew now >>>
_Sponsored message_

| |
---
| | | **ATTN: Your Republican Membership has EXPIRED**
For the last **2 years** , you have consistently stood by House Republicans' side. You've supported the Conservative fight furiously and consistently through every battle we've seen, **but we have bad news for you. **

**It pains me to have to tell you that for the first time ever, you 've failed to renew your Republican Membership and have lost your support streak.**

There's good news though. I spoke with leadership about this special circumstance, and they have allowed us to extend our Membership renewal period to **[11:59 PM TONIGHT.](http://e.nationalrepublicanpolling.com/rd/9z2zmmqvev7dsi1f697v99r760r94kglpjiha602hro_rp22sh2s8i66ob2cjj6aor0sdh2bs "11:59 PM TONIGHT.")**

**[Are you going to renew your 2022 Membership and become a sustaining Republican Member for 2 consecutive years, or have we lost your support to the Left and you are going to let your streak fade away?](http://e.nationalrepublicanpolling.com/rd/9z2zp1qc8603l4pbslu3lof15bn9aaeghtcjfdj4gko_rp22sh2s8i66ob2cjj6aor0sdh2bs "Are you going to renew your 2022 Membership and become a sustain Republican Member for 2 consecutive years, or have we lost your support to the Left and you are going to let your streak fade away?")**

---
| | | [RENEW YOUR MEMBERSHIP](http://e.nationalrepublicanpolling.com/rd/9z2zsvm4ltfajrh4didg4vt5vvpbngsth34jlr4mh30_rp22sh2s8i66ob2cjj6aor0sdh2bs)
---
| [](http://e.nationalrepublicanpolling.com/rd/9z2zv35bdgcebnqlcajcubvpgr6b4bpju7v9kl0r14g_rp22sh2s8i66ob2cjj6aor0sdh2bs)
---

We're approaching the biggest battle of our lives. The 2022 Midterm Elections will be the toughest election we've seen yet, and we need our strongest grassroots supporters on our side.

**The Democrats raised over $130 MILLION last year alone.** We're already behind, but with your help, we can close the gap, and take back the Conservative Majority in Congress.

You only have until **[11:59 PM](http://e.nationalrepublicanpolling.com/rd/9z2zs47e6udipec3p0do01r69duj0i5krmjt5ejcqp0_rp22sh2s8i66ob2cjj6aor0sdh2bs)** to let us know if you plan to stand against the Left and their radical socialist agenda for a 3rd year in a row. **[Renew before it's too late >>>](http://e.nationalrepublicanpolling.com/rd/9z2zceofsji7p3aseo3774nb62nbd2mnnvforrr4fc0_rp22sh2s8i66ob2cjj6aor0sdh2bs)**

Americans across the country are counting on you. Don't let them down.

Thank you,

Mark, National Republican Membership Office

---
| |
* * *

[](http://e.nationalrepublicanpolling.com/rd/9z2z5hl7b5163pu741u58q5l06tcb81lhbk4geu4hto_rp22sh2s8i66ob2cjj6aor0sdh2bs "Red Wave Image Link")

Pelosi's raising MILLIONS and spending MILLIONS MORE attacking freedom-loving patriots across the nation. We need each and every patriot who sees this to join the fight. If we fall even a dollar short, we will lose the House to Pelosi FOREVER.

**[Can we count on you to step up?](http://e.nationalrepublicanpolling.com/rd/9z2z99b67dml852864klcsl52n9qj4jibb1vpk9jvu8_rp22sh2s8i66ob2cjj6aor0sdh2bs)**
---
| | | [DONATE](http://e.nationalrepublicanpolling.com/rd/9z2z5kj275fm2rbb60bpmr6qgimlg6kstmagqpvrge8_rp22sh2s8i66ob2cjj6aor0sdh2bs)
---

Thank you for your continued support and thank you for being a dedicated member of our team.

---

For the last 2 years, you have consistently stood by House Republicans’ side.
[View this message in your browser](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zptk6q6gf1h1ue6gtg5f7koj8qs6gk1md8js402o_rp2ash2s8gb2sbgebjqf99jk4qj4ttkumqn4s9nmorb79hnmmrq8cjm62qb6t9nkjhf4onkclijcptic1pj9o36e9ir0o3kekrm2tjgelg64ptk6dinbcbn64rradtgcoq70puie1p64pjgm9j71p5jcdjr4cj66apb6p1nm9p6cc3gm9j61o5lcdge1d9h66qj3dbi46h22sh2s8i66ob2cjj6aor2cph2bs)

| | | **ATTN: Your Republican Membership has EXPIRED**
For the last **2 years** , you have consistently stood by House Republicans' side. You've supported the Conservative fight furiously and consistently through every battle we've seen, **but we have bad news for you. **

**It pains me to have to tell you that for the first time ever, you 've failed to renew your Republican Membership and have lost your support streak.**

There's good news though. I spoke with leadership about this special circumstance, and they have allowed us to extend our Membership renewal period to **[11:59 PM TONIGHT.](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2z7i9q4c7urvgjeprpmgitbsrshgloem73tff0ljg_rp22sh2s8i66ob2cjj6aor2cph2bs "11:59 PM TONIGHT.")**

**[Are you going to renew your 2022 Membership and become a sustaining Republican Member for 2 consecutive years, or have we lost your support to the Left and you are going to let your streak fade away?](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2znepjqcjevgv75qjsqpfkik1f595f7tpcbimq8s0_rp22sh2s8i66ob2cjj6aor2cph2bs "Are you going to renew your 2022 Membership and become a sustain Republican Member for 2 consecutive years, or have we lost your support to the Left and you are going to let your streak fade away?")**

We're approaching the biggest battle of our lives. The 2022 Midterm Elections will be the toughest election we've seen yet, and we need our strongest grassroots supporters on our side.

**The Democrats raised over $130 MILLION last year alone.** We're already behind, but with your help, we can close the gap, and take back the Conservative Majority in Congress.

You only have until **[11:59 PM](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2z2dd472mq9upusn0p1l58snaiklskkiv6ae684no_rp22sh2s8i66ob2cjj6aor2cph2bs)** to let us know if you plan to stand against the Left and their radical socialist agenda for a 3rd year in a row. **[Renew before it's too late >>>](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zdlf8hjea1t15mm19gple0tkg5clf97blp5hitto_rp22sh2s8i66ob2cjj6aor2cph2bs)**

Thank you,

Mark, National Republican Membership Office

name: United American Patriots
subject: This warrior was locked in a box…for doing his job
disclaimer_text: Paid for by United American Patriots |
body:
Sergeant Michael Williams’ story is going to make your blood boil. Keep reading to find out why.
[View this message in your browser](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zbmgm8048o7hiongv6kk9qtkktc5epr783kqo5dg_rp22sh2s8i66ob2cjj6aor4cdh238h5e8he485he5o75pt7kkpq0sjnm6qb6d9le1oj8cbl6ej3fddnkgp7cc5kmdqjf972u9hf4dthmcp69d9geqr6cshje6pr7djjc1pb5c5ncgo64odnmoq3ec5h6up3bcr163jt4s3ic9j71cj6e3ib6or7m8p6cclimdi3fcjhcooj1cj6c3gbaor0s2qj2cdl66qn49fg)
| |
---
[](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2z7ues8uo50n964epqk7vdecc8ef7ub8gj2s9d9do_rp22sh2s8i66ob2cjj6aor4cdh2bs)
|
---
Fellow patriot,

_Thrown into solitary confinement for more than 100 days..._

_Locked in a tiny wooden box..._

_Forced to urinate and defecate in a water bottle..._

All of this happened to an American hero in Kuwait. If that makes you mad, this next part is going to make you even angrier, fellow patriot.

**It wasn’t the enemy who did such horrific things to this Warrior -****it was the U.S. government who treated one of our very own warfighters like a second-class criminal!**
[**HELP US GET JUSTICE FOR SGT. MICHAEL WILLIAMS**](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zrqgp53l41rl24gqqiuuob23h3v7rau51seh08n8_rp22sh2s8i66ob2cjj6aor4cdh2bs)
Sergeant Michael Williams never planned to be a career Soldier. He joined the Army when he was 19, became an elite U.S. Army Ranger, and returned to civilian life after his four-year enlistment. But after the attacks on 9/11, Sgt. Williams decided to re-enlist and avenge his country.

Michael was the kind of guy who always put his men and his mission first. That’s exactly what he was doing during his last deployment - the very mission that landed him in solitary confinement.

[](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zn8g0o2ftdh6fhq8m0jkftbe3u6ueopnj5aillv0_rp22sh2s8i66ob2cjj6aor4cdh2bs)

Sgt. Williams was leading a squad in house-to-house combat. They were up against an insurgent group that used vicious guerilla tactics to take Americans down.

When Sgt. Williams and his men entered a fortified compound, they found an enemy combatant who was armed with an AK-47. The barrel was still hot from shooting at US forces.

Under normal circumstances, they would have taken the combatant as prisoner, but time was running out in this operation. Sgt. Williams was faced with a challenging decision: kill the enemy combatant or turn him loose and risk him killing even more Americans.

If you’ve ever heard the “Lone Survivor” story, you know how this situation could have ended. Only one Navy SEAL made it out alive after they released the detainees...

Sgt. Williams wanted a different ending for his team’s story, so he made the difficult choice to kill the combatant to protect his Soldiers and finish the mission.

**Because of Sgt. Williams’ decisive leadership, all of his men survived the operation.**

But instead of treating this Warrior like the hero that he is, the U.S. Government:

_✔️ Charged him with murder_
_✔️ Placed him in solitary confinement in an 8x8 wooden box_
_✔️ Paired him with an inexperienced JAG officer who pressured him to plead guilty_
_✔️ Rushed through his trial in Kuwait _
_✔️ Sentenced him to 25 years in prison_

Fellow patriot, if you are FUMING mad after hearing this, we have a favor to ask.

**UAP is working to get Sgt. Williams a full presidential pardon and clear his name now that he has been paroled, but we need all the support we can get to make it happen.****_Can we count on you to pitch in a few dollars today and help us clear this patriot’s name?_**
[**PITCH IN NOW**](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2z6kp07p660r1bkoj6jgp83p6fvi5odnhdpup7um8_rp22sh2s8i66ob2cjj6aor4cdh2bs)
It’s not too late for us to give Michael’s story a happy ending. And you can help us do it, fellow patriot.

**[Click here to make a donation of any size and help us get Sgt. Williams a presidential pardon.](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zloh6csm159e29ea2domo6f5oslturff7o3c2k28_rp22sh2s8i66ob2cjj6aor4cdh2bs)**

Thank you,
United American Patriots
**_[UAP.org](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zra5tq4grmgs3sulpdv1m07k0i75bf8e51eptqh0_rp22sh2s8i66ob2cjj6aor4cdh2bs)_**
---
United American Patriots is a grassroots organization that helps provide financial support to our nation’s Warriors who have been wrongly accused, prosecuted, or imprisoned for crimes they did not commit. We rely on donations from our network of patriots to help these American heroes and their families.

_If you want to help support our mission, you can make a donation to our Warrior Fund today._
[**SUPPORT AMERICA’S WARRIORS**](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2z73rd5h69ah3ktojg490ok53eru5e0fnvpv8c7h8_rp22sh2s8i66ob2cjj6aor4cdh2bs)
---

571-366-1835

# Weekly Newsletter
---
|
---
January 23, 2022 | Issue IV
---
| |
---
| |
---
### New York Senate Republicans: No More Mandates
---
Republican Leaders Call Upon Governor & Democrat One-Party Rule to END One-Size-Fits-All Albany Mandates, & Return to Fact-Based, Collaborative Governing
---
---
On Wednesday, Leader Rob Ortt and his colleagues in the New York State Senate gathered in Albany for a press conference calling for an end to the overreaching government mandates.
"Nearly two years ago, New York became the epicenter of the COVID-19 pandemic. Our state was shut down, our schools were closed, and our economy was decimated. Nearly 700 days later, the results speak for themselves. One-size-fits-all Albany mandates didn't work under Governor Cuomo, they don't work under Governor Hochul, and New Yorkers are fed up. It's past time to return to a system of governance based on facts and collaboration - not politics and dictation," said Senate Republican Leader Rob Ortt.
---
| [READ FULL RELEASE](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001csHy-BIwjolERGV4UTXiVQTtkN11tQrto6tF6b07IUWhPBwsCTNSZLzQNY5XkUuxtiP2MPTcuD3bslS83P8KT9wF0huxxwOVhemC2Ika0PkBbmEELbzjfo0hobohEXCGuOKauHJi0DTG2auBUqj54NbZlsIWAq5yJsaBQAdS6gdwF-a1tLBza1tUn0PPpp3C1mKvwQ6axsm7iBm1EEv7xQ==&c=3GRfzJLnMkBXvRQ3ATM6j_6mvZb1ifBk-HZOkcsqVEGHGjXUU4IvGA==&ch=VtAP9NwAekmR68bwBZDGoSEO4-ZvGXEEmqKsLSO65lHDGXi4nHpNzA==)
---
---
|
---
---
### Take Action to Preserve New York's Freedoms
---
---
Enough is enough. It's time to STOP the mandates.
Join Rob in the fight to preserve our freedoms by signing the petition below.
---

### Senate Republican Leader Ortt and Assemblyman Morinello Call for an End to The State Park Police Officer Hiring Freeze
---
Joined by members of the Senate and Assembly and PBA of NYS; Freeze Must End For the Safety of Tourists in our State Parks
Yesterday, January 22, Leader Rob Ortt held a press conference in Niagara Falls with Senator George Borrello, Assemblymen Angelo Morinello and Mike Norris, and Members of the PBA of New York State.
Earlier this week, Senate Leader Rob Ortt and Assemblyman Angelo Morinello sent a letter to Governor Kathy Hochul and Erik Kulleseid, Commissioner of the NYS Office of Parks, Recreation, and Historic Preservation urging them to lift the hiring freeze.
"With the ongoing pandemic, our State Park attendance is at the highest it's ever been. These areas need to be proactively policed by professionals specifically trained in this field, or else the safety of New Yorkers could be at stake. Adequately staffing our parks with Park Police will allow for a safer environment for all those who enjoy New York's outstanding state outdoor facilities," said Leader Ortt.
Under the memorandum issued by former Governor Andrew Cuomo on December 2, 2019, Park Police were placed under the operational command of the New York State Police. The letter by Leader Ortt and Assemblyman Morinello asked that this order be fully rescinded, allowing the State Park Police to be reestablished as a fully funded and independent entity. The letter also asked that all halted operations, such as the transferring of officers, promotions, and purchasing of equipment, be reinstated.
---

"My wife and I are praying for these brave officers and their families.
This tragedy is a somber reminder of the courage of the selfless men and women who put on a uniform every day and risk their own lives to protect ours.
God bless these two officers and all those who dedicate their lives to keeping New York safe."

body:
I’m a kitchen table conservative running for U.S. Senate [](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/BC.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c612934%7c6775%7c6%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c1&wdmdk=5qxkaJyLV6Ld5pojNseGFA&sysid=1)
I’m a Kitchen Table conservative running for U.S. Senate

| [](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c69706%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=8z1OWr1I60fopp%2fdMjcgfw&sysid=1) [](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c69707%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=2%2bKEe9tW4z6%2f5xuACwegZA&sysid=1)

---
Friend,

I’m Kevin Smith, and I’m officially announcing my run for the U.S. Senate seat in New Hampshire.

**I’m running to represent New Hampshire because I truly love our state and believe that we have so much to offer.**

**I’m a kitchen table conservative with local, New Hampshire values.**

[**Join my campaign today >>>**](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c69708%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=X7tMcozgb33RZsYCFNq0ig&sysid=1)

I believe that the most important decisions in America today are being made at the kitchen table, _not the halls of power in Washington or in Concord._

I’ll bring Washington back down to size. **That means requiring the federal government to balance the budget, establishing term limits for Members of Congress, putting parents back in control of their kids’ educations, and creating an economy that allows families to thrive.**

These are common-sense solutions that we need across the country.

For nearly a decade, I have served as the Town Manager of Londonderry - one of the state’s largest and most successful communities. I proudly _balanced the budget_ and _reduced local taxes_ while growing and diversifying our economy.

**With you by my side, we can put New Hampshire First and safeguard our American values. Together, we can put American families back in control of their futures. **

**Chip in to my campaign today!**
_**Let’s put America First**_

I’m a conservative, a patriot, and a father. I promise you that I’ll be a true fighter for _you_ in Washington. It’s time to bring Washington back down to size.

[**Join our campaign today! >>>**](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c69715%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=25%2bcOGLfwl2BOKTNCb0J%2bA&sysid=1)

Thank you and God Bless,

Kevin Smith

name: American Defense News
subject: Victor Davis Hanson on DVD
body:
A movement is growing, led by progressives—but supported by many well-meaning Americans—to change the way we elect our presi
[View this message in your browser](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2z7iuikak0mf9ep44oghdhsq9a57k25rlva4ffqhg_rp2ash2s8gb2sbgebjqf99jkgqracjkmoq37c9l6cqj7djl6eqjetjjkorrbdt469r31d5jekrq9onicbp74sdk6qq74o9le1hncctkm6oe0tlkcmr6eotjekq74tpl6sonaojlclob6sdgcv970sj46oob4pjiegonco70mhij1o5l65iecpj66lgb6p77m8omcd34mdh6fc5lclp238h1e8he4933c5h69ob4c1i62oh5u)
This sponsored message from American Defense News is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zgp9gbkgorfegmp1rbnl59pfgr9d64i189e62l9o_rp22sh2s8i66ob2cjgm8o34c5h2bs) Dear Fellow American, I am enclosing a survey on a very urgent matter. It will only take a moment of your time, but the topic is vital to our nation’s future. A movement is growing, led by progressives—but supported by many well-meaning Americans—to change the way we elect our president. In effect, it seeks to do away with the Electoral College as devised by the Framers of our Constitution. That’s why Hillsdale College is conducting a **National Survey on Presidential Selection.** By completing this survey and returning it to me as soon as possible, you will help Hillsdale College more clearly understand the views of mainstream Americans concerning this issue—views we will make available to policymakers and opinion leaders. You can complete the **National Survey on Presidential Selection** by using the link below: **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/electoral-college-survey](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2z0uta2i2m39apsgudgd4bfpu9m583fq3199rtgo8_rp22sh2s8i66ob2cjgm8o34c5h2bs)** For most of our nation’s history, the Electoral College, as devised by the Framers of our Constitution, was not controversial. Indeed, it was considered essential to preserving free and representative government. **But today, more than a dozen states have joined together in an attempt to undermine this constitutional bulwark of liberty.** This movement to undermine the Constitution has grown largely because of the failure of America’s schools to provide young people with a proper grounding in American civics—too many Americans simply don’t understand the importance of the Constitution, including the Electoral College, to liberty. Because of this, Hillsdale College has expanded its educational mission on behalf of liberty nationwide, directly teaching **millions** of Americans in all 50 states. These efforts, which aim to counter the Left’s domination over most of our schools, include:
* **Teaching** millions of citizens nationwide through free online courses, such as “Constitution 101” and “The Great American Story: A Land of Hope;”
* **Reaching** over 5.6 million households and businesses nationwide with _Imprimis_ , Hillsdale’s free digest of liberty;
* **Promoting** constitutional education through social media outlets popular with young people;
* **Sending** millions of pocket-size copies of America’s founding documents to citizens and K-12 schools across America, as well as to members of our armed forces; and
* **Restoring** excellence to K-12 education through Hillsdale’s Barney Charter School Initiative, which launches and provides guidance to classical K-12 charter schools nationwide.

Your answers to the **National Survey on Presidential Selection** will help Hillsdale form the most effective strategy to educate millions of Americans about the importance of the Constitution to liberty—including the importance of the Electoral College. **And this is especially important in this critical time for America’s future.** So please share your views on this urgent topic by completing our **National Survey on Presidential Selection** and returning it to me as soon as possible. It will only take a few minutes of your time. **You can take the survey using this secure link I've provided below:** **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/electoral-college-survey](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zvu7kiu4qvstbq8bb8fl93bfb0sc00gq0pklaqno_rp22sh2s8i66ob2cjgm8o34c5h2bs)** And after you take your survey, I hope you will also consider supporting Hillsdale College with a tax-deductible gift. Since 1844, Hillsdale has been “pursuing truth and defending liberty.” Today, it does so through its extensive educational outreach efforts, while refusing to accept ONE PENNY of government funding—not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans. The support of private citizens like you is essential to our work. Please represent your state and take the **National Survey on Presidential Selection today**. Thank you for your time and attention—and for your friendship and support of liberty. Warm regards, Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844
---
If dpwillis67@gmail.com should not be subscribed or if you need to change your subscription information for American Defense News, [please use this preferences page](http://e.americandefensenews.com/prefs/9z2zdvt9apmvls9ar948ptehcfie9mn8f9lrrm21hpg).
625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314

[](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zd39hboklke41fheiqiqd6s26fb75fhhphtefbvo_rp22sh2s8i66ob2cjgm8o34c5h238h5e8he49h666qbcdli6uon49fg)

name: Kevin D. Roberts, Ph.D.
subject: Sign the pledge to stop the unlawful COVID-19 vaccine mandate
body:
I’m writing to you today with an urgent need. With the threat of the Biden administration’s reckless and unlawful Covid-19 vaccine mandate, my work to defend your conservative values has been cut out for me from the very moment I arrived at Heritage. [](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/BC.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c210334%7c8478%7c8%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c805&wdmdk=Mbe2aST%2f4kBMxME9QzutPQ&sysid=1)
| | | [](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c12161%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=di6PVEPwxwhond%2fH4BtA3Q&sysid=1)
---
| | Dear Fellow Patriot, Please allow me to introduce myself as the new President of The Heritage Foundation. I’m writing to you today with an urgent need. With the threat of the Biden administration’s reckless and unlawful Covid-19 vaccine mandate, my work to defend your conservative values has been cut out for me from the very moment I arrived at Heritage. **But the good news is, I’m leading a team that fights back whenever your freedom is threatened.** I’m extremely proud to share with you that Heritage has filed a federal lawsuit challenging the Biden administration’s unlawful mandate. Because we recognize this vaccine mandate as exactly what it is: a dangerous level of government overreach attempting to strip your foundational liberty to make your own personal medical decisions.

At Heritage, we are focused on returning power to the people. We are working to preserve and defend your individual liberties guaranteed in U.S. Constitution. We are standing rock solid in defense of the very values that make America great. We are fighting this government power grab and protecting the rights and freedoms of all Americans. But we’re looking for the support of proud American citizens like you. And today, I need to know that you are standing beside us as we fight back. [**That’s why I’m asking you to sign our Pledge to Stop the Unlawful Vaccine Mandate.**](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c12162%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=zWzwiSCA7npH9kB72lZFcg&sysid=1) It’s urgent that we know you are with us. I would be honored to see your name added to the pledge.
**You can sign the pledge right now using this link:**[**https://secured.heritage.org/vaccine-mandate-pledge/**](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c12163%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=irJDmEXX%2bP1uYX3xRiXF1A&sysid=1) And you are more than welcome to share it with everyone you know. If we want to stop this violation of your freedom and privacy, we need as many people as possible to stand up against a mandate the Department of Labor has no authority to impose. **Please don’t delay. Be sure to add your name to the pledge right now.** Sincerely yours, Kevin D. Roberts, Ph.D.
President, The Heritage Foundation
---
| | The Heritage Foundation 214 Massachusetts Avenue NE Washington D.C. 20002
---
_625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314_
_[Unsubscribe](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/OptOut.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c210334%7c8478%7c8%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c805&wdmdk=Mbe2aST%2f4kBMxME9QzutPQ&sysid=1)_

[](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/CB.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c210334%7c8478%7c8%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c805&wdmdk=Mbe2aST%2f4kBMxME9QzutPQ&sysid=1)

I would be honored to see your name added to the pledge. You can sign the pledge right now using this link: And you are more than welcome to share it with everyone you know. If we want to stop this violation of your freedom and privacy, we need as many people as possible to stand up against a mandate the Department of Labor has no authority to impose. Please don’t delay. Be sure to add your name to the pledge right now. Sincerely yours, Kevin D. Roberts, Ph.D. President, The Heritage Foundation | | The Heritage Foundation 214 Massachusetts Avenue NE Washington D.C. 20002 625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314

Florida will determine whether Democrats keep our Senate majority – that’s why Republicans are pouring millions of dollars into this race to crush our movement _and_ keep Florida red _permanently_. name: Andy Kim
subject: The suit I wore. The story we’ll tell.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Andy Kim for Congress
body:
It wasn’t special, until January 6.
| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40967149/326755230/1642521363?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84Nzk3MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiNWM3MTQ4NS01ODdjLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=jeyYx6LoRM5x_JXkNSKdPciSAb7Y7OdKLafkr3j58Ww=&emci=ad64cd97-6572-ec11-94f6-c896650d923c&emdi=b5c71485-587c-ec11-94f6-c896650d4442&ceid=26261389)
---

| | _Andy Kim is one of seven House Democrats elected in 2020 in a district that also voted for Trump.You’re receiving this email because you support progress on the same key issues that Andy is fighting for every day in Congress. But, if you aren’t with us in that fight, or if we have the wrong person you can[unsubscribe](https://email.ngpvan.com/unsubscribeUnique/ad64cd97-6572-ec11-94f6-c896650d923c/b5c71485-587c-ec11-94f6-c896650d4442?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84Nzk3MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiNWM3MTQ4NS01ODdjLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=jeyYx6LoRM5x_JXkNSKdPciSAb7Y7OdKLafkr3j58Ww=&id=129251239) at any time. _ Believe it or not, I found it on the sale rack at J. Crew, not long after the 2020 election. I liked the bold blue color and thought I might wear it to the inauguration a few weeks later. When I donated it to the Smithsonian, the knees were still caked in dust from the night I spent cleaning trash and cigarette butts off of the Capitol's rotunda floor on January 6. [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40967170/326755306/1088109533?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84Nzk3MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiNWM3MTQ4NS01ODdjLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=jeyYx6LoRM5x_JXkNSKdPciSAb7Y7OdKLafkr3j58Ww=&emci=ad64cd97-6572-ec11-94f6-c896650d923c&emdi=b5c71485-587c-ec11-94f6-c896650d4442&ceid=26261389) _Holding my bright blue suit, perhaps for the last time, before I donated it to the Smithsonian. Click on the image above for the full Twitter thread._ Honestly, I had seriously considered throwing it away until the Smithsonian called. That day still brings such terrible memories for me; I knew I'd never wear it again. But the story of January 6 isn't just about violence, insurrection, and trauma. Like our country's story, that day ended full of hope, resilience, civility, and service. Even the simple step I took to help clean up that trash the insurrectionists left behind sparked something much more significant. In the weeks that followed, I received thousands of cards and letters from folks across the country who were inspired or comforted by what they saw. I still cherish every single one. _I never imagined that something as simple and reflexive as cleaning up a mess could become inspirational to those like the artist who sent me this wonderful illustration._ Those cards remind me how strong this country is. Right now, our partisan divide can seem so deep that it threatens to tear us apart. We saw it on full display on January 6, and we must ensure nothing like that ever happens again. That means working with Congress to protect our Capitol, but it also means all of us working together to find common ground. **That common ground is closer than you might realize.** I can clearly see the disconnect between the partisan wars being waged in DC and my friends and neighbors in my so-called "swing district" in NJ-03. We are honestly all just exhausted by the endless cycles of misinformation and outrage. It's a mess, for sure—and it's all of ours to clean up together. I'm raising my two Jersey boys in the same community that welcomed my parents from South Korea. Everything I do in Congress is to keep the promise I made to help build them a better world than the one we inherited. That's why the movement we're building is focused on civility and service, starting in the same South Jersey community that raised me and stretching out to every corner of our country. I'm so excited to welcome you to our movement today. Grassroots supporters like you have always been the foundation for everything we do, and I can't wait to see what we can accomplish together. clean_body: It wasn’t special, until January 6. | | | Andy Kim is one of seven House Democrats elected in 2020 in a district that also voted for Trump.You’re receiving this email because you support progress on the same key issues that Andy is fighting for every day in Congress. But, if you aren’t with us in that fight, or if we have the wrong person you can at any time. Believe it or not, I found it on the sale rack at J. Crew, not long after the 2020 election. I liked the bold blue color and thought I might wear it to the inauguration a few weeks later. When I donated it to the Smithsonian, the knees were still caked in dust from the night I spent cleaning trash and cigarette butts off of the Capitol's rotunda floor on January 6. Holding my bright blue suit, perhaps for the last time, before I donated it to the Smithsonian. Click on the image above for the full Twitter thread. Honestly, I had seriously considered throwing it away until the Smithsonian called. That day still brings such terrible memories for me; I knew I'd never wear it again. But the story of January 6 isn't just about violence, insurrection, and trauma. Like our country's story, that day ended full of hope, resilience, civility, and service. Even the simple step I took to help clean up that trash the insurrectionists left behind sparked something much more significant. In the weeks that followed, I received thousands of cards and letters from folks across the country who were inspired or comforted by what they saw. I still cherish every single one. I never imagined that something as simple and reflexive as cleaning up a mess could become inspirational to those like the artist who sent me this wonderful illustration. Those cards remind me how strong this country is. Right now, our partisan divide can seem so deep that it threatens to tear us apart. We saw it on full display on January 6, and we must ensure nothing like that ever happens again. That means working with Congress to protect our Capitol, but it also means all of us working together to find common ground. That common ground is closer than you might realize. I can clearly see the disconnect between the partisan wars being waged in DC and my friends and neighbors in my so-called "swing district" in NJ-03. We are honestly all just exhausted by the endless cycles of misinformation and outrage. It's a mess, for sure—and it's all of ours to clean up together. I'm raising my two Jersey boys in the same community that welcomed my parents from South Korea. Everything I do in Congress is to keep the promise I made to help build them a better world than the one we inherited. That's why the movement we're building is focused on civility and service, starting in the same South Jersey community that raised me and stretching out to every corner of our country. I'm so excited to welcome you to our movement today. Grassroots supporters like you have always been the foundation for everything we do, and I can't wait to see what we can accomplish together. Welcome to the team! Andy | ---|---|--- | | Paid for by Andy Kim for Congress. ---|--- | This email was sent by Andy Kim for Congress P.O. Box 211 Marlton, NJ 08053 United States Email is an important way for Andy Kim to keep supporters like you informed about critical issues and to build a winning grassroots campaign. Too much email? . subject: Zama Surges to 2nd place
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Zama for PA
body:
| | |
---
| | **ZAMA JUMPS TO 2ND PLACE FINISH IN REPUBLICAN CAUCUS
Dr. Zama's Support Escalates as Governor's Race Heats Up** WAYMART, PA – Republican gubernatorial candidate, Dr. Nche Zama jumped to 2nd place in the Northeast Republican caucus voting this weekend. The strong caucus results piggyback on Dr. Zama's stellar performance in the first two Republican debates. The renowned Harvard-trained cardiothoracic surgeon continues to rapidly expand his list of supporters, endorsements, and $20 donors with his heart of Pennsylvania campaign. “I have visited all 67-counties in Pennsylvania and everywhere I go, people are so disappointed and frustrated with Harrisburg, '' added Dr Nche Zama, Republican candidate for Pennsylvania Governor. “People are sick and tired of the corruption, political infighting, overspending, and the lack of leadership and unity.” According to US News & World Report, Pennsylvania is ranked 40th as a state, 42nd in state economy, 47th in state government, 47th in state fiscal stability, and dead-last, #50 in Higher Education. Dr. Zama continued, “Pennsylvania is sick and needs a doctor. Our economy, schools, and healthcare system have been broken for years while Harrisburg remains in a coma. Instead of languishing, Pennsylvania should have a trillion-dollar economy that is globally competitive, and strongly supported by world-class schools and a top-notch healthcare system. We need to stop socialism, and demand excellence and accountability in every aspect of state government.” Dr. Zama concluded, “I want to thank the Zama team for their hard work, dedication, and friendship. The surge of support in January has been extraordinary. We’re so thankful for the big increase in $20 for Zama contributions. Together, we’re going to keep working hard, attracting Republican, Democrat, and Independent voters to our team. $20 For Zama: When he was 14-years-old, Dr. Zama arrived in America, alone, with $20 in his pocket to go to college. Since then, Dr. Zama excelled in school, became a cardiothoracic surgeon, and performed thousands of heart and lung operations across Pennsylvania, and the world. Recognizing the power of $20; supporters and donors have contributed $20 to Zama. To learn more about Dr. Zama’s incredible life journey, and join the many hundreds of $20 for Zama supporters, please visit [www.ZamaforPA.com. ](https://gmail.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0e0968883c931118cab22122d&id=01d8ea3633&e=fe97fe84cf) The Zama campaign has already pledged to fight corruption, conflicts of interest, and pay-to-play politics in Pennsylvania’s state, county and local pensions. To watch the 1st Republican Governor's debate click here: [https://pcntv.com/election/](https://gmail.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0e0968883c931118cab22122d&id=a32c0a340d&e=fe97fe84cf) To host a reception or speaking engagement contact Dr. Zama at [DrZama@ZamaForPA.com](mailto:DrZama@ZamaForPA.com) _At age 14, Dr. Zama came to the United States on a student visa with just $20 in his pocket. After years of hard work and sacrifice, he became a Harvard-trained cardiothoracic surgeon who is considered among the top heart surgeons in America. In addition to his surgical training at Harvard Medical School and the Cleveland Clinic, Dr. Zama also holds a master’s degree in management from Harvard, a PhD in chemistry, and speaks six languages. His extensive medical and educational missionary work has helped countless people around the world.

[www.ZamaforPA.com](https://gmail.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0e0968883c931118cab22122d&id=f9bba4c14b&e=fe97fe84cf)_

clean_body: | | | | | ZAMA JUMPS TO 2ND PLACE FINISH IN REPUBLICAN CAUCUS Dr. Zama's Support Escalates as Governor's Race Heats Up WAYMART, PA – Republican gubernatorial candidate, Dr. Nche Zama jumped to 2nd place in the Northeast Republican caucus voting this weekend. The strong caucus results piggyback on Dr. Zama's stellar performance in the first two Republican debates. The renowned Harvard-trained cardiothoracic surgeon continues to rapidly expand his list of supporters, endorsements, and $20 donors with his heart of Pennsylvania campaign. “I have visited all 67-counties in Pennsylvania and everywhere I go, people are so disappointed and frustrated with Harrisburg, '' added Dr Nche Zama, Republican candidate for Pennsylvania Governor. “People are sick and tired of the corruption, political infighting, overspending, and the lack of leadership and unity.” According to US News & World Report, Pennsylvania is ranked 40th as a state, 42nd in state economy, 47th in state government, 47th in state fiscal stability, and dead-last, #50 in Higher Education. Dr. Zama continued, “Pennsylvania is sick and needs a doctor. Our economy, schools, and healthcare system have been broken for years while Harrisburg remains in a coma. Instead of languishing, Pennsylvania should have a trillion-dollar economy that is globally competitive, and strongly supported by world-class schools and a top-notch healthcare system. We need to stop socialism, and demand excellence and accountability in every aspect of state government.” Dr. Zama concluded, “I want to thank the Zama team for their hard work, dedication, and friendship. The surge of support in January has been extraordinary. We’re so thankful for the big increase in $20 for Zama contributions. Together, we’re going to keep working hard, attracting Republican, Democrat, and Independent voters to our team. $20 For Zama: When he was 14-years-old, Dr. Zama arrived in America, alone, with $20 in his pocket to go to college. Since then, Dr. Zama excelled in school, became a cardiothoracic surgeon, and performed thousands of heart and lung operations across Pennsylvania, and the world. Recognizing the power of $20; supporters and donors have contributed $20 to Zama. To learn more about Dr. Zama’s incredible life journey, and join the many hundreds of $20 for Zama supporters, please visit The Zama campaign has already pledged to fight corruption, conflicts of interest, and pay-to-play politics in Pennsylvania’s state, county and local pensions. To watch the 1st Republican Governor's debate click here: To host a reception or speaking engagement contact Dr. Zama at mailto:DrZama@ZamaForPA.com At age 14, Dr. Zama came to the United States on a student visa with just $20 in his pocket. After years of hard work and sacrifice, he became a Harvard-trained cardiothoracic surgeon who is considered among the top heart surgeons in America. In addition to his surgical training at Harvard Medical School and the Cleveland Clinic, Dr. Zama also holds a master’s degree in management from Harvard, a PhD in chemistry, and speaks six languages. His extensive medical and educational missionary work has helped countless people around the world. # # Paid for by Zama for PA. name: Secretary Pompeo
subject: Why I'm Always Ready
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY CHAMPION AMERICAN VALUES
body:
I’m not going to sit on the sidelines and watch the Left destroy our country, which is why I launched the my organization: Champion American Values (CAVPAC).
& nbsp; &nb; sp;
Not interested? [Unsubscribe Here](https://trk.cp20.com/form?3ckab--fgxr-4qqlpo1&sl=2d&t=5&ac=gh7s)

|
| | | | | [](https://trk.cp20.com/click/gh7s-3ckab-1uhcv-4qqlpo4/)
---
When I served in the Army’s Second Squadron, Seventh Cavalry Regiment, our motto was **“Always Ready.”** It embodied the spirit of our mission. At every moment of every day, we had to be prepared to do our job.

At a time when our core American values are under attack, it is important that conservative patriots are Always Ready to stand up for what is right. I’m doing everything I can to champion our American values, including launching an organization - CAVPAC - to help us advance the conservative agenda and elect more principled leaders all across the country.
---
| | [](https://trk.cp20.com/click/gh7s-3ckab-1uhcw-4qqlpo5/)
---
I had the honor to serve our great nation as **President Trump’s Secretary of State**. Working alongside President Trump, we crafted policies that put America first. We stood up to China, Iran, North Korea and other rogue countries that pose a threat to Americans and our values.

But now, the radical Left is quickly undoing all our hard work and moving America in the WRONG direction. **Our values—the very values that I championed as an Army Cavalry Officer and as your Secretary of State— _are under attack_**.

I’m not going to sit on the sidelines and watch the Left destroy our country, which is why **I launched the my organization:[Champion American Values (CAVPAC)](https://trk.cp20.com/click/gh7s-3ckab-1uhcx-4qqlpo6/ "Champion American Values \(CAVPAC\)")**.

**We’re devoted to flipping control of the House and the Senate back to Republicans and advancing the America First agenda**.

See, a lot of people talk about the America First agenda or what they would do. I’ve actually talked the talk and walked the walk. I’ve traveled the world as President Trump’s chief negotiator to champion our American values and stand up against rogue regimes that threaten our freedoms and way of life. I know what it takes to actually advance and defend our American values.

We can’t let up now and allow the Democrats to take our country in entirely the wrong direction. I know that I can count on proud patriots like you to help us Champion American Values. That’s why I’m reaching out -- _**[can I count on you to become a Gold Member in our CAVPAC Conservative Cavalry](https://trk.cp20.com/click/gh7s-3ckab-1uhcy-4qqlpo7/ "can I count on you to become a Founding Member?")?**_
---
**[<< Become a Gold Member >>](https://trk.cp20.com/click/gh7s-3ckab-1uhcz-4qqlpo8/ "<< Become a Founding Member >>")**
We are only going to be successful at winning back control from the Democrats and saving our country if dedicated patriots like you join our cause. We can’t do it without you.

Do your part to protect our American values and to advance the America First agenda!

Always Ready,
---
| [](https://trk.cp20.com/click/gh7s-3ckab-1uhd0-4qqlpo5/)
---
Mike Pompeo
---
| | [DONATE](https://trk.cp20.com/click/gh7s-3ckab-1uhd1-4qqlpo6/)
---
| |
Help Champion American Values: Text **CHAMPION **to **29910**
---
| [](https://trk.cp20.com/click/gh7s-3ckab-1uhd2-4qqlpo7/ "Mike Pompeo is Calling on All Conservatives")
---

Personal note from Mike Pompeo:

I need your help if we are going to **WIN BIG** for Republicans in the upcoming elections.

I've spent my life fighting for our American values, and I'm keeping that fight alive by supporting principled conservative candidates all across the country. **[Will you chip in to help us stop the radical Left from turning America into a socialist country?](https://trk.cp20.com/click/gh7s-3ckab-1uhd3-4qqlpo8/ "Will you chip in to help us stop the radical Left from turning America into a socialist country?")**

Thanks again for all that you do, and let's keep up the good work!

-Mike

---

---

| Peter,

Election Year is here, and we've been campaigning hard in our new district lines! Virginia's 7th District has eight new localities, and we have a lot of work ahead of us!
1. We need to ensure that our current voters know they're sticking with us, and that Abigail will be on their ballot again in November!

2. We need to introduce Abigail and our campaign to volunteers, voters, and communities across our new counties!

3. We need to recruit and energize our volunteers across our district and ensure that every last voter knows Abigail, the importance of this election, and how to cast their ballot!

Thank you for all of your help and support!**_](https://act.myngp.com/el/wQQZxBPR8t1fDJ5FjZU0hkHi5GgMfZXrA_lJTl5UYyY=/NIP7pDmeJo-XAd7k_K6znFAi5v7QXMi9POfUKAjEN6M=?refcode=BLU-SPAN-20220123-1-EM&amount=25)

name: Roger Stone
subject: The attacks on me just won't stop....
body:
| |
---
**ROGER AND NYDIA STONE**
Ft. Lauderdale, Florida
---
| Dear Friend, Two weeks ago, I was required by law to respond to a subpoena from the Committee illegitimately appointed by Speaker Nancy Pelosi to "investigate" the January 6th riot at the US Capitol. Despite the fact that _I was not on The Ellipse behind The White House, did not march to the Capitol and was not present at the Capitol on January 6th_ , I was faced with the choice of responding to the subpoena or being charged with contempt by the U.S. Justice Department and being **railroaded to a D.C. prison** for refusing to respond to their subpoena. I elected to appear before the Committee (in a secret session, of course) in which I invoked my 5th Amendment Right not to answer their politically motivated questions. I put up with their badgering for three hours! Adam Schiff was an abusive a-hole! **It was clear from the questions they asked that they are seeking to frame President Donald Trump and hold him responsible for the misguided actions of unarmed and well-meaning patriots on January 6th.** [](https://DIQ27272.trk.directiq13.com/click/?sid=00ab0c0p2rwxmaok2o2wkpm&linkid=0&link=314be07ba4894fe4909002bb040ddbea) Just as I refused to betray the President in the two-year struggle in which Robert Mueller and his corrupt prosecutors subjected to a Soviet-style show trial in which a Trump-hating judge, rigged jury and corrupt prosecutors convicted me for "lying to Congress" about "Russian collusion" which declassified official documents have now proven did not exist - **I refused to answer their questions about President Trump!** **I invoked my right not to answer not because I know anything or did anything wrong or know of any wrongdoing by President Trump but I know first hand how Adam Schiff twists comments that are immaterial, irrelevant or innocuous into a "crime". They just won't leave my family and me alone!** Even now, _having been driven to the brink of bankruptcy and with my wife successfully battling stage 4 cancer_ , the relentless attacks on me in the fake news media regarding the events of January 6th, of which I have no knowledge and was not in any way involved, continue. Adding to my legal costs regarding this January 6th witch-hunt, as well as the private security required to travel to Washington D.C. and back, are six remaining baseless, groundless, harassment civil lawsuits filed against me by leftwing crackpots and George Soros-funded front groups. President Trump and I are both being sued by seven Capitol Hill police officers who falsely blame us for "violating their civil rights" on January 6th. Just the cost of the legal motion to dismiss this entirely bogus lawsuit is $12,000 so far. It is only through my renewed faith in Jesus Christ that President Donald Trump pardoned me in the politically motivated prosecution against me which was solely fabricated to pressure me to testify against the President. It is also only through the grace of God that my wife of 30 years is winning her battle with cancer. **We could never have sustained this two-year attack on our family, which has left us broke, exhausted and battered without your help and prayers.** Due to the relentless and vicious personal attacks on me everyday on Twitter, it is virtually impossible for me to travel anywhere in my hometown or to any city in America without being harassed and sometimes even physically attacked. **I have no choice but to ask you once again to send a contribution to my[ Legal Defense Fund](https://DIQ27272.trk.directiq13.com/click/?sid=00ab0c0p2rwxmaok2o2wkpm&linkid=1&link=4ad4c9ef5e8a47ea984d48e0bbc01515).** It is clear that the Democrats are petrified that President Donald Trump will run again in 2024 and that I will help him return to The White House. I will never give up in the fight for our Constitution and this Country, but I simply cannot do it without your help. I hope you will consider sending a contribution today. Mrs. Stone sends her thanks for your support and your prayers. Sincerely, Roger Stone PS - If you are uncomfortable using your credit card information on the Internet you can make a check payable to the "Stone Defense Fund" and mail it to 1007 N. Federal Highway, #405 Fort Lauderdale, FL 33304. [www.stonedefensefund.com](https://DIQ27272.trk.directiq13.com/click/?sid=00ab0c0p2rwxmaok2o2wkpm&linkid=2&link=0850e63d99184a8aae3bcf33b3d00e2c)
---

[One-Click Unsubscribe](https://DIQ27272.trk.directiq13.com/unsubscribe/?sid=00ab0c0p2rwxmaok2o2wkpm) [Report Spam](https://DIQ27272.trk.directiq13.com/unsolicited/?sid=00ab0c0p2rwxmaok2o2wkpm) [Web Version](https://www.directiq13.com/IO/viewer3.aspx?sid=00ab0c0p2rwxmaok2o2wkpm)
---

name: Team Mondaire
subject: Will you take the next step?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Mondaire for Congress_
body:
#
Team,
From authoring key provisions in the House’s recently passed _Freedom to Vote: John R. Lewis Act_ to securing much-needed federal funding for infrastructure projects to cutting child poverty in half through the expanded and fully refundable Child Tax Credit, Mondaire is leading the charge on several critical battles and delivering for the people.
With so much on the line this year, we need support from our grassroots movement now more than ever.
**[Friend, as one of our most dedicated supporters, can we count on you to take the next step and commit to a monthly recurring donation? Your commitment will ensure we have the resources to keep Mondaire fighting in Washington.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40975610/326784460/-2132411086?recurring=true&refcode=AU_MLJ_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20220123_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83ODAzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyYjJmNjk4NC02NTdjLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ukDDwKKExm2D_MkShUzsSNDJFpgVvLdGGJ4hxLb552Q=)**

Mondaire is ready to continue working on behalf of folks across the country — but first, we need to make sure he is re-elected in November.
It’s clear that the GOP is desperate to retake control of Congress and undo our progress. That’s why they’re working so hard to disenfranchise voters of color, and undermine the integrity of our elections. With your help, our campaign can stay competitive against our opponents, who are bankrolled by corporations and lobbyists. We’re proud to be powered by people like you, but we need your support to make it through November.

Team Mondaire

subject: Outraised, outspent

Team – Mitch McConnell and dark money groups have spent over $7 million on attack ads against Maggie Hassan. **That’s more than they’ve spent attacking any other Democratic Senator in the country.** **But here's the problem:** In 2021, we didn’t raise as much money as other vulnerable Democrats. That means that we’re getting hit the hardest by the GOP, but we have the fewest resources to fight back. **If we're outraised and outspent again in 2022, we'll have no chance of holding this seat.** With polls showing a tied race, we need to make up ground – and fast – or we could lose this election and our Senate majority. **So here's the deal, folks:** If you’re going to donate to a campaign today, your contribution will have the biggest impact in New Hampshire. **[Please, if you can, rush $5 today to turn the polls around and fight back against the GOP’s attacks.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40976251/326787000/-1281091919?refcode=e20220123_outraised&amounts=5,25,50,100,250&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODg1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzY2M5YTEwYi02NjdjLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=NPU0vJL6VcrxSHgwuwykVH0r4eRkE3EB1srPUJ585xM=)** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | [Rush $5](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40976252/326787001/-1281091919?refcode=e20220123_outraised&amounts=5,25,50,100,250&express_lane=true&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODg1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzY2M5YTEwYi02NjdjLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=NPU0vJL6VcrxSHgwuwykVH0r4eRkE3EB1srPUJ585xM=)

subject: Please, will you take a moment to hear me out?
disclaimer_text: Paid for and approved by Charlie Crist, Democrat for Governor
body:
|
---

| | I won’t beat around the bush, friend: I’m writing to ask you to **[pitch in to my campaign and help us defeat Governor DeSantis.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40976547/326788822/-1399758842?refcode=20220123_f_1_ND&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTYxOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3Mjk4OWM5OS02NzdjLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=kyZBDG2xIb-StxDKdyNzuaY2rXlx--Hp3OMRGo3AfDA=)** And if you’ll take just a moment to hear me out, I’ll tell you why your support at this key moment is so important. | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40976548/326788824/-1399758842?refcode=20220123_f_1_ND&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTYxOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3Mjk4OWM5OS02NzdjLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=kyZBDG2xIb-StxDKdyNzuaY2rXlx--Hp3OMRGo3AfDA=)
---
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40976549/326788826/-1399758842?refcode=20220123_f_1_ND&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTYxOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3Mjk4OWM5OS02NzdjLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=kyZBDG2xIb-StxDKdyNzuaY2rXlx--Hp3OMRGo3AfDA=)
The governor’s **soft-on-COVID** stance has been costing Florida for the better part of two years. And now, we have a dangerous new surgeon general who thinks it’s ok to let kids with COVID go to school (yes, really). If we don’t defeat Governor DeSantis this year, there’s no telling what will happen.

Now here’s the good news: Recent polls show me neck-and-neck with the governor, or even **flat-out beating him.** Floridians aren’t happy with the way the governor has bungled this crisis, and they’re looking for steady leadership to get our state back on the right track.

But the governor won’t go down without a fight. His **far-right billionaire funders** \-- many of whom don’t even live in Florida -- will spend big to keep him in office. It’s our job to build a grassroots campaign that can fight back and win no matter how much money they spend.

**That’s why I’m coming to you right now, team. If you can, will you please pitch in to my campaign today to help us build the operation we need to defeat Governor DeSantis? Any amount will make an enormous difference.**

clean_body: | | | I won’t beat around the bush, friend: I’m writing to ask you to = And if you’ll take just a moment to hear me out, I’ll tell you why your support at this key moment is so important. | = = The governor’s soft-on-COVID stance has been costing Florida for the better part of two years. And now, we have a dangerous new surgeon general who thinks it’s ok to let kids with COVID go to school (yes, really). If we don’t defeat Governor DeSantis this year, there’s no telling what will happen. Now here’s the good news: Recent polls show me neck-and-neck with the governor, or even flat-out beating him. Floridians aren’t happy with the way the governor has bungled this crisis, and they’re looking for steady leadership to get our state back on the right track. But the governor won’t go down without a fight. His far-right billionaire funders \-- many of whom don’t even live in Florida -- will spend big to keep him in office. It’s our job to build a grassroots campaign that can fight back and win no matter how much money they spend. That’s why I’m coming to you right now, team. If you can, will you please pitch in to my campaign today to help us build the operation we need to defeat Governor DeSantis? Any amount will make an enormous difference. If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: = = = = = Thank you, Charlie = | Paid for and approved by Charlie Crist, Democrat for Governor Charlie Crist for Governor P.O. Box 1547 St. Petersburg, FL 33731 United States

name: Beto for Texas Campaign
subject: Public fundraising numbers were just released
body:
Derek —

We wanted to check in because Greg Abbott just released his fundraising numbers from his end-of-year Texas Ethics Commission (TEC) report. It’s a bit of a good news, bad news situation.

Good news: We’re raising money faster than Abbott. If we can accelerate the pace, we can close the gap and have a much better shot at victory.
Bad news:

Greg Abbott has been in this race a much longer time. With this new money added, he now has $65 million on hand to spend.

Let us be blunt: there are a lot of Texans who believe in what we’re doing, but they aren’t sure that we can raise the resources to get it done.They’re going to sit this one out unless we give them a reason to believe.

We need to show we can fundraise a lot faster than Abbott to give people confidence. Let’s show we can pick up the pace right now.

Split a $25 contribution between Beto and CommonGood today. We need a big surge today to show we can out-raise Greg Abbott day-by-day and close the gap between us and him. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cgva_2021_beto?refcode=20220122_CGVA_Beto_1]

It’s true we have some advantages:

First off, we didn’t screw up the power grid.

We didn’t botch the COVID response.

And we didn’t pass a brazen and unconstitutional attack on the right to abortion.

We’re the ones with a winning message. Plus, we’re launching the biggest organizing program Texas has ever seen — outdoing even what we built in 2018 when Beto came just a couple points shy of winning statewide.

But, folks, if we’re going to win, we can’t suffer a blowout on the money side. We’re going to have to close the gap a good chunk to prevent Greg Abbott from drowning us out on TV, digital, and radio ads heading into the election.

Our only chance to close the gap is through strong grassroots fundraising, which is why we’re emailing you today. Please split a $25 or more between our campaign and CommonGood before midnight tonight to help us close the gap with Abbott .
[http://secure.actblue.com/donate/cgva_2021_beto?refcode=20220122_CGVA_Beto_1]

Thanks for everything you do,

The Beto for Texas Campaign

CommonGood is dedicated to helping Democratic campaigns and organizations win critical races in Virginia and across the country.

Common Good Virginia
PO Box 26112
Arlington, VA 22215
If you would like to opt-out of future emails from Common Good Virginia, click unsubscribe: https://email.ngpvan.com/unsubscribeUnique/1b8658d0-ac7b-ec11-94f6-c896650d4442/0a0bf22e-677c-ec11-94f6-c896650d4442?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS84NzU5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwYTBiZjIyZS02NzdjLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=2nctffu9S-q66HHbpsyVxFNbQIxs9bk8AfmsSbxmScg=&id=108609855 .

name: MalcolmKenyatta.com
subject: What if?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Malcolm PAC
body:
By the time you read this, some else will have stepped up to fuel Malcolm’s path to victory.
#

Folks -
What if we don’t win this primary and Democrats end up nominating someone who can’t excite and turn out voters next November?
What if Republicans win this election and Pat Toomey gets replaced with someone even worse for working families than he is?
What if Republicans take back control of the U.S. Senate and Mitch McConnell gets his post back as Senate Majority Leader?
Sorry to put all of these dark thoughts in your head, but that’s what’s at stake in this race.
But what if you knew that our race is gaining momentum and that your contribution today could help elect Malcolm Kenyatta to the U.S. Senate?
By the time you read this, some else will have stepped up to fuel Malcolm’s path to victory, and now they’re hoping you’ll do the same.
[Could you please make a $3 contribution to elect Malcolm Kenyatta to be a champion for working families in Washington? Every donation makes a huge difference for our grassroots campaign.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40977024/326790828/-358086307?refcode2=a510ff1b-697c-ec11-94f6-c896650d4442&refcode=em220123-1-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODc1MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhNTEwZmYxYi02OTdjLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=0sPrT0RFGTjdew00vCDBcijsinbceNoNLsqMNRg7AWc=)

Team Malcolm

| Hi there Peter,

I’m Beverly Chatmon, a registered nurse, proud union member of Local 251, and a longtime Omaha resident. I’m writing today to tell you about my daughter Alisha, who is running to be the first female member of Congress from our district.

**I’ll tell you more about her in a moment, but first,[_I’m hoping you can show your support for her campaign by chipping in $3 or whatever you can spare today._](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40977151/326791706/-1590707639?refcode=BLU-ASC-20220123-1-EM&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTQ2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmOTQ0MzAzZi02YTdjLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=iBiwXlTmtAqskebAeIfWG9XHBpf-wxw9ic6TZ9vMhFg=)**

I couldn’t be more proud of my daughter. I raised Alisha and her siblings in subsidized housing right here in Omaha and we relied on many social programs. When Alisha became a mental health therapist, she had the opportunity to work at the same clinic that she grew up attending — and now she is running for Congress to give back to the community that shaped her.

Her whole life, Alisha has wanted to help people and has been determined to fight for what is right. I’ve always encouraged her to stand up for others and pay attention to ensure she can help whenever necessary. When I was in nursing school when she was just seven years old, she asked me to teach her CPR, which she has used several times to help folks in emergencies.

**I know Alisha will be a fierce advocate for Nebraska because I have seen her work to help folks every day of her life.[_Her campaign counts on supporters like you, so I’m asking you today to chip in $5, $10, or any amount to support her movement._](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40977155/326791709/-1590707639?refcode=BLU-ASC-20220123-1-EM&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTQ2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmOTQ0MzAzZi02YTdjLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=iBiwXlTmtAqskebAeIfWG9XHBpf-wxw9ic6TZ9vMhFg=)**

Beverly Chatmon

body:
This book is an essential must-read for any America First patriot who wants to understand Donald J. Trump’s successful four years as president.
& nbsp; &nb; sp;
Not interested? [Unsubscribe Here](https://trk.cp20.com/form?3cl5n--fgxr-4qqlpo0&sl=2d&t=5&ac=gh7s)

| | Want to FIRE Pelosi? **Text FIRE to 21818** to help House Republicans take back the House for the American People.
---
| | | Fellow Conservative, I signed a very limited number of copies of my new book, _Do What You Said You Would Do._

As an elite Conservative Patriot, I know you need to have one – so I set one aside for you until midnight tonight._As I said, there are an extremely limited number of signed copies and this is your only chance to grab one._

---
| | | [REQUEST YOUR SIGNED COPY](https://trk.cp20.com/click/gh7s-3cl5n-1uhp9-4qqlpo5/ "REQUEST YOUR SIGNED COPY")
---
| [](https://trk.cp20.com/click/gh7s-3cl5n-1uhpa-4qqlpo5/)
---

**This book is an essential must-read for any America First patriot who wants to understand Donald J. Trump’s successful four years as president.**

President Trump showed us how to win. He said he was going to cut taxes, he did. He said he was going to reduce regulations, he did. Do what you told them you were going to do. That’s the model that works.

**[By ordering your copy now you will be receiving a great read and supporting critical efforts to take back our Conservative House Majority.](https://trk.cp20.com/click/gh7s-3cl5n-1uhpb-4qqlpo6/ "By ordering your copy now you will be receiving a great read and supporting critical efforts to take back our Conservative House Majority. ")**

Pelosi’s targeting conservatives across America and she has more money than she knows what to do with. Pelosi will do everything in her power to make sure we FAIL, including dragging conservatives in ALL 50 states through the mud.

Taking back the House is the key to saving America. Without the House, our country will be lost forever to Nancy Pelosi and the Radical Left.

**[So please don't pass up this opportunity to ensure Pelosi fails in her quest to retain the speaker's gavel AND get your hands on this LIMITED EDITION signed copy of my book! The copies I’ve signed won’t last long, so order yours immediately.](https://trk.cp20.com/click/gh7s-3cl5n-1uhpc-4qqlpo7/ "So please don't pass up this opportunity to ensure Pelosi fails in her quest to retain the speaker's gavel AND get your hands on this LIMITED EDITION signed copy of my book! The copies I’ve signed won’t last long, so order yours immediately.")**

I stand with House Conservatives who fight for freedom in the swamp and do what they said they would do.

**[Do you?](https://trk.cp20.com/click/gh7s-3cl5n-1uhpd-4qqlpo8/ "Do you?")**

Thank you,

Jim Jordan

---
| |
* * *

[](https://trk.cp20.com/click/gh7s-3cl5n-1uhpe-4qqlpo9/ "Red Wave Image Link")

Pelosi’s raising MILLIONS and spending MILLIONS MORE attacking freedom-loving patriots across the nation. We need each and every patriot who sees this to join the fight. If we fall even a dollar short, we will lose the House to Pelosi FOREVER.

**[Can we count on you to step up?](https://trk.cp20.com/click/gh7s-3cl5n-1uhpf-4qqlpo0/ "Can we count on you to step up?")**
---
| | | [DONATE](https://trk.cp20.com/click/gh7s-3cl5n-1uhpg-4qqlpo1/ "Donate Button in Footer")
---

Thank you for your continued support and thank you for being a dedicated member of our team.

---

---
