subject: How is Biden still President?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Greene for Congress
body:
[](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/59529056:WYAILDHN5:m:1:2365227053:C4BBD8B14C030ACF34B629718AE4DAB4:r) Peter -- JOE BIDEN MUST BE IMPEACHED. _Not tomorrow. Not next week. Not next year_. **NOW** . . . before it is too late! [](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/59529056:WYAILDHN5:m:1:2365227053:C4BBD8B14C030ACF34B629718AE4DAB4:r) **[SIGN YOUR IMPEACH JOE BIDEN PETITION RIGHT AWAY](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/59529056:WYAILDHN5:m:1:2365227053:C4BBD8B14C030ACF34B629718AE4DAB4:r)** **After you sign, I'm asking you to please consider going the extra mile by [chipping in $100, $50, $25, $15 -- whatever you can most afford -- to help me "Impeach Joe Biden"](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/59529057:WYAILDHN5:m:1:2365227053:C4BBD8B14C030ACF34B629718AE4DAB4:r) and help me build momentum across America to IMPEACH JOE BIDEN**. Joe Biden refuses to resign. Republicans must impeach him before China Joe can do any more damage to America. **[SIGN YOUR IMPEACH JOE BIDEN PETITION RIGHT AWAY](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/59529056:WYAILDHN5:m:1:2365227053:C4BBD8B14C030ACF34B629718AE4DAB4:r)** There is no time to delay. **We must move swiftly to ensure that Joe Biden can no longer hurt our country and destroy it piece by piece**. The case against Joe Biden in STRONG. Consider President Biden's:
* **Dereliction of duty in Afghanistan** ; and
* Violations of immigration law that has caused a **national security crisis on our Southern border** ;

In just a year, Joe Biden has caused America to lose the respect of the entire world. The evidence is clear and his actions are so egregious that he must be impeached. Joe Biden _**DISHONORED**_ the sacrifices made by every American soldier who fought in the 20-year war, especially those who gave their life for the cause. Joe Biden _**LEFT BEHIND**_ over 10,000 American citizens to face the terrifying rule of the Taliban as they impose Sharia law across the country. **No commander-in-chief should ever leave Americans behind**! Joe Biden (along with Kamala Harris) VIOLATED our immigration laws, deprived our Border Patrol of manpower and resources, and created a national security crisis by allowing unknown foreign nationals into our country who wish to do harm to Americans. **That's why I drafted Articles of Impeachment against President Joe Biden.** **[Will you become a Citizen CoSponsor to urge your Representatives and Senators to get on board](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/59529056:WYAILDHN5:m:1:2365227053:C4BBD8B14C030ACF34B629718AE4DAB4:r)?** **The Taliban have made a fool of Joe Biden**. America's southern border is being overrun with hordes of illegal aliens. Our economy is crippled because of the Chinese Covid bioweapon. **The world is laughing at us and Joe Biden has fled into hiding**! China Joe must go. 75 million Americans are fed up with inaction. **[Will you join and become a citizen co-sponsor](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/59529056:WYAILDHN5:m:1:2365227053:C4BBD8B14C030ACF34B629718AE4DAB4:r)**? [](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/59529056:WYAILDHN5:m:1:2365227053:C4BBD8B14C030ACF34B629718AE4DAB4:r) **[I need you to join this fight: become a Citizen Co-Sponsor by signing your "Impeach Joe Biden" petition](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/59529056:WYAILDHN5:m:1:2365227053:C4BBD8B14C030ACF34B629718AE4DAB4:r)**! **After you sign, I'm asking you to please consider going the extra mile by[chipping in $100, $50, $25, $15 -- whatever you can most afford -- to the "Impeach Joe Biden Fund"](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/59529057:WYAILDHN5:m:1:2365227053:C4BBD8B14C030ACF34B629718AE4DAB4:r) and help me build momentum across America to IMPEACH JOE BIDEN**. The Biden Crime Family must be held accountable. So please, **after you become a citizen co-sponsor to impeach Joe Biden** , consider **[chipping in a constribution today](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/59529057:WYAILDHN5:m:1:2365227053:C4BBD8B14C030ACF34B629718AE4DAB4:r)**. I'll keep you updated. \-- Marjorie Taylor Greene
Congresswoman (R-GA) [](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/59529056:WYAILDHN5:m:1:2365227053:C4BBD8B14C030ACF34B629718AE4DAB4:r)

clean_body: Marco Rubio launched deceitful attack ads against Val Demings! | | | Horrible news, friend: Marco Rubio launched deceitful attack ads against Val Demings, and they're spreading across social media! This could pose a real danger to our campaign's momentum – because the truth is, polls show this race statistically tied , and he knows divisive rhetoric could give him the advantage. In a race that was decided by only 10,033 votes last time, we can't afford to lose a single voter to Rubio's lies. = = Just like Donald Trump, Rubio is throwing bogus accusations at his opponent to cover up his own record – like the fact that he voted against voting rights and the bipartisan investigation into the Jan. 6 riot at the U.S. Capitol. Val Demings can ONLY defeat Rubio if grassroots supporters like you help her amass the resources it will take to fight back against these misleading attacks – otherwise voters will ONLY hear what Rubio wants them to. National Republicans are bringing in tens of millions of dollars to propel Rubio ahead in the polls, so Val Demings cannot afford to miss tonight's $50,000 goal: = If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | = | | = | | = | | = Thank you, Team Demings | | = Val Demings here: I can’t thank you enough for fighting alongside me to flip Florida blue. Florida will determine whether Democrats keep our Senate majority – that’s why Republicans are pouring millions of dollars into this race to crush our movement and keep Florida red permanently_. Our grassroots campaign is off to a great start, but in a race as close as this one, I need your help to surge ahead and defend the Senate. I’m relying on grassroots supporters like you, donating to emails like this, to help me defeat Marco Rubio and stop Mitch McConnell from flipping the Senate. Will you donate today to help me flip Florida blue? = If you’d like to purchase merchandise to show your support for this campaign, Thank you for your continued support. Together we’re going to protect voting rights, expand access to affordable health care and fully recover from this pandemic. = By providing your mobile phone number you consent to receive recurring updates from Val Demings for U.S. Senate, including by automated text message. | | Team, With Attorney General Marua Healey in the race for governor, I wanted to take a moment to explain why I’m in this race, and why your support makes a big difference to our campaign. I got in this race because the people of Massachusetts deserve a governor who will always deliver for working families, not just when it's politically convenient. I’ve spent my career taking on – and winning – tough fights, even when it meant standing up to leaders in both parties on Beacon Hill. Now, our next fight is clear, and our campaign is grassroots. We’re supported by folks like you pitching in $5, $10, $25 – folks who propelled us to our best month ever last month, and who have had our back now. name: Kevin D. Roberts, Ph.D.
subject: Sign the pledge to stop the unlawful COVID-19 vaccine mandate
body:
I’m writing to you today with an urgent need. With the threat of the Biden administration’s reckless and unlawful Covid-19 v
[View this message in your browser](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zrtmjjudg7keb4rmh3kcvq79981js8b5ckjrsc1g_rp2ash2s8gb2sbgebjqf99jksrr0s3iekr79c9l6eon9d1hmej3fddnkgp7cc5kmdqjf972u9hf1ptgc1ob6ornc6q71c5jesqj2cdjmdg74stkc2o60p1mmmqmaddk6dq7ddhncsrt4s3icgr31cj6e9q32tj0s2q6ac70mkom9pj6coqm1cr4s1p32pjkcipmcdtgmlin48d245p25oh4cdgm4p75cjg68pj24no)
| | | [](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zdjsdakk1qmp4hu4ae4ldphhff65uljin2spb8rg_rp22sh2s8i66ob2cjim9o34cph2bs)
---
| | Dear Fellow Patriot, Please allow me to introduce myself as the new President of The Heritage Foundation. I’m writing to you today with an urgent need. With the threat of the Biden administration’s reckless and unlawful Covid-19 vaccine mandate, my work to defend your conservative values has been cut out for me from the very moment I arrived at Heritage. **But the good news is, I’m leading a team that fights back whenever your freedom is threatened.** I’m extremely proud to share with you that Heritage has filed a federal lawsuit challenging the Biden administration’s unlawful mandate. Because we recognize this vaccine mandate as exactly what it is: a dangerous level of government overreach attempting to strip your foundational liberty to make your own personal medical decisions.

At Heritage, we are focused on returning power to the people. We are working to preserve and defend your individual liberties guaranteed in U.S. Constitution. We are standing rock solid in defense of the very values that make America great. We are fighting this government power grab and protecting the rights and freedoms of all Americans. But we’re looking for the support of proud American citizens like you. And today, I need to know that you are standing beside us as we fight back. [**That’s why I’m asking you to sign our Pledge to Stop the Unlawful Vaccine Mandate.**](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zfhjoq6guc2c1ep9c9ss8c12c8splk2e36nbtdfg_rp22sh2s8i66ob2cjim9o34cph2bs) It’s urgent that we know you are with us. I would be honored to see your name added to the pledge.
**You can sign the pledge right now using this link:**[**https://secured.heritage.org/vaccine-mandate-pledge/**](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z5cva25ko660p77t99f3og656095id5q9nqpl7fg_rp22sh2s8i66ob2cjim9o34cph2bs) And you are more than welcome to share it with everyone you know. If we want to stop this violation of your freedom and privacy, we need as many people as possible to stand up against a mandate the Department of Labor has no authority to impose. **Please don’t delay. Be sure to add your name to the pledge right now.** Sincerely yours, Kevin D. Roberts, Ph.D.
President, The Heritage Foundation
---
| | The Heritage Foundation 214 Massachusetts Avenue NE Washington D.C. 20002
---

Friend, I’ve been saying it for months: Fauci is a complete fraud.

He lied about masks. He lied about the origins of COVID-19. He lied about whether or not he funded gain of function research that led to the COVID-19 – which, he did.

In fact, Fauci’s cover-up of the Wuhan Lab origin will turn out to be the most extensive cover-up in the history of science.

But here’s the thing: Fauci knows that I won’t stop until he faces the consequences for his recklessness that has cost America so much.__ He knows I’m running for re-election now. And he’s hoping I don’t make it back to Washington to hold him accountable.

_That’s why I need you to chip in now to support my campaign for re-election._
__
[**STAND WITH RAND: $100**](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zbdi1moacn7777s5nhqghvkn7r8me6lr0shrr650_rp22sh2s8i66ob2cjhm0o72cdh2bs)

Friend, the truth is Fauci has been lying straight to our faces.

And though I’ve given him MANY chances, he has flat-out refused to retract his lies.

And we know why: Dr. Fauci believes he's invisible. He believes our strong bureaucracy and his corrupt allies in Congress will defend him till the end. He thinks he can avoid accountability completely.

_I'm doing everything to prove him wrong. But I need your support._

* **If you help me win,** I promise to subpoena every last document of Dr. Fauci’s unprecedented cover-up.
* **If you help me win,** I will invite non-partisan scientists to inform America of the risks of creating viruses that don’t exist in nature.
* **If you help me win,** I will make sure we FIRE FAUCI so he can never do this to America again.

**Will you join my fight by chipping in now?:[https://secure.winred.com/randpaul/action-3549380/](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2z44tkvn3h28bclvg3uomisffukeojke3v0sv203g_rp22sh2s8i66ob2cjhm0o72cdh2bs)**

We just can’t let this fraud get away with this.

In Liberty,
Rand Paul

name: Dan Kildee
subject: Welcome to the Team!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Dan Kildee
body:
| _You’re receiving this email because of your support and commitment to Democratic values. Dan Kildee stands up to fight for our values every day in Congress. We’d love for you to join our team! But if you no longer wish to receive these emails, you can**[unsubscribe](https://email.ngpvan.com/unsubscribeUnique/0d087452-c800-ea11-828b-2818784d6d68/a0ed54fb-767c-ec11-94f6-c896650d4442?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83Nzg3NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhMGVkNTRmYi03NjdjLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=-Tc5aeejaq9H5ixZeIXtb8hEKJDE9uA2E5uSG-aa_H0=&id=138845359).**_
Welcome to the team!

Representing Michigan in Congress, I have fought hard to give a voice to working people who have felt silenced, stepped on, and overlooked. In my hometown of Flint, Michigan, I have seen first-hand the damage caused by callous politicians who choose to put profits ahead of people, only to turn a blind eye to those who need the most help in their communities.

**Sometimes it feels like Washington doesn’t listen to their constituents, but I am. Select an answer below to tell me what issues you care about most:**
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40979396/326803039/224057635?emci=0d087452-c800-ea11-828b-2818784d6d68&emdi=a0ed54fb-767c-ec11-94f6-c896650d4442&ceid=31479900&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83Nzg3NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhMGVkNTRmYi03NjdjLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=-Tc5aeejaq9H5ixZeIXtb8hEKJDE9uA2E5uSG-aa_H0=)
Friend, I’m here to fight for you and for all Americans. Working together, we can fight for our positive, progressive agenda, protecting our democracy and defending our values no matter what comes our way.

I can’t do this without you. Thank you for joining the team.

Dan Kildee
_Congressman Dan Kildee – a Flint native – is proud to represent Michigan’s Fifth District. As a Democratic party leader, Dan is fighting hard to ensure every American has access to quality health care, clean water and a good-paying job. The path to protect the Democratic majority in the House runs right through the Midwest, and as Heartland Engagement Chair, Dan's job is to protect and elect Democratic candidates. But we can’t do it without you![**Join the team and chip in here to protect our House majority and keep Dan fighting for Michigan in Congress.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40979397/326803040/-869271610?refcode=DK_EM_NEW_Welcome_1&amount=20&recurring=true&refcode2=a0ed54fb-767c-ec11-94f6-c896650d4442&emci=0d087452-c800-ea11-828b-2818784d6d68&emdi=a0ed54fb-767c-ec11-94f6-c896650d4442&ceid=31479900&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83Nzg3NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhMGVkNTRmYi03NjdjLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=-Tc5aeejaq9H5ixZeIXtb8hEKJDE9uA2E5uSG-aa_H0=)_ **[CONTRIBUTE NOW>>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40979399/326803041/-869271610?refcode=DK_EM_NEW_Welcome_1&amount=20&recurring=true&refcode2=a0ed54fb-767c-ec11-94f6-c896650d4442&emci=0d087452-c800-ea11-828b-2818784d6d68&emdi=a0ed54fb-767c-ec11-94f6-c896650d4442&ceid=31479900&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83Nzg3NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhMGVkNTRmYi03NjdjLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=-Tc5aeejaq9H5ixZeIXtb8hEKJDE9uA2E5uSG-aa_H0=)**

name: Team Eugene
subject: Our right to vote is under attack
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY DEPASQUALE FOR PA-10 Follow Eugene on social media for campaign updates:
body:
Without expanded voting rights, we’re expecting a repeat of 2020. | | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40980040/326806016/1189478040?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NTE3NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3ZDRiMTljOS03ODdjLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=VgxkZkaZM0hp2QpuGoi2Rq5Q18JrpyodOc9JM-swojE=&emci=d3fc0c9e-0c7b-ec11-94f6-c896650d4442&emdi=7d4b19c9-787c-ec11-94f6-c896650d4442&ceid=10203249)
---
Team, the writing is on the wall. This week, as Senators failed to pass legislation that would’ve restored parts of the gutted Voting Rights Act, we saw a preview of what 2022 might look like if we don’t act now. **Without expanded voting rights, we’re expecting a repeat of 2020.** In some states, the ballot box is accessible and free for all citizens to use, and in others, it will be roadblock after roadblock preventing citizens from using their constitutional right to have their voices heard. We want our elections to be fair, but we can’t have that when right-wing extremists are constantly stacking the deck in their favor. We need your voice to stop the storm that is building on the horizon. clean_body: Without expanded voting rights, we’re expecting a repeat of 2020. | | Team, the writing is on the wall. This week, as Senators failed to pass legislation that would’ve restored parts of the gutted Voting Rights Act, we saw a preview of what 2022 might look like if we don’t act now. Without expanded voting rights, we’re expecting a repeat of 2020. In some states, the ballot box is accessible and free for all citizens to use, and in others, it will be roadblock after roadblock preventing citizens from using their constitutional right to have their voices heard. We want our elections to be fair, but we can’t have that when right-wing extremists are constantly stacking the deck in their favor. We need your voice to stop the storm that is building on the horizon. Pennsylvania is the birthplace of our democracy, and we should have Representatives fighting to protect that value. ---
Peter,

I submitted a letter to Speaker of the House Jason Wentworth's office DEMANDING that the Michigan legislature form a committee to investigate whether Gretchen Whitmer's reckless actions warrant articles of impeachment.
---
[ ](https://em.carraforcongress.com/e3t/Btc/W3+113/d2rBZm04/VXhqKv58M3-8W6R5dzQ4PNBbmW20x2Jc4DGz-kM7WCR53lLBmV1-WJV7CgZqLW5BnSDy5YfqhyW8ypDXB7NmWdFW9bp7vD4lyC-bW2YF8VZ4_p4KHW18xWm75lk3rYW2mQL4q3vn7RHV6Ph3696QpkHVGF4z6265RhRN8RmV8z92jyvW3zfn0W6YvxBfVhWmJ24SqtBHW6gPSWt2Cb4BfN4JRtDW-Bsr8W7nCCr330xxVvW6LQS9_5-cTZvW1sw56q6gmy59W4Wv18Y119YqdW4LYlwc30T6sXW4pVGxl4w549NW7hJyB18vgMyqW31frwS6tKcdLVphDkJ3sTfqM3f141)
---
Whitmer underrepresented at least 2,386 deaths of Michigan's most vulnerable population, according to a report submitted by the Auditor General's office regarding long-term care facility deaths. In March, 2020, Whitmer signed Executive Order 2020-50, requiring long-term care facilities in Michigan to admit COVID-19 positive patients... and endangering thousands of elderly and at-risk Michiganders. We must now use the powers granted to the legislature in the state's Constitution to form a committee and determine whether Whitmer's destructive actions warrant articles of impeachment... or if she should be put on trial and charged for the deaths of 8,061 grandmas and grandpas, mothers and fathers, and loved ones who were left to die sad and alone with COVID-19. [Do you agree that Governor Gretchen Whitmer should be held accountable for the deaths that resulting from her reckless Executive Order, Peter? Click here to make an URGENT donation to my campaign to support impeaching Whitmer today >>>](https://em.carraforcongress.com/e3t/Btc/W3+113/d2rBZm04/VXhqKv58M3-8W6R5dzQ4PNBbmW20x2Jc4DGz-kM7WCR53lLBmV1-WJV7CgNSjW19X4xT7tCMMLW1dLgZG6V-GhsW1HQNlt61xZ_KW5lT0ng4jntl7W5w77yC2f_44HW6T_MVy5-z70qVt-smJ1VJRh_VBlzbW6MtX6qW6qGkBL6LTzmSW8zcnJV97Vw2hW3tZxQp8WwGrkW1Pvlz432B2S8W8LW0_z2XydcQW416nfZ5kpv_VW2XMQSS80qtZlW3tTnhc7lK7xCN65f4sltxbScW3TH5wp3Fbv_lW3TLnsn6fPyt5W2PR4S_1FSg5RW5P7M8g6n3FxSW1Yd7GS8rPn9v3b3B1) Forming an investigative committee will give legislators the opportunity to question Whitmer on her administration's actions and present concerns voiced by constituents... The House must do what's right and what the Constitution demands.
---
[ ](https://em.carraforcongress.com/e3t/Btc/W3+113/d2rBZm04/VXhqKv58M3-8W6R5dzQ4PNBbmW20x2Jc4DGz-kM7WCR53lLBmV1-WJV7CgJ0cF696h3Y56wlW5kPkdm41wlD5W8lCvLh7HsK12W7glwF94Xmp30W63QS3163YT-fW8Gd1vB5QGH5SW7VTNmb6dkRfLN4HwzwVJF2_MW7tQZ8Y8lJcwYW99fH-b1jCgRnW6WPGkJ1FBQ_3W3ttrRb2_Mn8nVHxdmN2nMcWXW80k8nN8L1Zl3W3Ncljs6HK5w1W9jm2Hz5VPsCZVK4_Z_7W_h-vW5wKLR28SBTYWW3tsf1Q8YWw87W8Cv2Bd760QnmW6kvZ3S5T7wXSW18R8844kvtmT3gpL1)
---
Steve Carra
Michigan Candidate for Congress

subject: Fwd: Message from Ron DeSantis

body:

Not interested? [Unsubscribe Here](https://trk.cp20.com/form?3clxp--fgxr-4qqlpo9&sl=2d&t=5&ac=gh7s)

|

---
| | | Fellow Conservative,

Gov. DeSantis reached out to top state Patriots – you were of them.

Did you get his message?

\--------Forwarded Message---------
Subject: This isn’t a fair fight
From: Gov. Ron DeSantis
To: **[dpwillis67@gmail.com](https://trk.cp20.com/click/gh7s-3clxp-1uhwm-4qqlpo3/ "%%Email__c%%")**

---
I cannot stress this enough – electing strong GOP leaders is crucial to defending our states from the Left’s liberal takeover. Look at what’s happening in blue states – businesses are shuttering, rights are being revoked, and Americans are fleeing to states like freedom-loving Florida.

**[I’m asking every single supporter who wants to maintain their freedoms – in _ANY_ state – to chip in just $14 in the next 24 HOURS.](https://trk.cp20.com/click/gh7s-3clxp-1uhwn-4qqlpo4/ "I’m asking every single supporter who wants to maintain their freedoms – in ANY state – to chip in just $14 in the next 24 HOURS.")**
---
| | | [>> RESTORE GOP STATE MAJORITIES <<](https://trk.cp20.com/click/gh7s-3clxp-1uhwo-4qqlpo5/ "Restore State GOP Majorities")
---
I won’t lie to you, it’s not going to be easy.

We’re fighting against the entire liberal machine – the White House, the biased corporate media, and big tech tyrants are all coming after us, Fellow Conservative.

This isn’t a fair fight – they’ve got more power, more money, and a liberal army of activists ready to revoke our rights. State GOP are the last line of defense against the Left’s tyrannical agenda, and we’ve never waivered. **[Republican state leaders like me are leading the charge to defend our rights, but we can’t do it without your help. All I’m asking for is just $14 to restore GOP leadership in our great country.](https://trk.cp20.com/click/gh7s-3clxp-1uhwp-4qqlpo6/ "Republican state leaders like me are leading the charge to defend our rights, but we can’t do it without your help. All I’m asking for is just $14 to restore GOP leadership in our great country.")**

If you can, please chip in today to fuel our fight before the Left’s policies destroy any more states.
---
| | | [>> RUSH $14 NOW <<](https://trk.cp20.com/click/gh7s-3clxp-1uhwq-4qqlpo7/ "Restore State GOP Majorities")
---
Thank you for stepping up,

Ron DeSantis
---
| |
* * *
**We’re the largest caucus of Republican state leaders in the nation with one unified goal: winning. State Republicans currently hold:** **61 of 99 state legislative chambers** **25 of 45 lieutenant governor seats** **28 of 50 secretary of state offices** **11 of 12 independently-elected agriculture officials** **Thanks in large part to the support from patriots like you.**

The stakes couldn’t be higher: Senate control will be decided in Iowa, so we MUST help Mike Franken win. Mike’s up against Grassley’s $3.7 million campaign war chest, but he’s not taking a dime from corporate PACs, so if he’s going to protect our Democratic Senate majority, we need grassroots donors like you to give right now. Our most important deadline yet is at midnight tonight, and we cannot fall short of our goal: = If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | = | = | | = | = | | = | = Paid for by Michael Franken for Iowa, Inc Michael Franken for Iowa, Inc PO Box 13401 Des Moines, IA 50310 United States

Friend, I’ve been saying it for months: Fauci is a complete fraud.

He lied about masks. He lied about the origins of COVID-19. He lied about whether or not he funded gain of function research that led to the COVID-19 – which, he did.

In fact, Fauci’s cover-up of the Wuhan Lab origin will turn out to be the most extensive cover-up in the history of science.

But here’s the thing: Fauci knows that I won’t stop until he faces the consequences for his recklessness that has cost America so much.__ He knows I’m running for re-election now. And he’s hoping I don’t make it back to Washington to hold him accountable.

_That’s why I need you to chip in now to support my campaign for re-election._
__
[**STAND WITH RAND: $100**](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zr6to4th40lc1qmlhupdi6v7h1sakotivr6h7jqo_rp22sh2s8i66ob2cjhm2ob4cjh2bs)

Friend, the truth is Fauci has been lying straight to our faces.

And though I’ve given him MANY chances, he has flat-out refused to retract his lies.

And we know why: Dr. Fauci believes he's invisible. He believes our strong bureaucracy and his corrupt allies in Congress will defend him till the end. He thinks he can avoid accountability completely.

_I'm doing everything to prove him wrong. But I need your support._

* **If you help me win,** I promise to subpoena every last document of Dr. Fauci’s unprecedented cover-up.
* **If you help me win,** I will invite non-partisan scientists to inform America of the risks of creating viruses that don’t exist in nature.
* **If you help me win,** I will make sure we FIRE FAUCI so he can never do this to America again.

**Will you join my fight by chipping in now?:[https://secure.winred.com/randpaul/action-3549380/](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zkvl7imles99eoafq6mkdsn0ld5q59a07fo7bhtg_rp22sh2s8i66ob2cjhm2ob4cjh2bs)**

We just can’t let this fraud get away with this.

In Liberty,
Rand Paul

name: Lombardo for Governor
subject: We can’t become California…
body:
All we have to do is look to our neighbors to the west - and see California’s lawless crime spikes - to know why it’s important our state doesn’t go down this route...
---

body:
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40981164/326812146/1254848285?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODk0MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3ZDk2OWNiYy04MTdjLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=wgXsRES0f8zen1z5SunjhqJ4e_KhtRG-WounPC9hZ6Y=&emci=1943702e-197b-ec11-94f6-c896650d4442&emdi=7d969cbc-817c-ec11-94f6-c896650d4442&ceid=23594672) | |
---
Peter, as a mother, Holly is focused on creating accessible and affordable childcare. GA-14 is already considered a childcare desert, but new reports have come out suggesting that it’s going to get a lot worse across the country.

Average annual public spending on early childhood care across established countries is $14,436 per child. In America, **it’s currently $500 per child**. Childcare is becoming scarce, expensive, and providers are earning on average only $25,000 per year. This is completely unacceptable. As a mom, Holly knows that our children, and the hard-working folks who take care of them, deserve much more.

Childcare workers have stated that January has been the hardest month of the pandemic so far. 1 in 6 parents told pollsters that they experienced a school or daycare shutdown in just the last month. The childcare industry has lost 3,700 workers in December alone. **We need to address this now.**

This is exactly why Holly’s running for Congress and why we created our Rural Revival Plan. It’s time for our elected officials to stop prioritizing national policies when our children are being left behind. **And where is Marjorie Taylor Greene when this news is coming out? **

Well, she’s probably at her new country club. Marge doesn’t care about our children, because she can’t imagine not affording childcare. Marge doesn’t care about our workers because they’re too low on the totem pole for her. We need representatives who care. Representatives who understand. **[Donate $14 today, if you want to see real change for our children.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40981165/326812147/-804235033?refcode=em0123&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODk0MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3ZDk2OWNiYy04MTdjLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=wgXsRES0f8zen1z5SunjhqJ4e_KhtRG-WounPC9hZ6Y=)**

Thanks for your time,
Team Holly.
|

name: Charles Booker
subject: Mitch McConnell saying the quiet part out loud
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Booker for Kentucky
body:
[1]Charles Booker

Peter, please
understand one thing:

Being Black doesn’t make you less of an American, no matter what this
craven man thinks.

[ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cb-em-20220123?refcode=em20220123-1481&t=1001&refcode2=1481_346206_eUjChM&akid=1481%2E346206%2EeUjChM ]Mitch McConnell says Black people vote just as much as 'Americans'

Mitch really said: “If you look at the statistics, African-American voters
are voting in just as high a percentage as Americans.”

To which I say, Mitch: Black Americans are American. And I am no less
American than you.

And though Mitch McConnell may be stuck thinking I'm three-fifths of a
person — he's gonna have to acknowledge me as a whole Senator when we beat
Rand Paul this year.

[ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cb-em-20220123?refcode=em20220123-1481&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1021&refcode2=1481_346206_eUjChM&akid=1481%2E346206%2EeUjChM ]Peter, we
deserve so much better than Mitch McConnell and Rand Paul representing us
in Washington. I’m ready to step up and serve the people of Kentucky in
the U.S. Senate, but I can’t do it without your help. Can you chip in
$5 to send me to the Senate? »

[ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cb-em-20220123?refcode=em20220123-1481&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1022&refcode2=1481_346206_eUjChM&akid=1481%2E346206%2EeUjChM ]Contribute $5

This foul comment came out of Mitch McConnell’s mouth not even a day after
all 50 Senate Republicans voted to protect the Jim Crow filibuster,
effectively blocking the voting rights legislation that’s been sitting in
the Senate for months.

Mitch never cared about the filibuster when he packed the Supreme Court.
His doom and gloom talk about protecting the filibuster at the expense of
our voting rights — more specifically, at the expense of the voting rights
of Black and brown Americans — is a shameful lie.

Mitch has never cared about us. And today, he just happened to speak his
mind, and said the quiet part out loud. All the while, Rand Paul continues
to idly stand by and join him in obstructing our democracy.

[ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cb-em-20220123?refcode=em20220123-1481&t=1023&refcode2=1481_346206_eUjChM&akid=1481%2E346206%2EeUjChM ]Enough. Kentucky deserves better than this — and I’m proud to be
running to represent you and every American in the Senate. Please, chip in
$5 to spread our message and fuel our grassroots movement
to end this chapter of failed leadership in Kentucky.

Together,

Charles Booker

Contribute to Charles Booker: https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cb-email-donate?refcode=em20220123-1481-footer&t=1024&refcode2=1481_346206_eUjChM&akid=1481%2E346206%2EeUjChM

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to get involved. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe:

You can unsubscribe from this mailing list at any time:
http://act.charlesbooker.org/cms/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?akid=1481%2E346206%2EeUjChM

Contributions to Booker for Kentucky are not deductible for federal income tax purposes.

name: Adam Schiff
subject: The filibuster is not in the Constitution
disclaimer_text: Paid for and authorized by Schiff for Congress
body:
|
#
Derek, For more than a decade, Mitch McConnell and the Republican Party have weaponized and abused the filibuster to rule from the minority and block virtually every major piece of legislation introduced by Democrats. With Republican state lawmakers passing discriminatory voter suppression laws across the country, it’s time for Democrats to take action and change the filibuster’s rules. We can’t let the filibuster stand in the way of passing the _Freedom to Vote Act_ , the _John R. Lewis Voting Rights Advancement Act_ , and protecting voting rights for all Americans. It’s too important. The right to vote is crucial — the right upon which all others in our democracy rest. As Republicans continue to strip away voting rights, we are already beginning to witness the pillars of our democracy crumbling. _We can’t let that happen._ **[Add your name to my petition if you agree we must abolish the filibuster to preserve our democracy. If everyone reading this added their name, it would make a strong statement against Senate obstruction, and that’s why I’m respectfully asking for yours, Derek.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40981130/326812027/414366897?contactdata=b394cg3DGtXKTg3h%2FQoIJmZioOcjF8itWl36XVQQKpms3tFyosINtvC%2FLOlaD8SEkCANFFsgEqIsNAVpeLvzwr9lxSUPF97iFnCaxoPc%2BrOIWHfg2MWpPuPAg7dRy4hIsXsZsFCgdABjx%2BCP7carLNRywwgTmXIIBRkCp0zUen0%3D&refcode=AU_ABS_EG_GEN_PET_AC_20220123_PM1_V1_S3&ms=AU_ABS_EG_GEN_PET_AC_20220123_PM1_V1_S3&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83ODYxNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5ZjQ2ZDBkNC03ZjdjLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=1YGfsayai3sgvSiZsbUF0g-FCaMYaZh8vXxnTjeHSVg=&emci=9e46d0d4-7f7c-ec11-94f6-c896650d4442&emdi=9f46d0d4-7f7c-ec11-94f6-c896650d4442&ceid=33917617)** | | [ADD YOUR NAME](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40981132/326812029/414366897?contactdata=b394cg3DGtXKTg3h%2FQoIJmZioOcjF8itWl36XVQQKpms3tFyosINtvC%2FLOlaD8SEkCANFFsgEqIsNAVpeLvzwr9lxSUPF97iFnCaxoPc%2BrOIWHfg2MWpPuPAg7dRy4hIsXsZsFCgdABjx%2BCP7carLNRywwgTmXIIBRkCp0zUen0%3D&refcode=AU_ABS_EG_GEN_PET_AC_20220123_PM1_V1_S3&ms=AU_ABS_EG_GEN_PET_AC_20220123_PM1_V1_S3&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83ODYxNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5ZjQ2ZDBkNC03ZjdjLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=1YGfsayai3sgvSiZsbUF0g-FCaMYaZh8vXxnTjeHSVg=&emci=9e46d0d4-7f7c-ec11-94f6-c896650d4442&emdi=9f46d0d4-7f7c-ec11-94f6-c896650d4442&ceid=33917617)
---
McConnell has weaponized the filibuster to block House legislation on climate change, gun safety, health care, voting rights, and more. Enough is enough. We must change the filibuster’s rules and pass comprehensive voting protections.
The GOP’s new strategy of voter suppression tactics is to keep voters out of the polls and increase their chances of winning in the midterm elections. They know they can’t win straight up so they’re targeting young people and people of color and other marginalized communities, making it harder for all of us to vote.
It’s despicable. It’s a threat to our democracy. And we can’t let it stand. The House has passed countless bills that have been blocked by McConnell’s filibuster. It’s making Congress dysfunctional. And sadly, _some_ Senate Democrats still need convincing.
**[If you agree, add your name to my petition demanding the abolition of the Senate filibuster. Our democracy depends on it.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40981134/326812031/414366897?contactdata=b394cg3DGtXKTg3h%2FQoIJmZioOcjF8itWl36XVQQKpms3tFyosINtvC%2FLOlaD8SEkCANFFsgEqIsNAVpeLvzwr9lxSUPF97iFnCaxoPc%2BrOIWHfg2MWpPuPAg7dRy4hIsXsZsFCgdABjx%2BCP7carLNRywwgTmXIIBRkCp0zUen0%3D&refcode=AU_ABS_EG_GEN_PET_AC_20220123_PM1_V1_S3&ms=AU_ABS_EG_GEN_PET_AC_20220123_PM1_V1_S3&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83ODYxNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5ZjQ2ZDBkNC03ZjdjLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=1YGfsayai3sgvSiZsbUF0g-FCaMYaZh8vXxnTjeHSVg=&emci=9e46d0d4-7f7c-ec11-94f6-c896650d4442&emdi=9f46d0d4-7f7c-ec11-94f6-c896650d4442&ceid=33917617)**

name: Geoff Diehl
subject: Reminder: Geoff Diehl is the clear and easy choice for Massachusetts Governor
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Diehl for Massachusetts
body:
Here's what Geoff had to say about Maura Healey's announcement today and the contrast between the campaigns
| | | |
---
---
|
---

STATEMENT OF GEOFF DIEHL REGARDING MAURA HEALEY JOINING RACE FOR GOVERNOR

BOSTON - Geoff Diehl, Republican candidate for Governor, issued the following statement today regarding Attorney General Maura Healey's announcement that she is running for Governor:--

"Exactly a year to the day after Joe Biden took office, Maura Healey has announced her campaign for Governor.
"Over the past year, we have seen the sad results of failed Democratic leadership in Washington. Inflation is running rampant. Businesses are closing. Schools are under-serving students and parents are cut out of the process. Public safety is under assault. And most of all, our nation stands profoundly divided.
"Maura Healey's announcement signals the start of a race by Democrat candidates to double down on these failed policies right here in Massachusetts. Whomever emerges from the trio of radical progressives, the choice will be clear and easy for Massachusetts: live under government control of every aspect of your life, or live in a state where you're free to choose a school, a career and a life of self-direction and unlimited opportunity.
"I represent a positive alternative for Massachusetts. I got into this race because we need a Governor to protect taxpayers and stand up to big government. I will. I'll also support parents and small businesses, and I'll always have the back of law enforcement."
###

clean_body: Here's what Geoff had to say about Maura Healey's announcement today and the contrast between the campaigns | | | | | STATEMENT OF GEOFF DIEHL REGARDING MAURA HEALEY JOINING RACE FOR GOVERNOR BOSTON - Geoff Diehl, Republican candidate for Governor, issued the following statement today regarding Attorney General Maura Healey's announcement that she is running for Governor:-- "Exactly a year to the day after Joe Biden took office, Maura Healey has announced her campaign for Governor. "Over the past year, we have seen the sad results of failed Democratic leadership in Washington. Inflation is running rampant. Businesses are closing. Schools are under-serving students and parents are cut out of the process. Public safety is under assault. And most of all, our nation stands profoundly divided. "Maura Healey's announcement signals the start of a race by Democrat candidates to double down on these failed policies right here in Massachusetts. Whomever emerges from the trio of radical progressives, the choice will be clear and easy for Massachusetts: live under government control of every aspect of your life, or live in a state where you're free to choose a school, a career and a life of self-direction and unlimited opportunity. "I represent a positive alternative for Massachusetts. I got into this race because we need a Governor to protect taxpayers and stand up to big government. I will. I'll also support parents and small businesses, and I'll always have the back of law enforcement." | | | | == | | To Support the Geoff Diehl for Governor Campaign: Send a check made payable to "Diehl for Massachusetts," to 7 Cataumet Street, Worcester, MA 01606. Recent polls have us neck and neck, so I've got to ask:= If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | = | | = | | = | | = Your support humbles me, Val Demings | | = Val Demings here: I can’t thank you enough for fighting alongside me to flip Florida blue. Florida will determine whether Democrats keep our Senate majority – that’s why Republicans are pouring millions of dollars into this race to crush our movement and keep Florida red permanently_. Our grassroots campaign is off to a great start, but in a race as close as this one, I need your help to surge ahead and defend the Senate. I’m relying on grassroots supporters like you, donating to emails like this, to help me defeat Marco Rubio and stop Mitch McConnell from flipping the Senate. Will you donate today to help me flip Florida blue? = If you’d like to purchase merchandise to show your support for this campaign, Thank you for your continued support. Together we’re going to protect voting rights, expand access to affordable health care and fully recover from this pandemic. = By providing your mobile phone number you consent to receive recurring updates from Val Demings for U.S. Senate, including by automated text message. Txt HELP for help, STOP to end. Msg & Data rates may apply. &

Peter,
We continue to see that Big Tech is stacked against President Trump and Republicans -- and enough is enough!
* They banned the President of the United States
* Republican leaders and staff are routinely “blocked” or “banned” for no reason
* Pro-Democrat misinformation is regularly boosted or promoted as fact
* New “warning labels” are applied to any post that includes the word “Trump”

_At this point, we all know what’s going on. Liberal Big Tech has their thumb on the scales._

| Peter,
The Biden administration is once again baselessly attacking the Sunshine State. During a press conference, Biden's Press Secretary attacked Florida for "not doing enough" to reopen schools. Newsflash to the Biden-Harris-Fauci administration: Florida schools have been open for in-person schooling since August of 2020 for every Florida student. Governor DeSantis is not going to allow Florida's children to fall behind or receive anything less than the education they deserve. Don't fall for these partisan lies from Washington, D.C. Florida's schools are open, and they will continue to be open despite the pressure from Dr. Fauci, the lockdown Democrats, and the hysterical corporate media. Next time Biden wants to attack Governor DeSantis for "not doing enough" to reopen schools, we hope he will look in the mirror. Team DeSantis

body:
I’ll be honest ...

|
---

| | Let me make something clear: My Republican opponent Don Bacon already has a warchest of $977,000 built up. Republican special interests think they can just buy this seat – but I’m making it my mission to prove him and his special interest friends wrong. That’s why I need to raise another $973 before my crucial End of Week Deadline in the next 9 hours. [**_I need to prove to Don Bacon that he can’t buy his seat any longer – he’s going to have to work for it. I know asking for money right now is tough, but a small contribution from you will make all the difference. Can I count on your $10? >>_**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40981384/326815332/1129282168?refcode=20220123_em_fr_b1_tony_30_v1&amount=10&amounts=15,50,100,250&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDE0NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhNGE1ZWUwYS04NzdjLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=mtARXpT55mhIXSMEAyjRn5zJXDNNl9nMHB2c_xWWvdw=) I’ll be honest with you. I don’t come from money, so this campaign will be powered by donations from supporters like you. And truthfully, I need to hit every single fundraising goal if I’m going to be able to run a competitive race and beat Don Bacon. [**_This is going to be one of the most competitive Congressional elections in the country – which is why I need all the help I can get. My End of the Week Deadline ends in just 9 hours, but I still need $973 more to reach my goal. So can you chip in $10 right now? >>_**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40981385/326815333/1129282168?refcode=20220123_em_fr_b1_tony_30_v1&amount=10&amounts=15,50,100,250&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDE0NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhNGE1ZWUwYS04NzdjLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=mtARXpT55mhIXSMEAyjRn5zJXDNNl9nMHB2c_xWWvdw=) I need grassroots supporters like you to band together. If we hit my $973 goal before my End of the Week Deadline, we’ll prove to Don Bacon – and everyone watching this race – that our campaign has what it takes to win. [**_Is there any chance you could make your first $10 donation to our campaign before the End of Week Deadline in 9 hours? Tony Vargas is a State Senator, public school teacher, and Dad running to represent Nebraska’s Second Congressional District and unseat Republican Don Bacon.

This fight is personal. The American Dream made Tony’s story possible. He refuses to sit on the sidelines while others struggle to achieve the same dream.

This fight is also high stakes. Joe Biden won the presidency because of Nebraska. Now, Tony’s fighting to finish what he started and flip this district blue.

Tony is proud to be endorsed by 314 Action Fund, BOLD Democrats, and Latino Victory Fund.

Email is the best way for Tony to keep his supporters up-to-date with happenings from the campaign trail. We know we send a lot of fundraising emails -- but that’s because his campaign is fueled by grassroots donations from folks like you. I don’t come from money, so this campaign will be powered by donations from supporters like you. And truthfully, I need to hit every single fundraising goal if I’m going to be able to run a competitive race and beat Don Bacon. = I need grassroots supporters like you to band together. If we hit my $973 goal before my End of the Week Deadline, we’ll prove to Don Bacon – and everyone watching this race – that our campaign has what it takes to win. = | | = | = | = | = | = | = Thank you! Tony | Tony Vargas is a State Senator, public school teacher, and Dad running to represent Nebraska’s Second Congressional District and unseat Republican Don Bacon. This fight is personal. ---

People have been asking me recently what my plans are for the upcoming election. As one of our top America First supporters, I wanted you to be one of the first to know that I've made a decision:

**I’m 100% committed to helping Republicans win office all across the country in 2022, and I'm focusing all efforts on just that. **

That’s why I formed CAVPAC - my political organization committed to electing principled conservative leaders who won't be silenced and who refuse to give an inch to the radical Left. I’m traveling all over the country to push our candidates to victory and to fire up Republicans to turn out and vote.

**Momentum is on our side, and we must seize the moment and double down on championing American values.**

While some people are just sitting silently on the sidelines, I’m staying in the fight to save America and to champion the core values that make America great.

Do you support this mission? If so, **[please rush an emergency donation of $100, $50 or $20 to help us keep up the momentum.](https://trk.cp20.com/click/gh7s-3cmal-1ui3q-4qqlpo4/ "please rush an emergency donation of $100, $50 or $20 to help us keep up the momentum.")**

---
| [](https://trk.cp20.com/click/gh7s-3cmal-1ui3r-4qqlpo5/)
---

My time working as President Trump’s Secretary of State and CIA Director has put a target on my back. While a lot of people talk about what they WOULD do, I’ve actually gotten the job done and delivered BIG WINS for the American First agenda - from freeing three captives in North Korea to ensuring Iranian terrorists like Qasem Soleimani never threaten our freedom again. That’s made me some enemies, and they are hoping we fail.

**There is nothing the radical Left and their friends in the Fake News media love more than to mock and attack those of us close to President Trump. **

That’s why I am hoping you will **[rush a quick contribution to help me champion America values and elect more America First conservatives.](https://trk.cp20.com/click/gh7s-3cmal-1ui3s-4qqlpo6/ "rush a quick contribution to help me champion America values and elect more America First conservatives.")** The mainstream media and their Democrat friends want to say that our movement is dead, but we cannot let that happen!

---
| | [DONATE NOW](https://trk.cp20.com/click/gh7s-3cmal-1ui3t-4qqlpo7/)
---

You know me, you know my record and you know that I will never stop fighting for America. With you on our team, I know we can defeat the Democrats and get back to delivering real results for the American people.

Unapologetically American,
---
| [](https://trk.cp20.com/click/gh7s-3cmal-1ui3u-4qqlpo8/)
---

Mike Pompeo
70th Secretary of State

name: Kevin Roberts, Ph.D.
subject: Sign the pledge to stop the unlawful COVID-19 vaccine mandate
body:
I’m writing to you today with an urgent need. With the threat of the Biden administration’s reckless and unlawful Covid-19 v
| _Sponsored message_ |
---|---|---
| | | [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z7hurtth90p9c50bj9l0nv2q17us60qq3ms3nil0_rp22sh2s8i66ob2cjhm1o31chh2bs)
---
| | Dear Fellow Patriot, Please allow me to introduce myself as the new President of The Heritage Foundation. I’m writing to you today with an urgent need. With the threat of the Biden administration’s reckless and unlawful Covid-19 vaccine mandate, my work to defend your conservative values has been cut out for me from the very moment I arrived at Heritage. **But the good news is, I’m leading a team that fights back whenever your freedom is threatened.** I’m extremely proud to share with you that Heritage has filed a federal lawsuit challenging the Biden administration’s unlawful mandate. Because we recognize this vaccine mandate as exactly what it is: a dangerous level of government overreach attempting to strip your foundational liberty to make your own personal medical decisions.

At Heritage, we are focused on returning power to the people. We are working to preserve and defend your individual liberties guaranteed in U.S. Constitution. We are standing rock solid in defense of the very values that make America great. We are fighting this government power grab and protecting the rights and freedoms of all Americans. But we’re looking for the support of proud American citizens like you. And today, I need to know that you are standing beside us as we fight back. [**That’s why I’m asking you to sign our Pledge to Stop the Unlawful Vaccine Mandate.**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zeddg58ndkst65mueagr3glh2ntnupedrhn53aqo_rp22sh2s8i66ob2cjhm1o31chh2bs) It’s urgent that we know you are with us. I would be honored to see your name added to the pledge.
**You can sign the pledge right now using this link:**[**https://secured.heritage.org/vaccine-mandate-pledge/**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2ze9jsbenidqasvo0t06bfffup05asrmna7ofq6f8_rp22sh2s8i66ob2cjhm1o31chh2bs) And you are more than welcome to share it with everyone you know. If we want to stop this violation of your freedom and privacy, we need as many people as possible to stand up against a mandate the Department of Labor has no authority to impose. **Please don’t delay. Be sure to add your name to the pledge right now.** Sincerely yours, Kevin D. Roberts, Ph.D.
President, The Heritage Foundation

With the threat of the Biden administration’s reckless and unlawful Covid-19 v | Sponsored message | ---|---|--- | | | | | Dear Fellow Patriot, Please allow me to introduce myself as the new President of The Heritage Foundation. I’m writing to you today with an urgent need. With the threat of the Biden administration’s reckless and unlawful Covid-19 vaccine mandate, my work to defend your conservative values has been cut out for me from the very moment I arrived at Heritage. But the good news is, I’m leading a team that fights back whenever your freedom is threatened. I’m extremely proud to share with you that Heritage has filed a federal lawsuit challenging the Biden administration’s unlawful mandate. Because we recognize this vaccine mandate as exactly what it is: a dangerous level of government overreach attempting to strip your foundational liberty to make your own personal medical decisions. At Heritage, we are focused on returning power to the people. We are working to preserve and defend your individual liberties guaranteed in U.S. Constitution. We are standing rock solid in defense of the very values that make America great. We are fighting this government power grab and protecting the rights and freedoms of all Americans. But we’re looking for the support of proud American citizens like you. And today, I need to know that you are standing beside us as we fight back. It’s urgent that we know you are with us. I would be honored to see your name added to the pledge. You can sign the pledge right now using this link: And you are more than welcome to share it with everyone you know. But while the GOP caters to their wealthy donors, Senate Democrats are focused on middle-class families and small businesses. YOU are our priority -- and that's why it's vital to hear from you now.

name: Team JD
subject: AOC & Jessica Cisneros
body:
Congresswoman Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez endorsed fellow Justice Democrat Jessica Cisneros in her campaign to defeat Henry Cuellar.
#
**Breaking: AOC endorses Jessica Cisneros** With less than 40 days to go, we have the momentum needed to win this race. [**Will you split a contribution between Jessica’s campaign and Justice Democrats so we can power our organizing through election day?**](https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/90813?refcode=em20220123-21627&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=21627%2E1203867%2E3_nOXy)
---
Peter,
Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez endorsed Jessica Cisneros’ primary challenge against Henry Cuellar.
Jessica is running for Congress to join AOC in the fight for a Green New Deal, Medicare for All, and to defeat the last anti-abortion “Democrat” in Congress (Cuellar voted with Donald Trump 70% of the time).
In a minute, **[we’re going to ask if you’ll support this campaign through the primary.](https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/90813?refcode=em20220123-21627&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=2&akid=21627%2E1203867%2E3_nOXy)**_But first, let us tell you why we’re going to win if you chip in._
* The FBI recently raided Cuellar’s home as a part of an FBI investigation — that can’t be good for the corporate-backed politician.
* After the Cuellar news dropped, support for Jessica’s campaign surged, with contributions pouring in from grassroots supporters like yourself.
* And now, the nation’s most influential progressive, and fellow Justice Democrat, Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez, is endorsing Jessica Cisneros to continue the momentum, and power Jessica to victory.

We can win with all this momentum, but only if Jessica doesn’t get badly outspent again by Cuellar’s millions from corporate PACs. That’s why we need your help right now.
This is a big moment for Jessica’s campaign but in order for Jessica to win and join AOC in Congress, we need to raise as much money as possible between now and when in-person voting starts next month. [**Will you show your support and split a $3 contribution to Jessica’s campaign and Justice Democrats?**](https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/90813?refcode=em20220123-21627&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=21&akid=21627%2E1203867%2E3_nOXy)
**[Contribute $3](https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/90813?refcode=em20220123-21627&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=22&akid=21627%2E1203867%2E3_nOXy)**
Whether or not Jessica wins comes down to how we play these upcoming weeks, and how much money she has to spend reaching voters. Every dollar adds up, so please make your best contribution today.
In solidarity,
Justice Democrats

Do not worry if you cannot afford to make a contribution — we understand that this is a difficult time. If you’re struggling, you can find a food bank [here.](https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/28883?t=23&akid=21627%2E1203867%2E3_nOXy) We appreciate everything you do to keep our movement strong. Please stay informed and follow the most up-to-date recommendations from the [Centers for Disease Control](https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/24438?t=24&akid=21627%2E1203867%2E3_nOXy) and your state public health department.
---

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/justicedemocrats?refcode=em20220123-21627-footer&t=25&refcode2=21627_1203867_3_nOXy&akid=21627%2E1203867%2E3_nOXy)**
---
Not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee.
Federal candidates or officeholders mentioned above are not asking for more than $5,000 per calendar year from individuals or other federally permissible sources, nor are they asking for any funds from corporations, labor unions, or any other federally prohibited sources.
JusticeDemocrats.com
10629 Hardin Valley Rd, #226, Knoxville, TN 37932
Email us: [us@justicedemocrats.com](mailto:us@justicedemocrats.com)

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com.
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://go.justicedemocrats.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/)
* [Update My Personal Information](https://go.justicedemocrats.com/signup/did-your-information-change/?t=26&akid=21627%2E1203867%2E3_nOXy)
* [Unsubscribe](https://go.justicedemocrats.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=27&akid=21627%2E1203867%2E3_nOXy)

name: Team Kilmer
subject: Global gag rule anniversary
disclaimer_text: Paid for by People for Derek Kilmer
body:
Making sure you saw this message from Derek, Peter!

On the heels of the _Roe v. Wade_ anniversary, today marks five years since Donald Trump reinstated the global gag rule, severely restricting access to abortion around the world. Last year, we saw exactly how important elections are when President Biden repealed the global gag rule.

[**Elections matter, and reproductive rights are on the ballot in 2022. Add your name to recommit to the fight to ensure access to reproductive health care for all.**](https://act.myngp.com/el/BcBEFV3FTvWP5YDOQy5aoZvDaKRa3pBbFW4s6KjzaT0=/Oc3qsxo9elv0B-SFju9RcIpGeZJKKt9OQue2RFXVnyA=?ms=em22_220123_repro2_adv_gq_act___TK_ettx&refcode=em22_220123_repro2_adv_gq_act___TK_ettx&source=em22_220123_repro2_adv_gq_act___TK_ettx&utm_campaign=em22_220123_repro2_adv_gq_act___TK_ettx&utm_medium=email&contactdata={{ContactData}})

\---------- Forwarded message ---------
From: Derek Kilmer
Date: Saturday, Jan 22, 2022
Subject: Recommitting to the fight to defend reproductive rights
Team,

Today is the 49th anniversary of the landmark Supreme Court _Roe v. Wade_ decision that made abortion legal in the United States. As we wait for the Supreme Court to decide on the case that could determine the future of _Roe v. Wade_ , we must reaffirm our commitment to defending reproductive freedom.

Last year, we saw an unprecedented number of abortion restrictions and bans passed by state legislatures. Texas was one of those states, with S.B.8. becoming the most extreme abortion ban in the country. Since then, reproductive rights activists have been fighting to appeal the dangerous law that's left millions of Texans without access to reproductive health care.

People are left with no choice but to travel hundreds of miles to the nearest clinic, struggle with lengthy wait times, and deal with financial barriers. This is the reality of a future without _Roe v. Wade_ , and we can't let that happen.

[**On today 's anniversary, will you join me in the fight to defend reproductive freedom? Add your name to recommit to protecting reproductive rights in 2022.**](https://act.myngp.com/el/BcBEFV3FTvWP5YDOQy5aoZvDaKRa3pBbFW4s6KjzaT0=/Oc3qsxo9elv0B-SFju9RcIpGeZJKKt9OQue2RFXVnyA=?ms=em22_220123_repro2_adv_gq_act___TK_ettx&refcode=em22_220123_repro2_adv_gq_act___TK_ettx&source=em22_220123_repro2_adv_gq_act___TK_ettx&utm_campaign=em22_220123_repro2_adv_gq_act___TK_ettx&utm_medium=email&contactdata={{ContactData}})

I've always been guided by the principle that health care decisions should remain between people and their doctors. Last year, I voted to pass the Women's Health Protection Act to enshrine the right to choose under the law. It will prohibit bans, mandatory waiting periods, and other restrictions on a person's reproductive rights.

The anniversary of _Roe v. Wade_ is a stark reminder of how far we've come, and how little it takes to lose decades of progress. We have to stay vigilant in the fight for reproductive rights. Our civil rights are on the ballot in 2022 as we work to defend pro-choice leaders in the House.

[**Today, please add your name to recommit to the work of defending access to reproductive health care >>**](https://act.myngp.com/el/BcBEFV3FTvWP5YDOQy5aoZvDaKRa3pBbFW4s6KjzaT0=/Oc3qsxo9elv0B-SFju9RcIpGeZJKKt9OQue2RFXVnyA=?ms=em22_220123_repro2_adv_gq_act___TK_ettx&refcode=em22_220123_repro2_adv_gq_act___TK_ettx&source=em22_220123_repro2_adv_gq_act___TK_ettx&utm_campaign=em22_220123_repro2_adv_gq_act___TK_ettx&utm_medium=email&contactdata={{ContactData}})

It's an honor to serve you.

Derek Kilmer

**Derek Kilmer is leading the efforts to reform our democracy and break through the partisan gridlock so that Congress works for the people. Chip in today to support his grassroots campaign.**

[DONATE](https://act.myngp.com/el/BcBEFV3FTvWP5YDOQy5aoZvDaKRa3pBbFW4s6KjzaT0=/zDAalT2v_jvIX1mLRNXdiKY7bTnyUh03T-wfzMG5Yss=?refcode=em22_220123_repro2_adv_gq_act___TK_ettx&utm_campaign=em22_220123_repro2_adv_gq_act___TK_ettx&utm_medium=email)

**With our Senate control razor-thin, every single seat matters immensely – and right now, Sen. Grassley (R-IA) is more vulnerable than ever.** He's facing his LOWEST job approval ratings in nearly four decades, and recent data shows that 64% of likely Iowa voters do NOT want to reelect him!
Democrat Abby Finkenauer – the youngest woman to flip a House seat from red to blue – is running to take advantage of this unprecedented momentum among Democrats in Iowa to defeat Sen. Grassley. **If Abby wins, we'll be all but GUARANTEED to maintain Senate control!**

name: Senator Tim Scott
subject: One year of crisis and failure.
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TIM SCOTT FOR SENATE
body:
We’re one year into the Biden administration. It’s been rough.
& nbsp; &nb; sp;
Not interested? [Unsubscribe Here](https://trk.cp20.com/form?3cmoo--fgxr-4qqlpo0&sl=2d&t=5&ac=gh7s)
|

---
| | |
Friend, one year ago, Joe Biden took the oath of office and gave a speech full of promises.

Biden promised to keep our economy moving. Fast forward one year, and Americans are facing higher prices for everyday essentials, empty shelves at the store, and weak jobs growth. Biden broke that promise.

He promised to shut down COVID, not our economy. A year later, we’re facing testing shortages, misguided mandates, and a return to remote learning for our students. Biden broke that promise, too.

Biden promised to be our commander-in-chief, to stand up to our enemies and stand with our allies. Over the last year, Biden led a disastrous withdrawal from Afghanistan and emboldened China, Russia, and Iran. Biden broke that promise to America and our closest allies.

Biden promised he would be the president for all Americans. Now, he’s using lies about “voter suppression” and “Jim Crow 2.0” to attack Americans who disagree with his assault on our election integrity. Biden absolutely broke that promise.

I could go on, Friend, but one thing is clear: **Joe Biden is a failed president. His administration has created crisis after crisis in our country.**

Joe Biden won’t listen to the American people as they stand up to the disaster this administration is causing. That’s why I’m reaching out to you today.

**[I want to hear your thoughts as we look back on Biden’s first year in office. Will you take a few minutes to let me know what you think Biden’s biggest failure has been as president?](https://trk.cp20.com/click/gh7s-3cmoo-1uif5-4qqlpo2/ "I want to hear your thoughts as we look back on Biden’s first year in office. Will you take a few minutes to let me know what you think Biden’s biggest failure has been as president?")**

---
| | | [SHARE YOUR ANSWER HERE](https://trk.cp20.com/click/gh7s-3cmoo-1uif6-4qqlpo3/ "SHARE YOUR ANSWER HERE")
---

Thanks for weighing in, Friend. Together, we can hold Joe Biden accountable.

-Senator Tim Scott

---
| |

* * *

---
| [](https://trk.cp20.com/click/gh7s-3cmoo-1uif7-4qqlpo4/ "YOU ARE THE FINAL DONOR I NEED. CAN I COUNT ON YOUR HELP?")
---

Hi Friend, it’s Tim Scott.

I need just ONE MORE donor to reach my next goal. **[Will you be that donor?](https://trk.cp20.com/click/gh7s-3cmoo-1uif8-4qqlpo5/ "Will you be that donor?")**

I hate to ask, but I’m out of time and options. I cannot do this without you.

**[Please chip in any amount so we can reach our goal and beat the Democrats.](https://trk.cp20.com/click/gh7s-3cmoo-1uif9-4qqlpo6/ "Please chip in any amount so we can reach our goal and beat the Democrats.")**

body:
need your response
[ ](http://salsa4.salsalabs.com/dia/track.jsp?v=2&c=VUVw6ifHOOiBbem0iX0jJDBtbFAQhdCL&url=http%3A%2F%2Frichardblumenthal.com%2F)
Friend, I'd like you to read the following quote from a member of Congress: Donald Trump "bears responsibility" for the Jan. 6 insurrection and "should have immediately denounced the mob when he saw what was unfolding."
Would it surprise you to learn that quote is from Republican and House Minority Leader Kevin McCarthy?
It's in stark contrast to McCarthy's current actions and statements: In fact, he has refused to cooperate with the House's bipartisan Jan. 6 committee, despite their request that McCarthy testify about his phone call with former President Donald Trump on the day of the insurrection.
Friend, it's beyond clear that some of Trump's staunchest allies - from Kevin McCarthy to former Chief of Staff Mark Meadows to Steve Bannon - have key information that would enable Congress to hold the former President accountable for the attacks on our Capitol. But instead of standing for truth and accountability, nearly the entire Republican Party is bowing down to Donald Trump, his lies, his conspiracies, and his violent rhetoric.
Enough. If Kevin McCarthy is going to turn his back on the truth and embrace hypocrisy, then the committee must use its subpoena powers to force him to testify. **Americans have put massive grassroots pressure on Republicans before, and it 's worked. The investigation is getting closer to the truth every day. But we must keep speaking out.**
[**So, in the wake of this latest news, I need you to make your voice heard. Click here if you agree that the House Jan. 6 committee should subpoena Kevin McCarthy.**](https://surveys.signforgood.com/blumenthal-trump-accountability?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&ask=5&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500&code=jtk1128-su-nd)
Thank you,
Dick

name: Jordan Rogers
subject: Why we’re building a Cannabis Coalition
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fetterman for PA
body:
Weed love it if you could support our Cannabis Coalition...
#
Hi Derek — if we haven’t met yet, I’m Jordan, and I’m John Fetterman’s Cannabis Coalition Director.
[](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/41473?refcode=em20220123-4286&t=1&akid=4286%2E434096%2ENjvsPA)
Here’s a quick recap of what that means: It’s my job is to organize cannabis communities across Pennsylvania that include a cross section of our residents — from farmers, to folks in our cities, to veterans and everyone in between.
Since I joined the team last spring, we’ve already built a strong and growing coalition of people who support weed justice across the Commonwealth. Which makes it even more shocking to me that most campaigns don’t hire Cannabis Coalition directors...because they don’t have Cannabis Coalitions...because they don’t even support legal weed.
Then there’s John.
[](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/41473?refcode=em20220123-4286&t=2&akid=4286%2E434096%2ENjvsPA)
**Seriously — John Fetterman has spent years working toward ending the racist War on Drugs, and his ongoing fight for marijuana justice + second chances. And that’s why I’m so proud to be on his team.**
[**_Will you join us and donate now to help us keep building our Cannabis Coalition to send John to the U.S. Senate? There, he’ll be one of the loudest voices for legalizing weed, expunging marijana records, and releasing folks incarcerated for marijuana charges._**](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/41473?refcode=em20220123-4286&t=3&akid=4286%2E434096%2ENjvsPA)
This isn’t an issue John has had to “evolve” on, Derek.
**First,** back in 2016 when other Democrats running for Senate in PA were afraid to go bold on the issue of legal weed, John was a lone voice for full legalization of marijuana, regardless of any political consequences.
**Then,** in 2018, John *again* chose to make legal weed a key campaign priority in his race for Lt. Governor — something that most other Democrats usually shy away from to this day. (BTW, he and Governor Wolf went on earn the highest number of votes ever won as a ticket in a Pennsylvania gubernatorial election.)
**Now,** his current role as Lt. Governor, John has helped establish an expedited review process for pardons for low-level cannabis charges. _These pardons have helped scores of deserving Pennsylvanians get their lives back after unjust, racist, and inhumane drug policies ripped them away._
Look, most Senate candidates don’t make legal weed a central part of their campaign platform, but John has. Because it’s not just about making weed safe and accessible for medicinal and recreational use. It’s about righting the racial injustice of Black Americans being nearly 4x more likely than white Americans to be arrested for marijuana.
[**_From Pennsylvania to the U.S. Senate, your donation powers our fight for legal weed and an end to the War on Drugs. So what do you say, Derek, will you chip in $4.20 — or any amount — to support John Fetterman’s Cannabis Coalition and our fight to send John to the U.S. Senate?_**](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/41473?refcode=em20220123-4286&t=4&akid=4286%2E434096%2ENjvsPA)
**[Donate $4.20](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/41473?refcode=em20220123-4286&t=9&akid=4286%2E434096%2ENjvsPA)**
Thank you so much for your support,
Jordan
Jordan Rogers
Cannabis Coalition Leader
John Fetterman for U.S. Senate

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-emails?refcode=em20220123-4286-footer&t=10&refcode2=4286_434096_NjvsPA&akid=4286%2E434096%2ENjvsPA)**
---
[](https://www.facebook.com/JohnFettermanPA/) | [](https://twitter.com/johnfetterman) | [](https://www.instagram.com/johnfetterman/)
Email us: info@johnfetterman.com
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, so thank you for reading to the end. Small donors like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Fetterman for PA, PO Box 6061, Pittsburgh PA 15211.
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.johnfetterman.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/)
* [Update My Personal Information](https://act.johnfetterman.com/sign/personal_info/?t=11&akid=4286%2E434096%2ENjvsPA)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.johnfetterman.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=12&akid=4286%2E434096%2ENjvsPA)

Paid for by Fetterman for PA.

| **Team, Liz Cheney just made our day:** [ ](https://act.protectvoting.org/survey/stand_LC_PET/?source=VPP_20220123_EMPET_E1_T0_NS_RS&t=6&akid=1158%2E878179%2EuxJawn) While we don’t always agree with Liz Cheney, **we LOVE that she isn’t afraid to hold Trump accountable for his role in the January 6th insurrection.**

_But GOP leadership is FURIOUS._ They’re ramping up their attacks on Cheney to FORCE her off the Jan. 6th Commission and to let Trump get off scot-free. name: BetoORourke.com
subject: Important update on your assignment in Anderson County
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Beto for Texas
body:
We came up with a plan to work together and make sure we fight back everywhere.
#
We just got some numbers back on Greg Abbott’s statewide TV ad blitz. He’s spending over $2.3 million in total on ads — and running ads in _every single_ Texas media market.
Together, these markets span every inch of Texas. So we came up with a plan to work together and make sure that we’re ready to fight back against Abbott’s spending _everywhere._
**We recently assigned you to sponsor Anderson County** , where more than 28,856 people are registered to vote, as part of our 254-County Mobilization Plan.
We now know that Greg Abbott has already spent $516,448 in the greater Dallas media market where Anderson County is located, so we’re setting a goal for you and your fellow sponsors to match his spending in your region. It’s an ambitious goal, but we can get it done together.
[Will you chip in any amount right now to help us reach Texans in Anderson County before Greg Abbott’s ads do?](https://act.betoorourke.com/go/51986?refcode=ema20220123-172674&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&County=Anderson&Voters=28%2C856&t=1&akid=172674%2E444211%2EJSQjOr) _Every 50 cents you give will allow us to reach at least one voter!_
[_⇢ Make a $25 donation to reach 50 voters in Anderson County._](https://act.betoorourke.com/go/51987?refcode=ema20220123-172674-el&County=Anderson&Voters=28%2C856&t=2&akid=172674%2E444211%2EJSQjOr)
[_⇢ Make a $50 donation to reach 100 voters in Anderson County._](https://act.betoorourke.com/go/51988?refcode=ema20220123-172674-el&County=Anderson&Voters=28%2C856&t=3&akid=172674%2E444211%2EJSQjOr)

clean_body: We came up with a plan to work together and make sure we fight back everywhere. We just got some numbers back on Greg Abbott’s statewide TV ad blitz. He’s spending over $2.3 million in total on ads — and running ads in every single Texas media market. Together, these markets span every inch of Texas. So we came up with a plan to work together and make sure that we’re ready to fight back against Abbott’s spending everywhere. We recently assigned you to sponsor Anderson County , where more than 28,856 people are registered to vote, as part of our 254-County Mobilization Plan. We now know that Greg Abbott has already spent $516,448 in the greater Dallas media market where Anderson County is located, so we’re setting a goal for you and your fellow sponsors to match his spending in your region. It’s an ambitious goal, but we can get it done together. Every 50 cents you give will allow us to reach at least one voter! The secret to winning in a state as big and diverse as Texas is to not write anyone off. No county is too small, too Republican, or too anything for us to compete for their votes. So while Abbott drops $2.3 million (and counting) on blasting ads across the state, we’re going to do something way better: raise $2.3 million together in grassroots contributions to staff up and organize in all 254 counties. But to reach a goal this ambitious, we need every county’s grassroots team to participate. There are so many Texans out there who are looking for a reason to join our campaign. Thank you for considering a donation to reach the 28,856 registered voters of Anderson County. Let’s do this, Beto for Texas Email us: info@betofortexas.com

body:
| | | | [](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001xysLCBR4N4Ifr1jAcBha1aVtGpSpDwhP-ocekL8eR_MNdt36xvnK71hzgsGdWK4WHDmehjsYOHkITK3QgwbByHmMRxTkCM_1M34FEvJ6xcI-zc22Zm-kjw-Lrw1bRpvHAXt9XLKaQBQNrgV15IAElphIsxfjpm1vXbru0DcEPhsws4yQc7QO9PWdhOXt3t503pqqU8NzYfwGqtTBNLY0I1vpW6WB09jTXJSjyzcoc50=&c=0lPGlfQNyymYQGqDR2UCPRZrTowHQC7YgyUXf1chobozrL6YKbuCww==&ch=ME_P-GUIQrXZgX9a38O-jOiULjmrhTpYGiq7UFITlPOoj4g2JRu_EQ==)
---
| Peter,
The Biden administration is once again baselessly attacking the Sunshine State. During a press conference, Biden's Press Secretary attacked Florida for "not doing enough" to reopen schools. Newsflash to the Biden-Harris-Fauci administration: Florida schools have been open for in-person schooling since August of 2020 for every Florida student. Governor DeSantis is not going to allow Florida's children to fall behind or receive anything less than the education they deserve. Don't fall for these partisan lies from Washington, D.C. Florida's schools are open, and they will continue to be open despite the pressure from Dr. Fauci, the lockdown Democrats, and the hysterical corporate media. Next time Biden wants to attack Governor DeSantis for "not doing enough" to reopen schools, we hope he will look in the mirror. Team DeSantis

Taking back the House and FIRING Nancy Pelosi is the first step. Will you help us do that, Friend?

[ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40983037/326825192/-1781085314?refcode=EM_FR_220123roekick_chc_lbrfde_actives_5_ng_na_logo&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85Mjg3NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4NzFlYmMzNC05OTdjLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=yCtgATOUy--xBuxSgm4uOwPVQc_WRlM6rgqNLxiWKYU=) [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40983038/326825193/-1781085314?refcode=EM_FR_220123roekick_chc_lbrfde_actives_5_ng_na_logo&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85Mjg3NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4NzFlYmMzNC05OTdjLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=yCtgATOUy--xBuxSgm4uOwPVQc_WRlM6rgqNLxiWKYU=) As of yesterday, _Roe v. Wade_ has been the law of the land for 49 years, and it has never been more in peril than it is right now.

**[LBR will never stop fighting to protect abortion access. Rush a $15 donation right now to keep a pro-choice leader in Congress!](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40983039/326825194/-1781085314?refcode=EM_FR_220123roekick_chc_lbrfde_actives_5_ng_na_l1&amount=15&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85Mjg3NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4NzFlYmMzNC05OTdjLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=yCtgATOUy--xBuxSgm4uOwPVQc_WRlM6rgqNLxiWKYU=)**

The conservative majority on the Supreme Court seems determined to reverse _Roe v. Wade_. This could happen as early as this year.

That means abortion would **_immediately_** become illegal in a dozen states, and women living there would be forced to travel hundreds of miles to receive the reproductive care they need.

**We can’t let this happen.**

**[Congresswoman Blunt Rochester has been a staunch supporter of women’s reproductive rights in Washington.
