name: Dory MacMillan, CheriBeasley.com
subject: Tillis and McConnell once again prove they’ll put political power above everything else.
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Cheri Beasley for North Carolina
body:
Mitch McConnell suggested that African Americans are not Americans...
#

Friends -
Republicans in Washington again showed that they’ll put political power above everything else.
After the Senate failed to protect our right to vote, Mitch McConnell suggested that African Americans are not Americans saying, **“African American voters are voting in just as high a percentage as Americans.”**
That is insulting and wrong – and frankly disqualifying. He has put our democracy at risk time and time again, and his latest comments are a reminder that he cannot be allowed to become majority leader again.
We need new leaders in Washington who stand for the people. That’s Cheri.
[**Can you make a donation of any amount today to help us flip North Carolina? Cheri isn’t afraid of Mitch McConnell. She’ll stand up to him and deliver meaningful change for our families, but she cannot take on the super PACs that want to defeat us alone.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cb-em-jan22?refcode=em220123-1-t1&refcode2=291.357359.BgeFXn&t=1&akid=291%2E357359%2EBgeFXn)

| **[Donate $50](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cb-em-jan22?express_lane=true&amount=50&refcode=em220123-1-t1&refcode2=291.357359.BgeFXn&t=23&akid=291%2E357359%2EBgeFXn)**

****
| | **[Donate $100](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cb-em-jan22?express_lane=true&amount=100&refcode=em220123-1-t1&refcode2=291.357359.BgeFXn&t=24&akid=291%2E357359%2EBgeFXn)**
---
****
| **[Other Amount](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cb-em-jan22?express_lane=true&refcode=em220123-1-t1&refcode2=291.357359.BgeFXn&t=25&akid=291%2E357359%2EBgeFXn)**
---
****
The truth is Washington Republicans are afraid of everyone having equal access to the ballot box because they know that when we vote, we win. They will say anything to justify their obstruction and maintain our country’s broken status quo.
Thom Tillis was proud to end the filibuster to ram through Trump’s Supreme Court nominees, but look at what he said this week, **“The day the Republicans change the filibuster is the day that I resign from the Senate.”**
Yeah, right. He has chosen to flip flop at even the slightest amount of pressure from Donald Trump or Mitch McConnell.
We cannot let Republicans take back the Senate, and NBC just reported that our race in North Carolina is among the “most likely to determine which party takes the Senate.”
[**Please donate whatever you can today to elect Cheri Beasley and hold our Senate majority. We need a leader who will fight for the people — not another coward like Thom Tillis who will do the bidding of Mitch McConnell and corporate interests.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cb-em-jan22?refcode=em220123-1-t1&refcode2=291.357359.BgeFXn&t=26&akid=291%2E357359%2EBgeFXn)

| | This weekend, we mark the 49th anniversary of _Roe v. Wade_. This decision unlocked two generations of progress for America – giving women the right and the ability to chart their own futures. And yet, as we celebrate this milestone, these rights have never been more under assault. In states like Texas and Mississippi, and many others, far-right politicians are doing all they can to roll back _Roe v. Wade_ and end safe, legal abortions. And the Supreme Court appears to be poised to overturn _Roe v. Wade._ But we are not powerless. House Democrats passed federal protections for a woman's right to choose and now we need the Senate to act. **[Add your name: tell the Senate to pass federal protections for abortions.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40983130/326825562/-153178093?contactdata=iNMoaabwZRjAHQvwBzUc7VemtGLaBegEEuytTLoJj7H7Y9u5UcwcvF7tjL9nsUfZYZMTe5rMgK2MYgPRdYlmxj%2F%2BbU0a9R%2F%2FhsOD1yep0i9XHonN4iu7wluTEAt6kRVEaJk5zGUK0J8EE8Y1FEaNUw%3D%3D&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS84NzY1OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4YTE3M2VhOS05YTdjLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=lArM1Mr7F6j20MkZjRPoo22pPyqI-mgHU0onAMvhe_g=&emci=b0dec8fe-877c-ec11-94f6-c896650d4442&emdi=8a173ea9-9a7c-ec11-94f6-c896650d4442&ceid=9494239)** I will always fight for reproductive rights for all. name: Mia McLeod
subject: 49 years after Roe v. Wade
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Mia for South Carolina
body:
Reproductive freedom has never been more vulnerable. | | | Friends, yesterday was the anniversary of _Roe v. Wade_ — a Supreme Court case that enshrined the constitutional right to an abortion and defended the right for women to make healthcare decisions about their own bodies. **Yet 49 years later, attacks on reproductive freedom have never been more threatening.** The Supreme Court is set to rule on a case that will determine the future of _Roe_ , and our governor, Henry McMaster, isn’t lifting a finger to defend reproductive rights. In fact, he’s committed to being a part of the problem — promising in his State of the State address this week to defend his administration’s attacks on reproductive freedom. If Henry got his way, the GOP’s Fetal Heartbeat Law would essentially ban abortion — before some women even know that they’re pregnant. **Gov. McMaster wants to take us back to the dark ages — but not me. I’ve been a fierce advocate in defense of a woman’s right to choose throughout my career, and you can bet I’ll continue to fight for reproductive freedom from the governor’s office.** **[South Carolinians deserve to make their own reproductive healthcare decisions without governmental interference. If you agree, please consider making a contribution to my campaign for governor so we can defend reproductive rights before it’s too late.](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953xOVKxhIUbYt3VKvuRN9Ed6LmDxcUTbAsMgtdikhdvrXnTY2MT7kny3_crXfF8_A34OvMXOVnBiR7_VC57w4n-PTsAJBIeubyXEq94_Cj1C159iMO5uSoDU1O1RGrKG7d23coLDWQdfes3-8jQVqVZMS3SxPJnWkKTDiqhAL9iS1eYQK3uUlXrt0pOX-qFY446fevVN00WxSoK2DmCfOVsqrZ6QactFJZ_ziQx6OEK5uim-LIQAJUYUj5xaT9pzeE3HHPnHkCoBYFqe4JhAS_nokuKObL7fZAVEW4ast7Os9CD5ogbVAPku98nN_wDy4mATM-tdAhuU9T1I0NBSgY3m6WGzPsUWMAAQRqzW6UZvJfjJ0tFDSSsCJyC608kr_X0/3iy/mlwXU4W6S-KP8luruxoz5A/h0/SmlPyRRBuX1B8iixs-zS7TxsgZ1FnpFSKxmXqNtmmd4)** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | | [donate: $10](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953xOVKxhIUbYt3VKvuRN9Ed6LmDxcUTbAsMgtdikhdvrXnTY2MT7kny3_crXfF8_A34OvMXOVnBiR7_VC57w4n-PTxPwbybSmC8aJHRc6Qn5m95WTJTplx5X1QlXF5wD0fexoXMde7aBIPDCKWbSkkeIP3B-tMLfjr7tw_r53bnyzqWrALO8SsajGeBmm-3mCiDO-qMnyV_P9BCuyThYE17Cz1cXAxKb0otKjDeEMp1WAKP-KNwmPpMwnHgslGetNVniGiHMQQVw1vsOa32W4izdE1EnIfxsZdE9cQ7cS83UiGyNB92X34Grjd1GioYZ_N4R2Id1QWALEt3JBYG3iHgeZHagmLIQZEj5xZM1fKavwo_t-lN2RiVUaaC4QwlE930UrEPfRoSNHquGeHZKFNND/3iy/mlwXU4W6S-KP8luruxoz5A/h1/V_WyMeGAuABxqfSVDgOCzYCehNbPb2nAqhkanVklQ-Y)

clean_body: Reproductive freedom has never been more vulnerable. | | | Friends, yesterday was the anniversary of Roe v. Wade — a Supreme Court case that enshrined the constitutional right to an abortion and defended the right for women to make healthcare decisions about their own bodies. Yet 49 years later, attacks on reproductive freedom have never been more threatening. The Supreme Court is set to rule on a case that will determine the future of Roe , and our governor, Henry McMaster, isn’t lifting a finger to defend reproductive rights. In fact, he’s committed to being a part of the problem — promising in his State of the State address this week to defend his administration’s attacks on reproductive freedom. If Henry got his way, the GOP’s Fetal Heartbeat Law would essentially ban abortion — before some women even know that they’re pregnant. Gov. McMaster wants to take us back to the dark ages — but not me. I’ve been a fierce advocate in defense of a woman’s right to choose throughout my career, and you can bet I’ll continue to fight for reproductive freedom from the governor’s office. If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | | | | | | | | Thank you, — Mia Please, disregard if you are a registered lobbyist. | | | Paid for by Mia for South Carolina | | Sent via . Hey Peter, I’m Tiernan, Val Arkoosh’s campaign manager — and I can’t tell you how much Val has appreciated hearing from folks just like you about what issues you hope she tackles as Pennsylvania’s next U.S. Senator. It’s deeply important to Val that this campaign is a table with a chair for everyone — so she asked me to reach out to you personally so you can share what issues matter to you the most. [**Will you fill out our Priorities Survey right now? Val doesn’t play that game. Her focus will always be on delivering lasting results for Pennsylvania and our country, which is why it would mean so much to her to hear from you today.

subject: Fwd: 🚨Attendance update - Next week is critical. 🚨 Can you spread the word from your area ?
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY THE FRIENDS OF DR
body:
Hi , do you think you can let people know about my dad's events from your area? I need to get the word out. **Attendance next week is critical. I need help spreading the word from your area about Dr. Bob's events.** _**The COVID-19 pandemic is making it very difficult to hold large in-person events, severely hindering my dad's campaign's ability to gather signatures for his nominating petition to get on the primary ballot.**_ _**I need your help. I've been asked to forward this to those who can attend or spread the word about my dad's next COVID-safe events. The team is hoping you're interested in leading the mobilization of petition signers.**_ [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40983395/326826605/-9601045?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85Mjc5MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjN2Q0NDUyZS05ZjdjLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=V8c0s6HXpbH9UoFay973lFjEeSo4OLXgTUtar_k9qsE=&emci=cbd9124c-967c-ec11-94f6-c896650d4442&emdi=c7d4452e-9f7c-ec11-94f6-c896650d4442&ceid=15167427) –This Sunday evening, I'm not asking for a contribution. Instead, I need us to mobilize for my father, Dr. Bob. We need your help spreading the word about his upcoming events so we can get petitions signed. At this critical juncture, petitions are the**most important** priority of the campaign. We cannot afford to fail in getting Dr. Bob on the ballot. It's the first step to unseating Jack Bergman. Outreach is going well. Fundraising is on pace and the campaign feels they are in a position to form a general-election campaign to defeat Dr. Bob's opponent, Jack Bergman. It's going to be an incredibly exciting election year. But, it will be all for nothing if my dad isn't on the primary ballot. Attendance at his nexts several events is critical. Even if folks will just be stopping by his town halls to quickly to sign the petition, **they need a lot more signatures.** The campaign is hosting over six town halls between Jan. 31 and Feb. 4. These in-person events will be as COVID-safe as possible and volunteers will be standing by outside for anyone wishing to drive by and sign the petition. Vaccines, boosters, social distancing, and N-95 masks are highly encouraged. We appreciate your help with this effort. **Please do what you can to let your friends know about these upcoming town halls. I would start by[ sharing my dad's posts](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40983396/326826606/989981403?u=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.facebook.com%2Fdrboblorinser%2Fposts%2F147336994329787&display=popup&ref=plugin&src=post&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85Mjc5MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjN2Q0NDUyZS05ZjdjLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=V8c0s6HXpbH9UoFay973lFjEeSo4OLXgTUtar_k9qsE=&emci=cbd9124c-967c-ec11-94f6-c896650d4442&emdi=c7d4452e-9f7c-ec11-94f6-c896650d4442&ceid=15167427) on social media to emphasize the importance of stopping by an event.** Thank you ! name: Bruno Amato
subject: The “why” and the “how”
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Bruno Amato for Congress
body:
| | | [](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953x-UnXZEV9rwWCU4oSd5EZQK5i5bJ0D_H_09LgcZp5uFE0uIjofAduQty9vNFY-fIJx01XUjbTm2D6OW3zxZqi8wMX-4s00wP75TvOj2Wd4ePScXEoRyyVzVHneFq5H5kTdRcuzkCtMJ37fcFudOWr5A1o4sdH0SPNFfZgE-qP5t62Llstt0JaZumUI8Nb-TJuyd4h6xulONxRWBiHAylZU22eGXOAWWrBMOGMgjK29jvXSdr1peFSqBKPjDJIiXhJlnpLQ8GxXW80-F4-Cp8ePab5EAXkPlsh0ToWZwp57BNarmGkwgH45ZIYzs8R5IbtgSt1Fh1ytVK9K9oYc1nxG/3iy/aKxr21YEQr-5KML2j4BZJw/h0/cXfaahQlETH7nYw2-OFQR8Hvrmz7zHAzQaAndZ88iLI)
---
I didn’t get into this race because I thought it would be easy. I knew it would be a tough fight. Going up against a guy like Kevin McCarthy is certainly no walk in the park. **[**I want to tell you a bit more about what got me here — because this isn't just about Kevin McCarthy. I hope you’ll read my whole message and then chip in a few bucks to help us keep up the fight to bring real leadership that fights for the working people of California’s 23rd District to Congress.**](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953ykbrIoKFUeKFEa1cUjjjq-5MbvSDaSunAhY8K_5K9dHYMCIpJpRsTSiEmx7fxRZYAu6kUC-zXTCGViJV7T9Foo8QiJbbq5MalxNZrr4XnHg1VjYYc9DUU41dcnLJIjhzfQ-AjxZ9t8M9k64piS7MihQkzDMDd1zVV_iXvgxRh4TD0-WoOBQFrvp9KqUZJaeFHJ4jSAupn38uc3pZkr9dmqcmofNfIwtdYGC9t_6k-eOLE6IuGlOM2wDzdEOEpLii3avihf6NfDgl-W0rzGr5c6ymVDH8AowTU19C5jt4lKL4gpiQ3Pz477XNftdZxcyAVrFieVjFYXoWU8nGR8Tj6uOPQFSd32Y5Yx9JYS5rjDcw/3iy/aKxr21YEQr-5KML2j4BZJw/h1/sX3aB4OK3Sz8ydlZ4DWfhngw150o0BM0eM4TLfXGQJ4)**
I grew up as the son of Italian immigrants in a working-class family. My parents worked difficult, low-wage jobs so they could eventually save up to buy a home and work their way into the middle class. When I was seventeen years old, my dad was diagnosed with cancer. I had just gotten my driver's license and with that license in hand. I drove my Dad back and forth to the VA hospital where he received his chemo treatments. Two weeks after I graduated from high school, he passed away. My Dad was drafted to the U.S. military right after immigrating to this country. I wanted to honor him — so that same year, I enlisted in the U.S. Navy. I worked aboard several Navy ships where I loaded and offloaded torpedoes from submarines and have always been proud to have served the country that gave my family so much.

After serving, I worked a variety of jobs that didn’t really pay well and offered me few, if any benefits — but this changed when I saw an ad in the newspaper for apprenticeship openings with the Ironworkers Union. I got one of those apprenticeships and after three years of hard work, I became a Journeyman Ironworker with good pay, solid benefits, and a community united in solidarity and purpose. Because I was a part of the Ironworkers Union, this helped me pursue other hobbies. I decided to start taking acting classes a few nights a week and soon fell in love with the craft, which motivated me to move to California and pursue it even further. I know this was only possible because of the support and stability I had from being a part of the Ironworkers Union. I eventually joined SAG/AFTRA of which I am still a proud member. Folks, to this day, it is one of the biggest honors of my life to have been a member of these two great unions. **As you can probably tell and as I've said before, it was never my plan to run for Congress.** But after seeing the immense strain, inequities, and dangers our communities faced the past few years, including a violent insurrection that nearly overthrew our government, it became clear to me that I could no longer stand on the sidelines. For the past several years, we’ve had a Representative who would rather do anything else but work for the great people of the Central Valley.**
**
**I’m ready to roll up my sleeves and work for you. There are so many people out there with stories like mine. We deserve someone who’s lived those experiences and fights for us.** I am fighting for true economic justice, Medicare For All, stronger unions, better support for our schools by fighting for universal pre-K, ending the racial disparities in education, better care for our veterans, true reproductive justice and so much more. [**I don’t have Kevin McCarthy’s millions that he has from rich donors and corporate backers. I have something better: folks like you. That is why I am asking if you can chip in a few bucks today to keep building this people-powered campaign. We can elect someone who will fight for every single person across California’s 23rd District — but that’s only possible with support from you.**](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953ykbrIoKFUeKFEa1cUjjjq-5MbvSDaSunAhY8K_5K9dHYMCIpJpRsTSiEmx7fxRZYB_DOdkZzCjYSl-YYcYNUgAA9g4-EBCTA_E8J96L8UuNFGTdu69ZInOD5yxMou-x6zT592P33VevVM16FPbYtf4qv3OE64KBA5g_mlf7atpvUY_eTMMNiiAQzRk1b8J86hoPq_Nf_c0PpUbtMzXqdgwyjtiLn4uWkzahMx5WH0s03utFvCZevxqYtkKeWUs-42bdLNftf09uSQk_GP6vLMS5fruwQHf1Gw4J3waZIAmkC58O_shk4tmTSzniP3gB28Gq19Xk04TK0KaRVPnLxJwIg5LBhGM2kZuhZFQwg9fOg/3iy/aKxr21YEQr-5KML2j4BZJw/h2/aXLBNX4GJ3D_6gWDZXnyE7mrejXlLb1XTib_-3h09uk) In solidarity, Bruno [Contribute »](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953ykbrIoKFUeKFEa1cUjjjq-5MbvSDaSunAhY8K_5K9dHfRV9NFPgebXDsNbsV5RIkLqwIZcxmCEGkPrOhgLKV8mUlRkb8_uS3vIFpTSGQsjGM1Y-J-gxiCTQX5KdinoWxuRq1KowLGnhZ-zB0TwLiVDETiiZdVJIshmxkVpmNLUfW0T5nPQVawCWQPdS1TcslQty6du3PR6lm8yQiQaFfVYT-jovxK7MSlxv_B0Ql56I1MaNMj1d1OmnkDdhgiRX-yX80hAAb_iQ_3nm5ncWqA0UOs5OjApvsLXcTvEhzsxcYHioqDsXPLd2S7MyBedRFa9DB1i6wUi8aIjLcdKsJ-xRhWZVrQpHXw-5m1fLVzU1A/3iy/aKxr21YEQr-5KML2j4BZJw/h3/bP7KcrgiAPc3Id4YFpyl5SIFPM1byizD3_dYSDEDacI)

---|---
**Bruno Amato is a proud veteran, working class guy, a Democrat, and is committed to serving his country once again by running for Congress in California’s 23rd District.** Unlike some lifelong politicians in Washington, Bruno is ready to roll up his sleeves and get to work for the great people of the Central Valley. Bruno has been backed by VoteVets, an organization committed to helping veterans run for office. He is running to fight for universal healthcare, economic justice, and real investments in education, and so much more. He's not taking a dime from corporations or corporate PACs — because he's running to work for the people. [**Make a contribution today of whatever you can afford and help elect Bruno to Congress.**](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953wdVjEO4QrP5WbNA1-PnVdBnvp_KLEZiSdZOzE0WIPVJYhJ1u3P3jsS9nfSK9wV8mzfl5uBh86ZCyADQZwwgB8BtCSe__A8Mwa1E1JnZ9uagomZJ9Esk6dQw6_wTbc_FqCYbIDZXlJ83YK5GwNS4lAwg0d0zL67IIjqFPdcsDW1xueDT6B_sfq2x9BsoOgWxLBwgYdCo1T_T8_5Y1rEUrAGeImpsdhfKov988jFqRfk4gf7oz6f60zwOB6FdhVnVC83nPY_cmqccZPFuTMpRVkKIL-0xJWyWB6O5xbk7lNVdJvg6ODL6EM8mDGD_cxtRKy518XFNO7GiHAbzJhOPc1TNaHLKOF8e2BemhjeL0ntsA/3iy/aKxr21YEQr-5KML2j4BZJw/h6/JptXSCiq4k2NsMV2CcasxhirQmujHPayFIt4CWcvbFI)

name: Kevin McCarthy
subject: My Commitment to America
disclaimer_text: Paid for by McCarthy for Congress
body:
& nbsp; &nb; sp;
Not interested? [Unsubscribe Here](https://trk.cp20.com/form?3cngd--fgxr-4qqlpo2&sl=2d&t=5&ac=gh7s)
|

---
| | | Fellow Conservative, I just previewed my new Commitment to America — the game plan and agenda upon which a Republican majority will act to put America First again.

You see, as leader of the Republican Conference, I know that majorities aren’t just given — they are earned. By showing patriots like you _how_ I plan to make America better, I’m hoping I can earn the support we need to do it.
**Here’s what we’re going to do:** ✅ Rein in the IRS
✅ Fund the police
✅ Secure the border
✅ Put American energy first
✅ Stop the runaway spending
✅ Pass a Parents Bill of Rights
✅ Hold China accountable for COVID-19
✅ Hold Biden accountable for his Afghanistan DISASTER

This is only the beginning, Fellow Conservative. These are only some of the Day 1 action items I will take to put YOU and put America First again. **[Are you in?](https://trk.cp20.com/click/gh7s-3cngd-1uinq-4qqlpo2/ "Are you in?")**

---
| | [YES, PUT AMERICA FIRST AGAIN](https://trk.cp20.com/click/gh7s-3cngd-1uinr-4qqlpo3/)
---

Do you want the party that has brought us inflation, open borders, unsafe communities, and a supply chain where products are scarce, or do you want something that’s going to make our economy stronger, our streets safer, our border secure, and the next century the American century?

---
| | [STAND WITH HOUSE REPUBLICANS](https://trk.cp20.com/click/gh7s-3cngd-1uins-4qqlpo4/)
---

I can’t do this without you, Fellow Conservative. Critical campaigns need YOUR support.
**CHIP IN NOW TO GET OUR COUNTRY BACK ON TRACK:**

---
| | [STAND WITH HOUSE REPUBLICANS](https://trk.cp20.com/click/gh7s-3cngd-1uint-4qqlpo5/)
---

Thank you,

Leader McCarthy

---
**A note from Kevin:**
---
| [](https://trk.cp20.com/click/gh7s-3cngd-1uinu-4qqlpo6/ "Kevin McCarthy urgently needs YOU to take action")
---

As Leader of the House Republicans, I’m committed to flipping the House of Representatives in 2022 to restore the Republican Majority and steer America back on the right track. I’m incredibly grateful for your support in this fight and want you to know that I’m doing everything in my power to secure victory for Republicans. Your sustained support fuels our grassroots movement and provides us with the resources necessary to combat the Left’s political games. If you’d like to make another contribution, I will fight tooth and nail to ensure every cent goes towards advancing the conservative agenda and winning back the House -- **[ EXPRESS DONATE HERE >>>](https://trk.cp20.com/click/gh7s-3cngd-1uinv-4qqlpo7/ "EXPRESS DONATE HERE >>>")**

The fight is far from over, and we’re only getting started.

Kevin McCarthy
Leader, House Republicans

name: James Carville
subject: From the White House to the campaign trail, I've seen it all
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Val Demings for U
body:
we need Val Demings
| | |
---
**Listen up, friend!**
Congresswoman Val Demings is down 2 points in her race to defeat Marco Rubio. It's one of the hottest Senate races in the country – and I have zero doubt in my mind that Val Demings can win this. But Val Demings can ONLY win if activists like YOU dig deep and support her every step of the way.
So here's what I'm dropping in to tell you: Flipping Florida blue can decide our Democratic Senate majority. And CNN is calling Florida's Senate seat one of the most likely to flip in November – but Florida's last Senate race was decided by just 0.12 percent (that's only 10,033 votes).
That's why moments like this can make or break a campaign. That's especially true when I'm up against a right-wing incumbent like Marco Rubio, who is already sitting on a multimillion-dollar war chest and has the full GOP establishment behind him. **So I committed to helping Val Demings raise $55,000 before her midnight deadline tonight, and I'm counting on your contribution to get us there, friend: **
**[Will you rush $5 or more now to help Val Demings defeat Marco Rubio, flip Florida blue and expand our Democratic Senate majority?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40983947/326828801/-892300846?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk2219-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84Mzc4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyZTY1N2RlMy1hMDdjLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=jwlZI4FUXeAyfG4ZiZQu78yrCmjfO4wIc7FjinFrIX4=)**
From the White House to the campaign trail, I've seen it all. More than most. I've seen what it takes to win, and I've seen what happens when campaigns fail to muster enough grassroots momentum. I'm told Val Demings has one of the strongest grassroots teams in Democratic politics – and trust me, I was relieved to hear it.
Because you know what we're up against, friend? Marco Rubio's campaign war chest. Mitch McConnell's super PAC that can spend near limitless sums of money. And you'd better believe Donald Trump – who has made Florida the de facto HQ for the GOP – will rally his base and spend millions to protect his crony, Rubio.
That's why we need Val Demings. She's gone toe-to-toe with some of the most extreme Republicans. She impeached Donald Trump and prosecuted him in the Senate. She's a fighter for Floridians, and she has everything it takes to win. Best of all, there's momentum behind her in this race. **But a fundraising shortfall will put her dangerously behind where she needs to be.**
**So if you truly want Val Demings in the Senate, if you truly want to flip Florida blue and oust Marco Rubio, then I need you to give, because she can't cede any ground:[Make a contribution of $5 or more now – every dollar you can spare before the midnight deadline – to elect Val Demings and expand Democrats' Senate Majority.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40983948/326828802/-892300846?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk2219-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84Mzc4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyZTY1N2RlMy1hMDdjLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=jwlZI4FUXeAyfG4ZiZQu78yrCmjfO4wIc7FjinFrIX4=)**

clean_body: we need Val Demings | | | Listen up, friend! Congresswoman Val Demings is down 2 points in her race to defeat Marco Rubio. It's one of the hottest Senate races in the country – and I have zero doubt in my mind that Val Demings can win this. But Val Demings can ONLY win if activists like YOU dig deep and support her every step of the way. So here's what I'm dropping in to tell you: Flipping Florida blue can decide our Democratic Senate majority. And CNN is calling Florida's Senate seat one of the most likely to flip in November – but Florida's last Senate race was decided by just 0.12 percent (that's only 10,033 votes). That's why moments like this can make or break a campaign. That's especially true when I'm up against a right-wing incumbent like Marco Rubio, who is already sitting on a multimillion-dollar war chest and has the full GOP establishment behind him. So I committed to helping Val Demings raise $55,000 before her midnight deadline tonight, and I'm counting on your contribution to get us there, friend: = From the White House to the campaign trail, I've seen it all. More than most. I've seen what it takes to win, and I've seen what happens when campaigns fail to muster enough grassroots momentum. I'm told Val Demings has one of the strongest grassroots teams in Democratic politics – and trust me, I was relieved to hear it. Because you know what we're up against, friend? Marco Rubio's campaign war chest. Mitch McConnell's super PAC that can spend near limitless sums of money. And you'd better believe Donald Trump – who has made Florida the de facto HQ for the GOP – will rally his base and spend millions to protect his crony, Rubio. That's why we need Val Demings. She's gone toe-to-toe with some of the most extreme Republicans. She impeached Donald Trump and prosecuted him in the Senate. She's a fighter for Floridians, and she has everything it takes to win. Best of all, there's momentum behind her in this race. But a fundraising shortfall will put her dangerously behind where she needs to be. So if you truly want Val Demings in the Senate, if you truly want to flip Florida blue and oust Marco Rubio, then I need you to give, because she can't cede any ground:= If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | = | | = | | = | | = Thanks for stepping up. James Carville | | = Val Demings here: I can’t thank you enough for fighting alongside me to flip Florida blue. Our grassroots campaign is off to a great start, but in a race as close as this one, I need your help to surge ahead and defend the Senate. body:

Hi Y’all!,I wanted to take a moment to remind you of all the upcoming deadlines for the March 1 Texas Democratic Primary. Your vote is vitally important to flex the blue wave across a number of statewide races and to send a message to my opponent Ronny Jackson **that he can no longer take Democratic voters in TX-13 for granted.** As most of you know, due to the Republican gerrymandering, our district now includes Denton and stretches all the way to the Panhandle making it one of the largest districts in the country.
I know there is a lot of confusion because of changes made the republican-led state legislature. You can still check your registration status online with the Secretary of State here: https://teamrv-mvp.sos.texas.gov/MVP/mvp.do.We are building the largest democratic coalition across North Texas, the Panhandle, and Texoma in decades. We have seen a surge of donors now numbering over 500 that are supporting my campaign to restore sanity in this part of Texas. The most important thing you can do is go out and vote. **Early voting starts February 14 and the primary is March 1.****Will you please join me?**
| [Chip in $5 to restore sanity in TX-13?](https://kathleenfortx.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=09fca73837c97c9ddd5e5e266&id=9c023f545d&e=4712f71bea)
---
Thank you for everything you do to protect our great country, Kathleen

body:

Peter, I’ve said it before and I’ll say it again: Our campaign to turn this district blue is the most urgent campaign in the entire nation.

_Why?_

This is a brand-new, open seat created by redistricting. That means it's a WIDE-OPEN target for MAGA Republicans to snatch our Democratic House majority away from us.

**So we’re going door‐to‐door to speak with voters, running ads and digital programs to reach folks online, and blanketing the district in yard signs to get the word out.**

But an operation like ours requires a lot of money, time, and effort. Unlike our MAGA opponents in this race, **I don’t take a single penny of dark money from corporations or billionaires.**

I’m fully funded by YOU, Peter, and I hope you’re with me in the fight. clean_body: Are you with me in the fight? | = Peter, I’m reaching out to let you know what this campaign is all about. I hope I can make reading this message all the way through worth your while, = | = Peter, I’ve said it before and I’ll say it again: Our campaign to turn this district blue is the most urgent campaign in the entire nation. Why? This is a brand-new, open seat created by redistricting. That means it's a WIDE-OPEN target for MAGA Republicans to snatch our Democratic House majority away from us. So we’re going door‐to‐door to speak with voters, running ads and digital programs to reach folks online, and blanketing the district in yard signs to get the word out. But an operation like ours requires a lot of money, time, and effort. Unlike our MAGA opponents in this race, I don’t take a single penny of dark money from corporations or billionaires. I’m fully funded by YOU, Peter, and I hope you’re with me in the fight. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: = = = When I’m in Congress, it is my promise to you that I will fight for your values each and every day. Thanks for doing your part to get me there, — Phil | | Paid for by Arballo For Congress P.O. Box 3406, Fresno, CA 93650 www.philarballo.com Phil Arballo is a Latino, a Central Valley native, a father, and a husband. And he's running for Congress in California. Phil is a champion for real working families and will fight to protect health care access, keep guns out of the wrong hands, and stand up to traitorous Republicans who are working to ruin our Democracy. One more thing: MAGA Republicans are desperate to win this race. Make no mistake: redistricting has made this district the most competitive it's been in decades, but we need every good Democrat to step up and do their part to beat him. Please, consider making a =. Or, to make the most powerful lasting impact and help us replace the worst MAGA Republican in Congress, make a=. name: Team King for Maryland
subject: King's Chronicle Newsletter #7
disclaimer_text: Paid for by John King for Governor, Eliza Leighton, Treasurer
body:
The King's Chronicle: January 23, 2022

Good evening,

Thanks to supporters like you who made it possible, John and this team have had an exciting month. From announcing Michelle Siri for Lieutenant Governor to reporting the second highest fundraising numbers to launching our new website, we are so grateful for your continued support. We couldn't have done any of this without the help of this amazing team.

We're so inspired by the new-year momentum sweeping through our campaign and look forward to all that this team will accomplish in the coming months. We hope you'll read on to check out some recent campaign highlights, news clippings, event recaps, and upcoming ways to get involved or meet John and Michelle.

Onward,
Team King

Team King Updates

SIRIous MOMENTUM : Earlier this month, Michelle Siri officially joined the campaign as John's running mate. From her advocacy work as the Executive Director of the Women’s Law Center, Board President of Planned Parenthood Maryland, and as a former Maryland Assistant Attorney General, Michelle brings a wealth of Maryland public policy experience and we could not be more excited to have her join the team!

PUTTING THE FUN IN FUNDRAISING : After submitting our first public fundraising report and taking a closer look at our stats, we are so humbled and inspired by the makeup of this grassroots team. Educators and education professionals made up the largest professional block of contributors, and in the last month alone we raised over $600k from mostly first-time donors.

5 MONTH COUNTDOWN EVENT : This Friday, January 28th marks five months until our June primary election and we're having a cocktail event to kick off the countdown! We hope you can join us for this virtual grassroots fundraiser SIPporting John and Michelle, more information about the event is below and you can RSVP here: https://www.mobilize.us/teamjohnkingforgovernor/event/435839/

John in the News
THE WASHINGTON POST: Maryland gubernatorial candidate John King selects Michelle Siri, a women’s rights advocate, as his running mate
“‘Michelle is the perfect partner as an advocate for a more equitable and just future for the state of Maryland,’ King said. ‘And Michelle spent her career fighting for women’s rights, fighting for gender equity, fighting for the very same issues that drive me in this race.’”
READ: https://www.washingtonpost.com/dc-md-va/2022/01/05/maryland-gubernatorial-candidate-john-king-selects-michelle-siri-womens-rights-advocate-his-running-mate/

READ : https://www.baltimoresun.com/politics/bs-md-pol-gubernatorial-fundraising-20220120-zq7fw5do2zeefiuoxzswdq6way-story.html

THE STAR DEMOCRAT: King, Siri look to address education, climate change, growth on Eastern Shore in bid for governor
“Former U.S. Secretary of Education John King and running mate Michelle Siri are looking to turn promises into tangible progress in their 2022 gubernatorial campaign, focusing on addressing climate change and healing the Chesapeake Bay, investing in education through the Blueprint for Maryland’s Future, and smart economic growth in Eastern Shore communities.”
READ: https://www.stardem.com/news/local_news/king-siri-look-to-address-education-climate-change-growth-on-eastern-shore-in-bid-for/article_d09601ea-b519-59bf-9315-521fc003ccdb.html

Michelle Siri for Lieutenant Governor Announcement
WATCH: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=JOSRdlUIXxI

John on the Road

On Martin Luther King Day, John spoke in Prince George’s County about the need to honor Dr. King's call to build a more peaceful, loving, and hopeful world.

On Saturday, Jan. 15th, John spoke at the Prince George's Leadership Action Network forum about his commitment to housing as a human right and his vision to make that right a reality for the many Marylanders struggling with housing insecurity.

On Sunday Jan. 23rd, John had a great virtual conversation with Our Revolution about his plans for Maryland.

Upcoming Events

Interested in future events?

or sign up below!

clean_body: The King's Chronicle: January 23, 2022 Good evening, Thanks to supporters like you who made it possible, John and this team have had an exciting month. From announcing Michelle Siri for Lieutenant Governor to reporting the second highest fundraising numbers to launching our new website, we are so grateful for your continued support. We couldn't have done any of this without the help of this amazing team. We're so inspired by the new-year momentum sweeping through our campaign and look forward to all that this team will accomplish in the coming months. [3] We need 25 more local Democrats to step up and pitch in to help us save the Post Office before midnight. | | We thought the Post Office would recover after President Biden announced his plans to remove Louis DeJoy... Louis DeJoy has already WREAKED HAVOC on the USPS this holiday season >> It’s crystal clear that Louis DeJoy is going to run the Post Office to the ground before he leaves. | | | | | | Democracy is at stake. name: Nikki Fried
subject: “Sufficiently mature”

body:
The lack of respect is astonishing

[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40984597/326839538/224548824?refcode=repro3&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82OTQxOCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3ZTFiYzcwZC1hYzdjLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=1xaEey_EOoZCkRRfRbHXQHAp9hAo7O5rMn6fBd0UWMs=) Peter, This weekend we celebrated the 49th anniversary of _Roe v. Wade_ and the legalization of abortion at the federal level. But, as you already know, this year’s celebration rings hollow. Because as we speak, women’s rights are being threatened at every level of government in Florida. And it doesn’t stop with DeSantis’ 15-week abortion ban. This past week, a Florida judge — married to one of the sponsors of the abortion ban — claimed that a young woman’s GPA proved that she was not “sufficiently mature” to have an abortion without parental consent. Whether she was sufficiently mature to bear the burden of a forced pregnancy was, of course, not a consideration here. **The lack of respect, empathy, and compassion here is astonishing, Peter. And it’s exactly why we need to keep fighting for reproductive freedom in Florida. So that no woman will be put through the humiliation of begging a man for her own bodily autonomy.** [**As your next Governor, I will do everything in my power to make sure that no woman has to answer to a room full of men about what she does with her own body. Stand with me by chipping in $10 — or whatever you can — today.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40984598/326839539/224548824?refcode=repro3&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82OTQxOCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3ZTFiYzcwZC1hYzdjLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=1xaEey_EOoZCkRRfRbHXQHAp9hAo7O5rMn6fBd0UWMs=) **** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will be processed immediately._ | [$5](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40984599/326839540/224548824?express_lane=true&amount=5&refcode=repro3&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82OTQxOCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3ZTFiYzcwZC1hYzdjLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=1xaEey_EOoZCkRRfRbHXQHAp9hAo7O5rMn6fBd0UWMs=) | [$10](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40984600/326839541/224548824?express_lane=true&amount=10&refcode=repro3&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82OTQxOCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3ZTFiYzcwZC1hYzdjLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=1xaEey_EOoZCkRRfRbHXQHAp9hAo7O5rMn6fBd0UWMs=) | [$20](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40984601/326839542/224548824?express_lane=true&amount=20&refcode=repro3&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82OTQxOCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3ZTFiYzcwZC1hYzdjLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=1xaEey_EOoZCkRRfRbHXQHAp9hAo7O5rMn6fBd0UWMs=)

Thank you for being on my team.

— Nikki

name: Kevin Hern
subject: Say “NO” to Democrat Elections Scheme!
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Hern For Congress
body:
They’re desperate to ram this through Congress. Read more >>>
| | | [](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/282e4263e04f74c17c94c760ea83e7c0/34143/4d6454d0dadc5740/59b9403b65e11552c3d6b838967d376c/34143)
---
Peter,

Last year, the Democrats did all they could to ram through their election “reform” scheme.

**Now, as they see our Republican momentum growing, they’re DOUBLING DOWN...**

Senate Democrats are threatening to nuke the filibuster, and last week Joe Biden delivered a widely panned speech in which he accused everyone who opposes this scam of racism!

This legislation is NOT about protecting the right to vote. It’s about rigging our elections.
* They want to nationalize our elections and transform the office of the U.S. Attorney General into an unaccountable “Elections Czar”;
* They want to force hardworking taxpayers to fund political campaigns, to the tune of BILLIONS of dollars;
* And they want to BAN common-sense measures like requiring photo ID to vote... which has overwhelming public support!

I’m fighting back to stop this scheme, and we need every Republican on board.

**_The Democrats’ goal is to win PERMANENT majorities in Washington!_**

**[Please step up today. Pitch in](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/282e4263e04f74c17c94c760ea83e7c0/34143/4d6454d0dadc5740/7ea82b3ccd065e8dc3d6b838967d376c/34143)[ $5,](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/282e4263e04f74c17c94c760ea83e7c0/34143/4d6454d0dadc5740/6009e0f424f4f919c3d6b838967d376c/34143)[ $10,](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/282e4263e04f74c17c94c760ea83e7c0/34143/4d6454d0dadc5740/e2a60483099e85e9c3d6b838967d376c/34143)[ $25,](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/282e4263e04f74c17c94c760ea83e7c0/34143/4d6454d0dadc5740/c10dc167b3bbccbdc3d6b838967d376c/34143)[ or $50](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/282e4263e04f74c17c94c760ea83e7c0/34143/4d6454d0dadc5740/4583ee947bcb08e9c3d6b838967d376c/34143)[ to say “NO” this election reform scam.](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/282e4263e04f74c17c94c760ea83e7c0/34143/4d6454d0dadc5740/56fd9dbfa2722e36c3d6b838967d376c/34143)** We need to cut through the left’s lies and rally the American people against this legislation.

Thank you in advance for your help,

Kevin Hern

[ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40984624/326840757/301434390?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NDI4MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2ODFmOWRjMC1hYzdjLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=yjWVimrQIDAexlCUppVfW628l5bVwyUkETKGI9F6YBs=&emci=bebff044-a97c-ec11-94f6-c896650d4442&emdi=681f9dc0-ac7c-ec11-94f6-c896650d4442&ceid=6371843)
Hello,
At midnight tonight, I’m facing my most critical deadline yet of the campaign. **If we’re going to defeat Chuck Grassley, turn Iowa blue, and protect our Democratic majority in the Senate, we need to hit our $65,000 fundraising goal before midnight tonight – but right now, we’re still falling short.**
I wouldn’t ask if it weren’t important: [**Can you chip in $5 or whatever you can afford now – before our critical deadline at midnight tonight – to help me defeat Chuck Grassley and turn Iowa blue?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40984625/326840758/-42398318?refcode=em20220123pm-nd&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C35%2C50%2C100%2C250&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NDI4MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2ODFmOWRjMC1hYzdjLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=yjWVimrQIDAexlCUppVfW628l5bVwyUkETKGI9F6YBs=)
The early polling shows this race will be close. Only 27% of Iowa voters said they want to reelect Chuck Grassley in the latest poll from the highly-respected Des Moines Register. And Grassley’s approval ratings are the lowest they’ve ever been!
But Mitch McConnell, corporate PACs, and special interests like Big Pharma, Wall Street, and the NRA are already raising millions for Chuck Grassley’s campaign. Grassley has a $3.7 million war chest, and that’s not even counting the Super PAC money that’s going to flood the Iowa airwaves!
I’m not taking money from corporate PACs, so if I’m going to be able to fight back and win, I need your help now.

clean_body: Hello, At midnight tonight, I’m facing my most critical deadline yet of the campaign. If we’re going to defeat Chuck Grassley, turn Iowa blue, and protect our Democratic majority in the Senate, we need to hit our $65,000 fundraising goal before midnight tonight – but right now, we’re still falling short. I wouldn’t ask if it weren’t important: = The early polling shows this race will be close. Only 27% of Iowa voters said they want to reelect Chuck Grassley in the latest poll from the highly-respected Des Moines Register. And Grassley’s approval ratings are the lowest they’ve ever been! But Mitch McConnell, corporate PACs, and special interests like Big Pharma, Wall Street, and the NRA are already raising millions for Chuck Grassley’s campaign. Grassley has a $3.7 million war chest, and that’s not even counting the Super PAC money that’s going to flood the Iowa airwaves! I’m not taking money from corporate PACs, so if I’m going to be able to fight back and win, I need your help now. Our most critical deadline yet is in less than 6 hours, but we’re still falling short of our goal. = If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | = | = | | = | = | | = | = Together, I know we can win this race. Thank you for whatever you’re able to afford today, Mike Franken, VADM, U.S. Navy (ret.) Folks,

With a messy Republican primary underway for Ohio’s open Senate seat,
major GOP players have been sitting on the sidelines, waiting to see which
extremist makes it out of the fray with the nomination.

But in 100 days that all changes—after the primary, the entire GOP will
consolidate around the Republican nominee and turn their sights solely on
Tim!

We need to be ready to boost our ad buys, deploy our rapid response, ramp
up our field operations, and go up on the airwaves. But the bad news is
our fundraising is not where it needs to be at this point in the race.

[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/6514?t=1007&akid=2108%2E3611125%2EEIbMmn ]That means we’ve got to kick our fundraising into high gear right now.
Can you chip in toward our $10,000 24-hour fundraising goal so we’re armed
with the resources to take on the GOP?

Friends,

**Time’s up for Joe Biden.
Time’s up for Career Politicians.**
**Stop the clock now
_Watch my new video here!_**

[ ](http://links.durantforsenate.com/u/click?_t=02743ebc773d4d56aaad0942d1097fe3&_m=ab198edd219f42fba5c9f97a56470c4e&_e=9RSi8T-NY-FWIruhFMoLaqfYhVTrYNHVEt0dXBA3VqoWAF1CTgs-U8t0EQxM7dEWvE1UhpC3fhYd4SPi2Kei8XgMr3i933__nLmzPXN51UAIgvJbTbjVkmq4RBhGNWwsL9Zw6kYk2BuSVKpUwHvzj-mey4TzUe5pTud2zjx42S4tZKcIlSaXj1hA7_DJCl1KlFOGK1B4JBFLZw85qTToQRedlkKEBiuhe9r2XItAa0FbxHWZ9lk8EcJHlvvj7E1FMXA7y_Hpjxb2Rn2Us4ntpxBeXg8hAK6ipZ4BubL0PyeftuUMD2fd_Hn1Ql2j5lwCtfZ0fvt_VJIwElyqYM2flvFbgNtMmyAJTe_64JC4KJ4biEKSZaSKa8igtpTIVqJ5YOB3Yh-77g_sSjnP7vwIdOUXCkfKsaMwOIyMH4Hm7btUZuppfCpiEYRlKWWudl2XSebPrUfTBPCEwMypVIr45dP3T4RX1x1knFzh3RQdaZ7ChylS6ps1JeBsuKRApBDsYBbuTBYalTrT5qug01eleg%3D%3D)
Joe Biden starts making bad decisions from the moment he wakes up in the morning.

I’m a Trump Republican running for US Senate in Alabama. It’s time to stop the clock on Joe Biden and the rest of the Career Politicians who have never served our country.
| [**STOP THE CLOCK**](http://links.durantforsenate.com/u/click?_t=02743ebc773d4d56aaad0942d1097fe3&_m=ab198edd219f42fba5c9f97a56470c4e&_e=9RSi8T-NY-FWIruhFMoLaqfYhVTrYNHVEt0dXBA3VqoWAF1CTgs-U8t0EQxM7dEWvE1UhpC3fhYd4SPi2Kei8XgMr3i933__nLmzPXN51UAIgvJbTbjVkmq4RBhGNWwsL9Zw6kYk2BuSVKpUwHvzj-mey4TzUe5pTud2zjx42S4tZKcIlSaXj1hA7_DJCl1KlFOGK1B4JBFLZw85qTToQRedlkKEBiuhe9r2XItAa0FbxHWZ9lk8EcJHlvvj7E1FMXA7y_Hpjxb2Rn2Us4ntpxBeXg8hAK6ipZ4BubL0PyeftuUMD2fd_Hn1Ql2j5lwCkgses_tu3SiwH0BiCb_uURtT73EBgUJ-GXY36EHzFZ0td12N7UEZ5JNrMsxkE9yEzvNAI6nyrQPaK9M73biGPO2hk6LI7DLcDZbQHmCoNJdOL2rHrJaYxznCZCUME0qppje1XPRhJ0ZOQH3vOmKlfU3bLXFWwYczCTGQPWeLnFpN-GDkP167HehFgGHWNZ2o-Myon_R8-eS5sEMzPBgQTQ%3D%3D)
---

**I’m the only political outsider in this race.** I’m not afraid to take on the Career Politicians in Washington and across our state.

My name is Mike Durant. You might know my story from the movie _Black Hawk Down_. I’m a former Prisoner of War, a 22-year Army veteran, a successful business owner, and a father of six.

_Now, I’m signing up for one more tour of duty – one to serve Alabama and America._
**Let’s stop the clock together.**

clean_body: Time's up for Joe Biden | Friends, Time’s up for Joe Biden. Time’s up for Career Politicians. Stop the clock now Watch my new video here! Joe Biden starts making bad decisions from the moment he wakes up in the morning. I’m a Trump Republican running for US Senate in Alabama. It’s time to stop the clock on Joe Biden and the rest of the Career Politicians who have never served our country. | I’m the only political outsider in this race. I’m not afraid to take on the Career Politicians in Washington and across our state. My name is Mike Durant. You might know my story from the movie Black Hawk Down. I’m a former Prisoner of War, a 22-year Army veteran, a successful business owner, and a father of six. Now, I’m signing up for one more tour of duty – one to serve Alabama and America. Let’s stop the clock together. No more Joe Biden. name: Val Hoyle
subject: This fight is personal
disclaimer_text: Paid for and authorized by Val Hoyle for Congress
body:
| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40984967/326853203/553882890?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NDQxOCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3ZTlkNTk3ZS1iMjdjLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=3SGXcsw4RzmEpAA_mUeKGEg2WkwWahRZ-dwUrERprSM=&emci=b821d029-a57c-ec11-94f6-c896650d4442&emdi=7e9d597e-b27c-ec11-94f6-c896650d4442&ceid=9636579)
---

| | Peter, In my lifetime we have come a long way in terms of access to reproductive health care. In 1965, the Supreme Court ruled that married couples have a Constitutional right to privacy, including the right to use birth control. Before that, accessing birth control was not legal in many parts of the US. I was in second grade when the Supreme Court finally overruled prohibition on the right of unmarried people to access birth control. A year later, the _Roe v Wade_ decision established the right to safe and legal abortions. **Born in 1992, my daughter has never known a world where these fundamental rights weren't available to her, and now, 49 years after Roe, all of this is at risk of being taken away.** I was speaking with my mother this morning and she said that she worked so hard with our local National Organization of Women chapter to overturn these draconian laws so that families could decide when to have children and how many children to have. Deciding if and when to have a family is key to being able to control your economic future. My mom said that at 81 years old she can't believe she has to take up this fight again. But she will and I will because these are rights worth fighting for. This isn't just about the extreme conservative majority on the Supreme Court. We have also seen attacks across the country - and here in Oregon - at the state and local level on abortion rights and access to reproductive health care and comprehensive, medically-accurate sexual education in our schools. **Right now, we are watching the results of 50 years of anti-choice extremists plotting, funding, and executing a strategy aimed at undoing all of the progress we have made on reproductive rights.** I know you're not going to take this lying down, and I sure as hell am not. I've been in this fight for too long, and the stakes are too high. It's why I served on the Planned Parenthood Advocates of Oregon board. It's why I worked in the legislature to safeguard these rights and pass a landmark bill requiring insurance companies to cover 12-month supplies of birth control. **And it's why I'm running for Congress - because we need to protect reproductive rights in federal law now.** This isn't some esoteric public policy issue - it's personal. Personal to me, to my daughter, to the generations of women who have worked to establish and protect these rights for themselves and for their daughters and their granddaughters. We shouldn't still have to be fighting for this. **But here we are, and the work is not done and the fight goes on. In Congress, I'll lead the work to take this issue out of the courts by passing federal legislation protecting the right to choose once and for all.** This won't be easy, and it will take a tremendous effort of people standing up across this country to say that abortion rights aren't optional and they shouldn't be up for debate any longer. Together, we can make sure that 49 years from now, the fight over reproductive rights will seem like ancient history. All the best, _Val_ Express Donate: If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution instantly: | clean_body: | | | Peter, In my lifetime we have come a long way in terms of access to reproductive health care. In 1965, the Supreme Court ruled that married couples have a Constitutional right to privacy, including the right to use birth control. Before that, accessing birth control was not legal in many parts of the US. I was in second grade when the Supreme Court finally overruled prohibition on the right of unmarried people to access birth control. A year later, the Roe v Wade decision established the right to safe and legal abortions. Born in 1992, my daughter has never known a world where these fundamental rights weren't available to her, and now, 49 years after Roe, all of this is at risk of being taken away. I was speaking with my mother this morning and she said that she worked so hard with our local National Organization of Women chapter to overturn these draconian laws so that families could decide when to have children and how many children to have. Deciding if and when to have a family is key to being able to control your economic future. My mom said that at 81 years old she can't believe she has to take up this fight again. But she will and I will because these are rights worth fighting for. This isn't just about the extreme conservative majority on the Supreme Court. We have also seen attacks across the country - and here in Oregon - at the state and local level on abortion rights and access to reproductive health care and comprehensive, medically-accurate sexual education in our schools. Right now, we are watching the results of 50 years of anti-choice extremists plotting, funding, and executing a strategy aimed at undoing all of the progress we have made on reproductive rights. I know you're not going to take this lying down, and I sure as hell am not. I've been in this fight for too long, and the stakes are too high. It's why I served on the Planned Parenthood Advocates of Oregon board. It's why I worked in the legislature to safeguard these rights and pass a landmark bill requiring insurance companies to cover 12-month supplies of birth control. And it's why I'm running for Congress - because we need to protect reproductive rights in federal law now. This isn't some esoteric public policy issue - it's personal. Personal to me, to my daughter, to the generations of women who have worked to establish and protect these rights for themselves and for their daughters and their granddaughters. We shouldn't still have to be fighting for this. But here we are, and the work is not done and the fight goes on. In Congress, I'll lead the work to take this issue out of the courts by passing federal legislation protecting the right to choose once and for all. This won't be easy, and it will take a tremendous effort of people standing up across this country to say that abortion rights aren't optional and they shouldn't be up for debate any longer. Together, we can make sure that 49 years from now, the fight over reproductive rights will seem like ancient history. All the best, Val Express Donate: If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution instantly: | = | = | = | = ---|---|---|--- | | Paid for and authorized by Val Hoyle for Congress. ---|--- | This email was sent by Val Hoyle for Congress 1863 Pioneer Pkwy E. #306 Springfield, OR 97477 United States Email is an important way for Val Hoyle to keep supporters like you informed about critical issues and to build a winning grassroots campaign. | | | Friend, If you haven’t heard yet, I wanted to be sure to tell you first - **I am running for the United States Senate here in New Hampshire in 2022.** I grew up poor, worked my way through college and over 30 years ago started Freshwater Farms. Back then it was 3 acres, a lot of dirt, a pile of debt and a dream. Today we have grown to more than 13 acres and 50 employees. I have lived the American Dream and the New Hampshire Dream and that’s why I wanted to give back to the state that has given me so much. I did that by volunteering on local boards, then serving on the Board of Selectmen, as Town Moderator, as a State Representative, and now as your Senate President. Over these past years we’ve been able to accomplish so much to help New Hampshire families - we’ve cut taxes, balanced budgets, created more choice in education, and ensured our freedoms were protected. **Will you help me bring this leadership to Washington so we can have a Senator who stands up for the 603?******
---
| |
---
| | [JOIN THE TEAM](https://click.mlsend2.com/link/c/YT0xODY5Nzc5NjkwNjA5MTg3MjI5JmM9bjZuNSZlPTAmYj04NzkxMDI4MDYmZD1pOXczejBy.Ozb5eC0X_iDeUQ_YwUg2MIlTmwK3S-LjdXSmv7dK9t4)
---
---
| | | Despite our success here in New Hampshire, there’s been one thing that’s been holding us back - _Washington, DC._ Progressive Democrats have threatened to undo all of our hard work by trying to remake our nation into something few of us recognize, and even fewer of us want. Through it all, Maggie Hassan has simply stood by watching it all happen, and doing nothing to stop it. **But I’m not going to sit on the sidelines and do nothing - I’m going to be the fighter our state needs to keep the American Dream alive here in New Hampshire. ** I know I can’t do it alone, though... **[Can I count on your support so that we can get New Hampshire represented in Washington - not Washington represented in New Hampshire](https://click.mlsend2.com/link/c/YT0xODY5Nzc5NjkwNjA5MTg3MjI5JmM9bjZuNSZlPTAmYj04NzkxMDI4MTImZD1oMm4zcTN3.yB6-qLoHNaSDFmbcU2y8guBi4tqxJJi1xaAvEvFbAs0)**

name: Nate Sandvig
subject: What this fight means to me
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Sandvig for Congress
body:
Together, we’ll lead the way to TAKE BACK our country. Read more >>>
| | | [](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/48cc7c9e03161852041ad8cde91a9694/37283/86eeeff3e7955ce7/2eabedebad68683bc3d6b838967d376c/37283)
---
Friends,

As a father, a patriot, and a common-sense conservative, I have NEVER been more concerned about the direction our nation is headed.

_If we don’t change course, in a few short years we will not recognize our country anymore..._

I wish every day it were all a bad dream. But this is our reality.

I’m fighting with all I’ve got to **RESTORE NORMALCY** and I’m grateful to have your support!

[**Today, I’m asking for your help to sustain our critical efforts at Team Sandvig >>>**](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/48cc7c9e03161852041ad8cde91a9694/37283/86eeeff3e7955ce7/441b433ed845c700c3d6b838967d376c/37283)
---
[](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/48cc7c9e03161852041ad8cde91a9694/37283/86eeeff3e7955ce7/2c6b0d59a3f468ebc3d6b838967d376c/37283)
---
The Democrats’ disastrous economic policies have given us 40-year high inflation and disincentivized work. Empty store shelves are increasingly common.

The left’s “Defund the Police” insanity has results in a record-breaking crime wave, including an all-time high of 90 homicides in Portland last year.

And there’s no end in sight to the left’s nonsensical COVID-19 mandates... they are not based in science and they do not work!

**I’m running for this seat to protect our prosperity, our liberty, and our freedom.**

[**Together, strong and united, I know we can STOP THE INSANITY!**](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/48cc7c9e03161852041ad8cde91a9694/37283/86eeeff3e7955ce7/689c00a9ed1054ddc3d6b838967d376c/37283)

Thank you for all your encouragement and support as we ramp up to win.

\- Nate
---

[](http://links.mwaltzforcongress.com/u/click?_t=d89142ed55974e2696402eb6b29e4daf&_m=a02135b82aa844abbb3f398613e9ae9f&_e=TbD4ZMeb8KoRJjocqt7DhN03DleevXPbl-Ksh2TUf_sjjZZiiK7BnYG4FWhJsxwNmBKUpOoafD4Jft5aXoZTRoE54T1-3xtLIFhDdznlrlCg_AZ0mUlJ7KlrgLuQGtKHqN6hiyL4VkMMllRIgpiLXzrl3GulgvhoQVcp3hZ9ZcoCP586dIIjXwUhiCb88-sfUeAI_gaezqynAJkDucVLllnk2S_lGHfIJxJQoSNE46uVKEkwvF1NxQ5acvOfFZ-GXAdUak0Gu-C7YBtaZDtVcbdW9LhMjp9hZRKSEFYG1sWmDJAn_cweWFN1bs24ODX2o6W8bz8ON4tPE3O4hP6bkznqaLxmMq38tt3wvbRUj7o%3D) Hello Waltz Warriors! **In the News**
**WALTZ ON RUSSIA-UKRAINE**

On Monday, Mike Waltz kicked off the week by joining [The National Desk](http://links.mwaltzforcongress.com/u/click?_t=d89142ed55974e2696402eb6b29e4daf&_m=a02135b82aa844abbb3f398613e9ae9f&_e=TbD4ZMeb8KoRJjocqt7DhKlypbrStFL6sXJmOjW_kt-G1V_tpXm8BHq_yNjss9aj1ArlPzyecRe-ra4VSHVEdzea_pZVkE4BWrzaTenByaJ_zH0d0mJYw4NRhdo-ip8JANnReJWXWGvndOHjEJqOK07aoKo8DYEkIO7sflw-H2yC4cAtSX0bpX9dUtWFvSK9JokLG5BqqvRMRcbjHEsq-lwaNgjKzboLigLJbHE05vVJTuGNwBa7ZlL4r8vW658cDSpBvrgoq-B8X0MfrbFtT8UNKNIqeoWiade42G1HfEmptPZE4L2qo6HHbVxXwklx9cKiFlq7L_45ZqdB-0WbLBcEETKZBuYv_LsFs0Dc0onJWYMLJ9-1PHFXQF_AVx5FMFDEEH7FirFGoY909kxu7GrSCvtDBpBz3L4nt2Csf2y4ysezVQDDixMHjtlkwnOckY2ldeyBkBcRYJ-EhnQ3l54C5twd-OQ1IJMrJuobF74%3D) to talk rising Russia-Ukraine tensions, saying:

_“Biden should be taking tough measures now, accelerating lethal aid to Ukraine, putting sanctions in place now, and frustrating Putin’s calculus and raising the costs immediately. Time is of the essence because Putin has put the pieces in place for a full invasion,” said Waltz. “If we abandon yet another ally, just as we abandon one in Afghanistan, additional dominoes could fall and that leads to global instability that will affect every American.”_

[](http://links.mwaltzforcongress.com/u/click?_t=d89142ed55974e2696402eb6b29e4daf&_m=a02135b82aa844abbb3f398613e9ae9f&_e=TbD4ZMeb8KoRJjocqt7DhKlypbrStFL6sXJmOjW_kt-G1V_tpXm8BHq_yNjss9aj1ArlPzyecRe-ra4VSHVEdzea_pZVkE4BWrzaTenByaJ_zH0d0mJYw4NRhdo-ip8JANnReJWXWGvndOHjEJqOK07aoKo8DYEkIO7sflw-H2yC4cAtSX0bpX9dUtWFvSK9JokLG5BqqvRMRcbjHEsq-lwaNgjKzboLigLJbHE05vVJTuGNwBa7ZlL4r8vW658cDSpBvrgoq-B8X0MfrbFtT7Bl2oUdjesCaa-EzAUr2C_yYvIZEE2DWNg1NXnQKF2ocUo_GTH5tDFxWHvy5lJa5JJKGSS_yAFiGFW8KvQ2R4S5G2Pr1M3-iHcfFbDuMYCmThZFgSeWPiSrUBisnmL7jwdf3D3jq8xXUhePz2JXB5q-6XcwkVSslWB3z7u1LLb9rRxSP2IHCCLmX1UEcniVdJIKROmNS6MkLhXE8r_Y_3s%3D)

Watch the entire interview for yourself [here.](http://links.mwaltzforcongress.com/u/click?_t=d89142ed55974e2696402eb6b29e4daf&_m=a02135b82aa844abbb3f398613e9ae9f&_e=TbD4ZMeb8KoRJjocqt7DhKlypbrStFL6sXJmOjW_kt-G1V_tpXm8BHq_yNjss9aj1ArlPzyecRe-ra4VSHVEdzea_pZVkE4BWrzaTenByaJ_zH0d0mJYw4NRhdo-ip8JANnReJWXWGvndOHjEJqOK07aoKo8DYEkIO7sflw-H2yC4cAtSX0bpX9dUtWFvSK9JokLG5BqqvRMRcbjHEsq-lwaNgjKzboLigLJbHE05vVJTuGNwBa7ZlL4r8vW658cDSpBvrgoq-B8X0MfrbFtT-sRGmBjqSO3iCe9UHMdBVbh-xAMjLfhLpHeGiCK7m9yG1w0ncFJ-A2OUUFpCuSQagh3fGB6usht9n-OKAoilqPcQzmFIV5y0WyyOqzXtCDksMRSvpPfu0vEa-qtcs0E2qfgKgmCUO-3DHiGTEUlqpnJWasHC8JN-qIuT94gpRPdXycks0pyfuZWRXgiB0vlRRa2MoDb7_ZCJcfQ8uweXws%3D)
**WALTZ ON CHINA'S COVID LOCKDOWN**

Then on Tuesday, Mike joined [Fox Business' Varney & Co](http://links.mwaltzforcongress.com/u/click?_t=d89142ed55974e2696402eb6b29e4daf&_m=a02135b82aa844abbb3f398613e9ae9f&_e=TbD4ZMeb8KoRJjocqt7DhKDPGrX8c4nqG14TlHlXcl8FD9slpZu3ou9sj_miHmB6os6Xoyv7aSLG5DrhWwxVKmBC3gOloUU1zCFBd_8jOek6tLkNQCEXVFIHafPt1DjqwG6sEdXAECIb-NL79aZfY_OhEZS4lWLX7PNO2eis2EdMBnJKPuabqkRSatJB6HFkxRxfvkP_QWEvbiYsYcVVix6-MLUgCFufuysH_a7fVNc36-fTvn5BU8VRiQK2MwechrqkR2sOPqVZDHCbhIv6n2o5VB6cI54MHB1NzIHBLzdNPNR9FR_7wPMfDZI4JQMEw9lIQXLiYbh777je__VN5AT5USt8pei0ccTW4Us4Fu0%3D) to discuss China's recent COVID lockdowns despite hosting the Winter Olympics in a few weeks and the effect they'll have on U.S. supply chains. From the interview:

_"If COVID has taught us anything, it's that the_ Chinese Communist Party _can and will cut off our supply chains to reach their geopolitical ends. We can't continue to allow China's to control our pharmaceuticals, critical minerals, PPE, and more. America must bring our supply chains home."_

[](http://links.mwaltzforcongress.com/u/click?_t=d89142ed55974e2696402eb6b29e4daf&_m=a02135b82aa844abbb3f398613e9ae9f&_e=TbD4ZMeb8KoRJjocqt7DhKDPGrX8c4nqG14TlHlXcl8FD9slpZu3ou9sj_miHmB6os6Xoyv7aSLG5DrhWwxVKmBC3gOloUU1zCFBd_8jOek6tLkNQCEXVFIHafPt1DjqwG6sEdXAECIb-NL79aZfY1k84_rM-wYw4LDbCdNjiGmRJ18ngZrv0DnyL1Jly3-CWCdjmUWP5gElmHJzkn8EGUgYVAHeaBQ0g7v92Tob_lxirFiUlXMaNk25wpcNHeGfy8ounrgESEge9WRMTvxAhSDkktXg0JnVZmrhKacbyK7BjJHTFiogCjrRCM3leIeFklHjitgyQ_z71so-rOZ7_1S-XAbGA6y6R64ws3W8XU0%3D)

Watch the Fox Business interview [here.](http://links.mwaltzforcongress.com/u/click?_t=d89142ed55974e2696402eb6b29e4daf&_m=a02135b82aa844abbb3f398613e9ae9f&_e=TbD4ZMeb8KoRJjocqt7DhKDPGrX8c4nqG14TlHlXcl8FD9slpZu3ou9sj_miHmB6os6Xoyv7aSLG5DrhWwxVKmBC3gOloUU1zCFBd_8jOek6tLkNQCEXVFIHafPt1DjqwG6sEdXAECIb-NL79aZfY1Hx2vTraHBW4QwWHHmTRpo-y17z4n9sbDr5rH4pod-GwafLIKJPw20C_Nk0NPSXzZDJ7WqLuaCCqZ3SWh55CMXUNL617_TDGgEWNVWrIvXQTGrAt5ajWA7v_DYt3FtQKlZFQYYuh62HSD2tjOb-YId_jgOB4SlBqXDFSs2Y8J4tasfdM8ynzedWNE_0bSnuhXwcROqj6TbAbyU794VrTUw%3D)
**WALTZ ON YEMENI DRONE STRIKES**

On Wednesday, Mike was on [Fox Business with Maria Bartiromo](http://links.mwaltzforcongress.com/u/click?_t=d89142ed55974e2696402eb6b29e4daf&_m=a02135b82aa844abbb3f398613e9ae9f&_e=TbD4ZMeb8KoRJjocqt7DhAxpbCrZMAwQUpzsoMdm3UedH2wLm0A5fIqtkmpXBheOaDHa-AX4CAPJq_-nvbb2IYaLdEKzMKCe0OEnFiPZE09PsyafwPGAgSs2fnsIDSwcVRuZ5u9mAg6uPqLBzPZZOKwBMcRB5ZpD9Bda8E9L98h3sGJQbZnpBykVVv-vlWcRc1XkE8AlWqdXBkSJ1M-iszgnTIqFnxTmTAtQOdNffuRzqt1cs0Zi0sxGvPLBNpls2EHx3dfFrHwEKttC1hDc9Y-Y8fxQYbgfItzUlNX-Z3v4B0E8SQWGAt3_jman8jefJFIuq62w6C49UVOWrZ4L1OrOTiz5gF0iP27EF6zW0lA%3D) to discuss Yemeni fighters launching drone strikes on the UAE, saying:

_"The Houthis have only escalated their attacks since the Biden Admin took them off the terrorist list. They've attacked our embassy in Yemen and now our allies, the UAE, all with the support of Iran at the same time US negotiators are pleading with Iran to re-enter the Iran Deal." _

clean_body: Hello Waltz Warriors! We hope this email finds you and your families healthy and safe! From discussing Russia and Ukraine to Biden's leadership to the IOC Act, here’s just some of what Mike has been up to this past week. | | In the News WALTZ ON RUSSIA-UKRAINE On Monday, Mike Waltz kicked off the week by joining to talk rising Russia-Ukraine tensions, saying: “Biden should be taking tough measures now, accelerating lethal aid to Ukraine, putting sanctions in place now, and frustrating Putin’s calculus and raising the costs immediately. Time is of the essence because Putin has put the pieces in place for a full invasion,” said Waltz. “If we abandon yet another ally, just as we abandon one in Afghanistan, additional dominoes could fall and that leads to global instability that will affect every American.” Watch the entire interview for yourself WALTZ ON CHINA'S COVID LOCKDOWN Then on Tuesday, Mike joined to discuss China's recent COVID lockdowns despite hosting the Winter Olympics in a few weeks and the effect they'll have on U.S. supply chains. From the interview: "If COVID has taught us anything, it's that the Chinese Communist Party can and will cut off our supply chains to reach their geopolitical ends. We can't continue to allow China's to control our pharmaceuticals, critical minerals, PPE, and more. America must bring our supply chains home." Watch the Fox Business interview WALTZ ON YEMENI DRONE STRIKES On Wednesday, Mike was on to discuss Yemeni fighters launching drone strikes on the UAE, saying: "The Houthis have only escalated their attacks since the Biden Admin took them off the terrorist list. They've attacked our embassy in Yemen and now our allies, the UAE, all with the support of Iran at the same time US negotiators are pleading with Iran to re-enter the Iran Deal." Watch the entire segment WALTZ ON IOC ACT Then on Thursday, Reps. Mike Waltz and Rep. Jennifer Wexton joined to discuss their bipartisan bill to strip the International Olympics Committee of tax exempt status and the current situation developing on Ukraine's border. From Mike: "The American taxpayer is subsidizing the IOC under the idea that it's a social welfare organization. By allowing the Olympics to take place in a country with mass rape, sterilization, forced labor, & genocide is doing the opposite and should be stripped of its tax exempt status." Watch the interview WALTZ ON BOYCOTTING THE OLYMPICS To end the week, Mike discussed the ongoing genocide and human rights atrocities being carried out by the CCP, and his efforts to boycott the Olympics with , saying: 'Woke' American corps, like CocaCola, Intel, Procter & Gamble, are quick to boycott for human rights at home but remain silent when it comes to China. PLUS they've got massive defense contracts AND are sending BILLIONS to Beijing to fuel the Chinese Communist Party's military build up." Watch the Fox hit Essential Mission Brief Reading (And Listening) Podcast: Store Our Online Store is live! If you haven't checked it out yet, . You can find all the Waltz Warriors shirts, hats, stickers, yard signs, and now...koozies! | Social Media Here are a few of our top posts from social media this week. Be sure to like and share, and when you tweet at Mike remember to use #WaltzWarriors | That's it for this week. Thanks for all of you support and stay tuned for more! Be sure to follow Mike on social media! | | ---|--- Paid for by Michael Waltz For Congress Michael Waltz is a member of the Army National Guard. body:
The Arizona Democratic Party has formally censured Senator Kyrsten Sinema for her vote to maintain the filibuster and block voting rights legislation. This is a really big deal. | | | [](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953ylv71NjtRp9uAvapwZeG5Fwod7vf2Q19deFkSzINQB7pYO7Ed0TOwyvjuedJ39zpEnMq3REs_6qpHFEbObeQSefEuosMlyzL6pkt-qavlTwO0xjZ-KFeZXFXtZxaKY9GW_PnsaZ7LcrYOlbCR2CWaCEPb4dLYAh30oldTngR1omA9ULd2GFOzXQfDaxgRPN8do18iU5T453oikNCWoIf9jfrSaEelNmJzJYDaQdvfucVwSxnL5MK4cP0bQgV4KrH5Ll32x0fBBWsdPC-sK1Cgdh9CPn42g3QfZ4-wPSPleug/3iy/-HVe47rtStyQVWaSDL_FLQ/h0/DI-EAwpry0mN2cHEQaSYTTt02k8at7iEZmdFCLR5B_I)
Did you hear the news? The Arizona Democratic Party has **formally censured Senator Kyrsten Sinema** for her vote to maintain the filibuster and block voting rights legislation. **This is a really big deal.** And it's even bigger when you consider that it's coming just _days_ after EMILY's List and NARAL — who both previously supported Sinema — both said they would not endorse her because of her refusal to reform the filibuster and protect voting rights. [**_With Sinema's former allies abandoning her, the time has never been better to build up our movement to defeat her. Sinema keeps voting against the priorities that her own allies and supporters want. This isn’t Gosar’s first run-in with sharing white nationalist beliefs or commentators. _It most certainly won’t be his last time._

But we need to send a message that no matter the district, no matter how difficult it is, **we can’t give someone like Paul Gosar a free pass.** We must continue to challenge him, to organize in the communities he represents, and to let **_all of AZ and America know that we do not accept ANY of Gosar’s behavior._**

name: Kevin Kiley
subject: New Vaccine Bill
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Kevin Kiley for Congress 9458 Treelake Road, Granite Bay, CA 95746, United States
body:
|
---
Hi Peter, I've just published a new blog post: [The Third World](https://kevinkiley.nationbuilder.com/r?u=Bjc8XUdeJ9yV6eR3mI9Z6HRd5urWv8u8i-Pa-jQzioquTnC1xVt8fhvv7bPZtTZNcLYnZOyX3T3a2Tyg8JR6Cw&e=eff202566bfe6143aa18c9c627e100fe&utm_source=kevinkiley&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=jan_23_final&n=1) The CDC now reports that prior infection offers better protection than vaccination. I'm calling on Newsom to credit natural immunity in all COVID policies immediately. Of course, he has refused. Just as he still refuses to revoke his student vaccine mandate, which every other state has rejected. Worse, Senate Bill 866 seeks to cut parents out entirely, letting 12-year-olds get the COVID vaccine without parental consent. Meanwhile, LA schools just announced that “students will be required to wear a non-cloth mask with a nose wire at all times.” And the ultimate form of government control – Single Payer Healthcare – just passed the Appropriations Committee and is on to a vote by the full Assembly. While in LA this week, Newsom marveled that “we look like a third world country.” It was a classic gaffe: a politician accidentally telling the truth. But the better comparison may be to the _medieval_ world, where truth itself is an instrument of state power. There is some good news. The Supreme Court has struck down Biden’s employer mandate, and in California, the leader of the Legislature’s “Vaccine Work Group” says they don’t have the votes for any new mandates to take effect this year. Our battles in 2022 go beyond standard fare politics. We are now in a fight for America's Founding principles. [Help me fight for our Founding principles](https://kevinkiley.nationbuilder.com/r?u=09K6E4GvoPozZ73mzf50y5etLj1_9wCfyRoQ3wvVmv-GOhHPWzgYbh54Gph7Pyuk3g2mp41Qa8XyLKk0CnWqFcPhfo-70bh2d9FGRmWv-G0iUqqLQazIF6cOfkGWrQv5&e=eff202566bfe6143aa18c9c627e100fe&utm_source=kevinkiley&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=jan_23_final&n=2) [Share this Post on Social Media](https://kevinkiley.nationbuilder.com/r?u=27Ax0UmWOX2J8J_QwK9Z6lpHI-UVcODcFSdMgu5zpAxtFYbLoTU4vO_v9VmQaWV4Q8OPQJCr3FbFy2HLzTI-6xCUa7JC7QKQNLIXiFgVQNjJ4JnrprZWGsEi3sCXDtq9-y3i_Q5cGvkrRj-DXPsemVY_rx3GJHd7vDsnIxhdTHkpVrYwD2FUuLy7r_25ueox&e=eff202566bfe6143aa18c9c627e100fe&utm_source=kevinkiley&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=jan_23_final&n=3) Kevin Kiley
California Legislator
Paid for by Kevin Kiley for Congress 9458 Treelake Road, Granite Bay, CA 95746, United States
