name: Herschel Walker
subject: it was all a political game
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TEAM HERSCHEL, INC
body:
I thought he was supposed to bring people together. | [](http://links.g4yamerica.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=1a5f0b92de47489283438905d4bf3203&_e=2NsVl7cGPfckqjI3hoRqMRHM-4j6e2znl9XcC44RuaUq9BDBYjmHUulgtG36RdpR8Eskt_j8a6kPB-FqIxlFBDgHv58Tf2z32oOZRJIXd5sxuJqEIOaz1QxHEdTeXyjBK7ouYoJtk2eXYQx8K5hvzHDkeO-4bvk85JAuwg3OQ8NcqzTKvcEIfEPEnnsxTbm8adhWlz6WsinK-1OEL136kNhdiC2P01TPc0QvFaKgbfv14DRvyqnHu0K9A36FAEuOENWq6TyZLRdtGmk0o_ZIDvf8Mtsf-bHYjBB9AUakYnbtG2DfSrozg9DZja7oaOn6Pz50AEJH_p9lAOybkaqFtKnRqdyFgI-F7ZTmRYWbyXd3G_3H6TGSKRzF9em44X4loN-yw0OX8iOe1SAtv43iInEyjhsa3qRGbSInSms3JH8YKpk__3bABukq9qYjohFZrkjgSa92w8hbfnyV7qqexQ%3D%3D)
---
Fellow American,

Unlike President Biden, I was born in the deep South nearly 60 years ago. Back then, Dixiecrats - conservative Democrats - as they were known then, controlled nearly every aspect of government in Georgia and many states across the South. These politicians were opposed to racial integration.

**They were Democrats.**

So when President Biden visited Atlanta last week to give a fiery speech on election reform, I was stunned at what he said. He argued people who don't support the Democrats' voting legislation are like former segregationists Bull Connor and George Wallace.

**In other words, anyone who disagrees with him is a racist.**

On Wednesday, Democrats in the Senate - including my opponent - responded to Biden's siren call by holding a vote, which they knew would not pass, that would federalize our elections. As expected, it failed.

They even tried to change the Senate's filibuster rule to ram through the legislation, which they knew would not succeed. As expected, it failed too because they couldn't get all Democrats to agree.

**Sadly, this was all a political game.** President Biden used outrageous rhetoric, and Senate Democrats pushed forward with doomed legislation, simply to keep their base happy.

**Unfortunately, that's how Washington works these days, and it's why we need to change who we send to Washington.**

**[If you believe that we need elected officials who will support voter ID laws and common-sense election reforms- not the federalization of elections, then I'm asking you to chip in $5 to my Senate campaign today.](http://links.g4yamerica.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=1a5f0b92de47489283438905d4bf3203&_e=2NsVl7cGPfckqjI3hoRqMRHM-4j6e2znl9XcC44RuaUq9BDBYjmHUulgtG36RdpR8Eskt_j8a6kPB-FqIxlFBDgHv58Tf2z32oOZRJIXd5sxuJqEIOaz1QxHEdTeXyjBK7ouYoJtk2eXYQx8K5hvzHDkeO-4bvk85JAuwg3OQ8NcqzTKvcEIfEPEnnsxTbm8adhWlz6WsinK-1OEL136kNhdiC2P01TPc0QvFaKgbfv14DRvyqnHu0K9A36FAEuOcrQzPV3VXoImoYDbKc2aMnRx_XgqFv4iOWmwoi4AjoGvPESRMKvdE2UAGUW2celFuEM8vAHHPZSUiwMK88DBQj50A0cpwpHcZNLmAyzwJ5XjCy-3_VXPDK8UlUZR_IW9HDlCwXa7NJLfc9ISVUz_YJFSIVDLQWGTDB32bseo0SbytkJUjMNen9Ku4v6e3iRO9Uq9bJXd45MT5Aac8SGijA%3D%3D) **

**[HELP US FIGHT FOR VOTER ID LAWS](http://links.g4yamerica.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=1a5f0b92de47489283438905d4bf3203&_e=2NsVl7cGPfckqjI3hoRqMRHM-4j6e2znl9XcC44RuaUq9BDBYjmHUulgtG36RdpR8Eskt_j8a6kPB-FqIxlFBDgHv58Tf2z32oOZRJIXd5sxuJqEIOaz1QxHEdTeXyjBK7ouYoJtk2eXYQx8K5hvzHDkeO-4bvk85JAuwg3OQ8NcqzTKvcEIfEPEnnsxTbm8adhWlz6WsinK-1OEL136kNhdiC2P01TPc0QvFaKgbfv14DRvyqnHu0K9A36FAEuOgBirsyyG4TAKep6dQdbfrDBfUe-0zz-hhE-w0kE9Y3KrxyqbOSF2JkX_dNKLjB5hpk1QLJsqXKbMDQQR1L2v_AWK2y4qtX_ZmY1CWJgBg30fFMf1WGK1U0qwpLDG_yjMtQz6KxaufVHVVS3VPHT_hQSEOMkdc_V9jMZbVJJKvP_cZEYN8fBTDhdA2f6BkAt8H_-qQmOXVOc25G_gEoS9Qw%3D%3D)**
[** CHIP IN $5 TODAY -> **](http://links.g4yamerica.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=1a5f0b92de47489283438905d4bf3203&_e=2NsVl7cGPfckqjI3hoRqMRHM-4j6e2znl9XcC44RuaUq9BDBYjmHUulgtG36RdpR8Eskt_j8a6kPB-FqIxlFBDgHv58Tf2z32oOZRJIXd5sxuJqEIOaz1QxHEdTeXyjBK7ouYoJtk2eXYQx8K5hvzHDkeO-4bvk85JAuwg3OQ8NcqzTKvcEIfEPEnnsxTbm8adhWlz6WsinK-1OEL136kNhdiC2P01TPc0QvFaKgbfv14DRvyqnHu0K9A36FAEuOrA1LN4576HijLaPk37Ju5MAe5oc_A-mFEEQyrBiSwvvzIF8BCrRDx7o0-Gji_LKjf25vFE8q84-_61YGWSOYo2Fg0Rt3lIJ9eew5f4sdqJKd465GoJBN8GbQT0fMMnGXMbq4Qx7yzYN6CK1ba9-GrlZ2Fl34Cv0JmgpsZqbpjlQj7OfhZS62w27y_h8fmR30iypuDpcyxx_V-DSOXnbpZg%3D%3D)
President Biden and our Democrat opponent want the country to believe Georgia's updated voting laws are nearly identical to ones in place during the Jim Crow era that disenfranchised black voters.

_**Mr. President, that's absurd.**_

_**I don't support your federal voting legislation, and I'm not a racist.**_

The sad truth about Democrats today is that if they don't get the outcome they want, they accuse Republicans of being bad actors out to destroy America. Until we can figure out a way to put a lid on that kind of talk, our country is not going to heal.

**[If you agree, please stand with me and help me change Washington.](http://links.g4yamerica.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=1a5f0b92de47489283438905d4bf3203&_e=2NsVl7cGPfckqjI3hoRqMRHM-4j6e2znl9XcC44RuaUq9BDBYjmHUulgtG36RdpR8Eskt_j8a6kPB-FqIxlFBDgHv58Tf2z32oOZRJIXd5sxuJqEIOaz1QxHEdTeXyjBK7ouYoJtk2eXYQx8K5hvzHDkeO-4bvk85JAuwg3OQ8NcqzTKvcEIfEPEnnsxTbm8adhWlz6WsinK-1OEL136kNhdiC2P01TPc0QvFaKgbfv14DRvyqnHu0K9A36FAEuODWmIR3eGPa8j4qSU9sV4Lsm_GWbUYDpNWvWHoCgYO0tnTjJhIqhwbqjpHi-YhIe_vx_Bsf8ltkkoZKw-7JQOF9fpehnsB5XLTVyILl5A3x-ykLLcHb96Z79pq58OP78AMJSp25gVYjxq7_nfP_iWn9Lz9uyplW9KIeJG4mLDwLxZYk-3mN9mJbVsRnRHK21M8Fen0BxQACM7Gq8a2BslfQ%3D%3D)**

Thank you for your support,

[](http://links.g4yamerica.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=1a5f0b92de47489283438905d4bf3203&_e=2NsVl7cGPfckqjI3hoRqMRHM-4j6e2znl9XcC44RuaUq9BDBYjmHUulgtG36RdpR8Eskt_j8a6kPB-FqIxlFBDgHv58Tf2z32oOZRJIXd5sxuJqEIOaz1QxHEdTeXyjBK7ouYoJtk2eXYQx8K5hvzHDkeO-4bvk85JAuwg3OQ8NcqzTKvcEIfEPEnnsxTbm8adhWlz6WsinK-1OEL136kNhdiC2P01TPc0QvFaKgbfv14DRvyqnHu0K9A36FAEuOGUOZA_vqfbTrPFZ9RarnnQMOZtfZOxNSNx9deQVfS-7RsYY98kmZQ0XmiCSftiapxKT4zwe1uY9Bx0hX-8anAX-uWUr3Mi8RrQU4alZX6Cnc_C-WEWfGSUjxkRIGM0XEoNUjMwkevcB8O6To5aPpRL_CqERQJUUxeREnEwRdmzxLisVDxcUQWVzJNDtv8mGHAkbna8jrJLbaJvrreCJykA%3D%3D)
Herschel Walker

clean_body: I thought he was supposed to bring people together. | Fellow American, Unlike President Biden, I was born in the deep South nearly 60 years ago. Back then, Dixiecrats - conservative Democrats - as they were known then, controlled nearly every aspect of government in Georgia and many states across the South. These politicians were opposed to racial integration. They were Democrats. So when President Biden visited Atlanta last week to give a fiery speech on election reform, I was stunned at what he said. He argued people who don't support the Democrats' voting legislation are like former segregationists Bull Connor and George Wallace. In other words, anyone who disagrees with him is a racist. On Wednesday, Democrats in the Senate - including my opponent - responded to Biden's siren call by holding a vote, which they knew would not pass, that would federalize our elections. As expected, it failed. They even tried to change the Senate's filibuster rule to ram through the legislation, which they knew would not succeed. As expected, it failed too because they couldn't get all Democrats to agree. Sadly, this was all a political game. President Biden used outrageous rhetoric, and Senate Democrats pushed forward with doomed legislation, simply to keep their base happy. Unfortunately, that's how Washington works these days, and it's why we need to change who we send to Washington. President Biden and our Democrat opponent want the country to believe Georgia's updated voting laws are nearly identical to ones in place during the Jim Crow era that disenfranchised black voters. Mr. President, that's absurd. I don't support your federal voting legislation, and I'm not a racist. The sad truth about Democrats today is that if they don't get the outcome they want, they accuse Republicans of being bad actors out to destroy America. Until we can figure out a way to put a lid on that kind of talk, our country is not going to heal. Thank you for your support, Herschel Walker Republican Candidate for Senate | | PAID FOR BY TEAM HERSCHEL, INC. Don't want to receive any more of our emails? We hate to see you go, but ._

name: =?utf-8?Q?Brice=20Wiggins?=
subject: Brice Wiggins Weekly Legislative & Campaign Trail Update Jan. 23, 2022
body:
| | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/ab07c0a7c9bd/brice-wiggins-for-congress-highlights-from-the-campaign-trail-8795409?e=698f056321)
---
Here is a recap of a few highlights from this week in my role as State Senator from District 52, as well as updates from our Congressional Campaign. Fulfilling my duties as State Senator will be a top priority for me during this campaign. After all, I took an oath to honorably serve my constituents and the Constitution.
|
---
|
---
_“It’s amazing what you can accomplish if you do not care who gets the credit.”_ _-Harry S. Truman_
|
---
| | | | | |
---
|
### Senate Bill 2444: Teacher Pay Raise
On Friday, the Senate passed our version of the teacher pay bill ([**SB 2444**](https://bricewiggins.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=094d93d9b142a07f60f23dbdd&id=97ce76f537&e=698f056321)), which will provide teachers with an average salary increase of $4,700 over two years. My mother, Linda Wiggins, taught for 30+ years. I will take care of our educators, as they so graciously take on the responsibility of teaching future generations of Mississippi.|
---
| | | | | |
### Senate Bill 2113: Prohibiting the Teaching of Critical Race Theory
[**Senate Bill 2113**](https://bricewiggins.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=094d93d9b142a07f60f23dbdd&id=3de0ce57e4&e=698f056321), prohibiting the teaching of critical race theory, which I co-sponsored, passed the Senate by a vote of 32-2 on Friday. Critical Race Theory has become a divisive issue in our country. Sadly, some on the left have chosen to use our school systems to breed this divisiveness. SB2113 rightly ensures that no race will be promoted as inferior or superior to any other. President Abraham Lincoln, our first Republican President, reminded us at the Gettysburg Address, “our fathers brought forth on this continent, a new nation, conceived in Liberty, and dedicated to the proposition that all men are created equal. . . It is for us the living, rather, to be dedicated . . .to [their] unfinished work.” View my full statement by clicking [**HERE**](https://bricewiggins.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=094d93d9b142a07f60f23dbdd&id=9e13134c73&e=698f056321).|
---
|
---
| | | | | |
---
|
### Senate Bill 2451: Mississippi Equal Pay Act
We can no longer be the last state in the nation without an equal pay law for women. Change is long overdue. I am proud to co-author [**Senate Bill 2451**](https://bricewiggins.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=094d93d9b142a07f60f23dbdd&id=92112546c8&e=698f056321) with Nicole Akins Boyd of Oxford, which provides a remedy for any employee that is paid less for equal work based on sex. I have worked closely with Attorney General Lynn Fitch on this bill to ensure equal footing for the women in our workforce. I look at my daughter, and I want this to tell her that the state of Mississippi is good for women in the workforce and for our next generation of women. Click [**HERE**](https://bricewiggins.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=094d93d9b142a07f60f23dbdd&id=327fa510a7&e=698f056321) to read the article by Mississippi Today in which I was quoted to read more. I will call the bill up for committee consideration on Tuesday this coming week. |
---
| | | | | |
### Picayune: Coffee at PJ’s
Enjoyed catching up with the locals at PJ’s Coffee in Picayune. This group wasn’t afraid to ask the hard questions and I’m always willing to meet people face-to-face and discuss real issues.|
---
|
---
| | | | | |
---
|
### Early Childhood Development Capitol Day
I’m proud to have been on the Legislator Panel for the Mississippi Early Learning Alliance’s third annual Early Childhood Development Day at the Capitol this past Tuesday. With 2013’s Early Learning Collaborative Act which I authored, Mississippi has become a national leader in early education. I take every opportunity to talk about our success. Mississippi’s accomplishments must be told, including in Washington, D.C. Click [**HERE**](https://bricewiggins.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=094d93d9b142a07f60f23dbdd&id=6ec80b3536&e=698f056321) to watch our policy video on the importance of early education.|
---
| | | | | |
### Kick Off for First Responders Caucus
A Voice for First Responders Kicks Off! With our first meeting this past Wednesday, we officially started the First Responders Caucus. With it, we will bring an overdue voice to the Capitol for the men and women who put their lives on the line everyday to help us. Bipartisan, Senate and House, we'll fight for the issues that are important to law enforcement, paramedics, firefighters, troopers, etc. Having been Assistant District Attorney for years, I am honored to be a founding member and Senate Chairman. I look forward to working with the other founders Rep. Bubba Carpenter (President) and Rep. Jeff Hale (House Chairman). Click [**HERE**](https://bricewiggins.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=094d93d9b142a07f60f23dbdd&id=413ea2adcd&e=698f056321) to read more about the First Responders Caucus.|
---
|
---
| | | | | |
---
|
### Redevelopment in Downtown Pascagoula Keeps Rolling Along
Last year, Jackson, Harrison, Hancock, Pearl River, Stone, and George Counties all received economic development funds via the BP/GCRF process. The legislature has final say, and I was proud to have been the lead negotiator in the Senate. With its nexus to Ingalls, Chevron, Mobile County and their expanding workforces, making Pascagoula a hub for quality living has been a priority of the Pascagoula Redevelopment Authority. Results matter. Click [**HERE**](https://bricewiggins.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=094d93d9b142a07f60f23dbdd&id=8d66c9a5f7&e=698f056321) to read Gulf Live’s article to learn more.Also, watch our policy video on economic recovery and resiliency by clicking [**HERE**](https://bricewiggins.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=094d93d9b142a07f60f23dbdd&id=6662657e36&e=698f056321).|
---
| | | | | | |
---
|
---
## The Week Ahead
* Work by Committees Will Be in Full Force
* ARPA (Stimulus) Funds to Move Through Appropriations Committee (of which I am a member)
* Recommendations of Domestic Law Task Force Will be Taken Up in Judiciary A (which I chair)

|
---
Please stay tuned for future emails with updates from the legislative session, District 52, community events, and our Congressional campaign. Our campaign is in full swing and as you know, getting our message out takes funding. If you would like to provide financial support, please click the button below.

Sincerely,
| [DONATE TO OUR CAMPAIGN](https://bricewiggins.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=094d93d9b142a07f60f23dbdd&id=f7117cc3eb&e=698f056321)
---
|
---
|
---
Keep Up With Us!
| | | | [](https://bricewiggins.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=094d93d9b142a07f60f23dbdd&id=1b48399812&e=698f056321)| [](https://bricewiggins.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=094d93d9b142a07f60f23dbdd&id=28f5ca120c&e=698f056321)| [](https://bricewiggins.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=094d93d9b142a07f60f23dbdd&id=52051c3717&e=698f056321)| [](mailto:info@bricewiggins.ms)| [](https://bricewiggins.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=094d93d9b142a07f60f23dbdd&id=7c078d4642&e=698f056321)
---|---|---|---|---
| [CALL OUR CAMPAIGN](tel:6013853420)
---
| | |
---

Our mailing address is:
Brice Wiggins for CongressP.O. Box 1611Ocean Springs, MS 39566
[Add us to your address book](https://bricewiggins.us5.list-manage.com/vcard?u=094d93d9b142a07f60f23dbdd&id=6ffd7231cc)

Want to change how you receive these emails?
You can [update your preferences](https://bricewiggins.us5.list-manage.com/profile?u=094d93d9b142a07f60f23dbdd&id=6ffd7231cc&e=698f056321&c=1bf48e8fbf) or [unsubscribe](https://bricewiggins.us5.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=094d93d9b142a07f60f23dbdd&id=6ffd7231cc&e=698f056321&c=1bf48e8fbf)

[](http://www.mailchimp.com/email-referral/?utm_source=freemium_newsletter&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=referral_marketing&aid=094d93d9b142a07f60f23dbdd&afl=1)
|

body:
Volunteer Training Saturday, 1/29/22 at Noon | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/webvortex/i-have-never-shied-away-from-a-fight-8802073?e=bb02dd73bf)
---
| [ ](https://centurionforcongress.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=986079a9d70593df507cfab3a&id=6b5dfc21c0&e=bb02dd73bf)
---
| | Hi Friends,

I need you to take action. Please RSVP and share info for the Centurion Townhall & Fundraiser, 19 Feb 2022, Post #3433, 10154 Bell Wright Road VFW Summerville. Time 6PM to 8PM. Invite your friends with the attached flyer. We will be planning on hosting town halls and fundraisers across the District. If you would like to be on the events planning committee team please reach out to [mystidatwell@gmail.com](mailto:mystidatwell@gmail.com), 404-719-7393.

Share the American Thinker article by Andrea Widburg, posted 22 January 2022, "[Its time to take 2022s Republican primaries very very Seriously.](https://centurionforcongress.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=986079a9d70593df507cfab3a&id=01d778b742&e=bb02dd73bf)"

I need a volunteer interested in Graphic Design and making flyers. Please reach us as soon as possible if you're interested.

We have a campaign manager coming onboard and want to introduce her to you at Campaign Training this Saturday, January 29, 2022 from Noon - 3:00 at 263 Decatur Drive, Summerville, please arrive on time.

---
|
---
| | **ACTIONS NEEDED:
1\. SUBSCRIBE to my [YouTube CHANNEL](https://centurionforcongress.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=986079a9d70593df507cfab3a&id=6814538a0e&e=bb02dd73bf).
2\. BE A 30 Second Volunteer by Liking, Commenting and Sharing on my [Facebook Page](https://centurionforcongress.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=986079a9d70593df507cfab3a&id=1a5f7f7088&e=bb02dd73bf), [YouTube CHANNEL](https://centurionforcongress.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=986079a9d70593df507cfab3a&id=611a085320&e=bb02dd73bf) and [Twitter](https://centurionforcongress.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=986079a9d70593df507cfab3a&id=daed3d0b17&e=bb02dd73bf). DAILY!! DAILY!!
3\. Sign up for Volunteer Campaign Training this Saturday, January 29th from 12:00 - 3:00 PM, 263 Decatur Drive, Summerville, SC 29484.
**
**Urgent Message: Subscribe to my **[YouTube Channel](https://centurionforcongress.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=986079a9d70593df507cfab3a&id=99bafc7491&e=bb02dd73bf)**. **

Thank you all!
Ingrid Centurion
---
| |
---
| Republican Candidate for Congress, SC-01

name: Rebecca Parson
subject: It really is amazing
body:
Hi there, “But how will you pay for it?” It really is amazing how that question never comes up in relation to war, but always comes up in relation to Medicare for All, ending homelessness, and ending poverty. [**The truth is that, as the richest country on Earth, we have money for our priorities. The problem is what our current priorities are. I’m running for Congress to fight for new priorities: an end to medical bankruptcy, homelessness, and poverty. Please chip in now to help me do that.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40985475/326859590/2061262125?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzU4NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzY2FkODc3MS1kMTdjLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=DiUwOxMpk1sLTK2qBHL97M8YTyTUnE_dCSSUh6ExZH0=) The US is funneling money and weapons to Ukraine (much of that going to Ukrainian neo-Nazis) to fight a war we should have no part in. The US and UK are claiming — with no evidence — that Russia is planning to install new leadership in Ukraine. Is this allegation about Russian plotting true? I don’t know, but it’s pretty rich for the US to get up in arms about this considering we did the exact same thing 8 years ago. In 2014, a phone call leaked between a US Assistant Secretary of State and the US Ambassador to Ukraine in which they plotted to install a new leader in Ukraine. [**We really need to stop meddling in other countries’ affairs and promote peace, not war. If you agree, please donate now to help me win, so I can fight for a pro-peace agenda in Congress.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40985476/326859591/2061262125?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzU4NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzY2FkODc3MS1kMTdjLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=DiUwOxMpk1sLTK2qBHL97M8YTyTUnE_dCSSUh6ExZH0=)
